name: With Honor Action
subject: The ACES Act Passes Congress 🛩️
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WITH HONOR ACTION, INC
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us16.campaign-archive.com/?e=33f53a5b1a&u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=5c9020e428)
---
| | | |
---
| | | | [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=81e8c470ac&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| Friends,

Earlier this week, Congress unanimously passed the ACES Act, a bipartisan piece of legislation that requires the Department of Veterans Affairs to conduct a study on the prevalence of cancer among aircrew in the Army, Navy, Air Force, and Marine Corps. This study will hopefully shed more light on why cancer rates are higher among military aviators and aircrew. You can read the text of the legislation [here](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=5b3b0e9b22&e=33f53a5b1a).

Introduced by current Air Force reservist Rep. August Pfluger and Navy veteran Rep. Jimmy Panetta, both members of the [For Country Caucus](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=2da40b5a80&e=33f53a5b1a) in the House, and Navy veteran and With Honor ally Sen. Mark Kelly, and Army veteran Sen. Tom Cotton in the Senate, this legislation is not only important, but has deep, personal significance to Rep. Pfluger.

Colonel (retired) Andy Shurtleff, who served alongside Rep. Pfluger as a fighter pilot, [testified](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=32b3d6719a&e=33f53a5b1a) to Congress earlier this year on the urgent need for the ACES Act, only two months before passing away after losing his battle with cancer. The passage of this bill is a testament to the bipartisan cooperation of our veteran policymakers and to Colonel Shurtleff’s service to his country and dedication to this critical issue.

📺 You can watch Rep. Pfluger's floor remarks on final passage of the ACES Act [here](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=5a9ad82d68&e=33f53a5b1a).
---
|
---
|
# **With Honor Action joins Senators Young and Kelly to advocate for the SHIPS for America Act**
---
|
---
|
---
---
| This week, With Honor Action partnered with the New American Industrial Alliance (NAIA) to host a day of briefings on Capitol Hill with Senator Todd Young, a Marine Corps veteran, Senator Mark Kelly, a Navy veteran, congressional staff, and industry leaders.

As With Honor Action VP of Government Affairs Sean McClintock said, "The need to revitalize America's shipbuilding industry is unmistakable. Water covers 70% of the globe, 80% of the world's population lives within 100 miles of the ocean, and 90% of all international trade travels by sea. The SHIPS Act is led by two veterans who set aside parochialism and partisan politics because they understand how crucial this issue is to our national security."
---
|
---
|
# **For Country Caucus member Rep. John James: "I'm a combat veteran. No one asks or cares what party you're in when they call you over the radio for help."**
---
| [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=3955841042&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| Earlier this week, For Country Caucus member Rep. John James joined 13th & Park for a powerful conversation about how his experiences as a combat-tested Army pilot continue to shape his mission-driven, people-first approach to leadership on Capitol Hill.

A decorated Apache pilot and West Point graduate, Rep. James spent years in the skies over Iraq leading missions that demanded courage, quick thinking, and above all, care for the soldiers on the ground. “High Above the Best” wasn’t just the Army Aviation motto—it became his personal philosophy. Even in the most harrowing moments, it was never about him. It was always about the mission. Always about the people.

That same mindset shapes how he serves today. In Congress, Rep. James refuses to get stuck in partisan boxes. “Mission first. People always,” he says. “You don’t get to choose one or the other—you have to do both.” It’s why he’s proud to work across the aisle as a member of the For Country Caucus, and especially with his West Point classmate, Rep. Pat Ryan, with whom we awarded With Honor Action's inaugural Freshman Fire Team award last year.

And at the heart of it all? Service. As he put it best, “Service before self is more than just a slogan—it’s a way of life.” For John James, being a leader means listening, finding common ground, and always keeping people at the center. That’s the kind of leadership our nation deserves.
---
|
---
_With Honor Co-Founder & CEO Rye Barcott awarding the inaugural Freshman Fire Team award to Representatives John James (R-MI) and Pat Ryan (D-NY), who were classmates at West Point._
|
---

and consider forwarding this to a friend who may be interested in learning -- and doing -- more for our country.

name: StateDemocrats.com
subject: Stephen Colbert, Donald Trump, and CBS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
What do you think about the cancellation of Stephen Colbert’s late-night television show?
#

**CBS just made a BIG mistake, Peter. They announced that they are CANCELLING Stephen Colbert’s late-night television show.** Whether you watch every night or just catch clips online, you probably know Stephen Colbert as one of the only comedians willing to bravely call out Donald Trump + the MAGA Republicans for tearing up our country. _Now, they’re taking Colbert off-air altogether._ **Honestly? This news hurts.** Especially since far-right voices will continue getting prime-time platforms to spread their lies completely unchecked. **So today, we’re asking Americans like you to tell us:** **[What do you think about the cancellation of Stephen Colbert’s late-night television show on CBS?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92649?t=1&akid=9168%2E614464%2E5Nx8tP)** | [I’M OPPOSED TO IT](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92649?t=2&akid=9168%2E614464%2E5Nx8tP) [I SUPPORT IT](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92649?t=3&akid=9168%2E614464%2E5Nx8tP)
---
**Your response will help us understand how many American voters are paying attention to the blatant attacks on free speech + free press.**
Whether it’s late-night television or our democracy itself, we cannot afford to sit back while Donald Trump + MAGA extremism gain more ground.
Thank you in advance for sharing your input!

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdc-email-footer?refcode=em20250725-9168-footer&t=4&refcode2=9168_614464_5Nx8tP&akid=9168%2E614464%2E5Nx8tP)**
---

name: David Hogg
subject: Your support fuels leaders who fight for us.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
This is what real leadership looks like.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250725-1&t=1&akid=2437%2E587540%2Eyq1XlI)
Peter,
**In 2024, Leaders We Deserve endorsed Christine Cockley, a bold and progressive young candidate for the Ohio House. With your help, she won.**
After the election, Christine called to tell me something I’ll never forget. She had just been invited to a fundraiser with insurance lobbyists, people with direct business before the committee she now serves on. They pressured her to take corporate PAC money.
**_She refused._**
Because of your support, she didn’t need to think twice.
**[That moment is exactly why Leaders We Deserve exists. If you believe in electing more candidates like Christine, please split a donation between her campaign and LWD today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250725_1_christinecockley?refcode=em20250725-2437&amount=5&refcode2=2437_587540_yq1XlI&akid=2437%2E587540%2Eyq1XlI)**
Now, Christine is making an impact in the legislature. Here are just a few of the things she’s already accomplished:
* Introduced a bipartisan bill to hold law enforcement accountable for missing persons cases, inspired by a tragedy in her own neighborhood
* Passed a resolution recognizing Disability Pride Month in Ohio
* Won support for local farmers through an amendment honoring National Farmers Market Week
* Led a bipartisan push against a reckless federal AI ban that threatened jobs and education in Central Ohio
* Voted no on a state budget that handed billions to the wealthy while cutting essential services for working families

This is what Leaders We Deserve is all about. Christine is standing up for her values and her community and we’re going to elect more champions like her.
**[Can you split a donation between Christine Cockley and Leaders We Deserve today to keep powering this work?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250725_1_christinecockley?refcode=em20250725-2437&amount=5&refcode2=2437_587540_yq1XlI&akid=2437%2E587540%2Eyq1XlI)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250725_1_christinecockley?amount=5&refcode=em20250725-2437&refcode2=2437_587540_yq1XlI&akid=2437%2E587540%2Eyq1XlI)**
With gratitude,
David Hogg
Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250725-1&t=2&refcode2=2437_587540_yq1XlI&akid=2437%2E587540%2Eyq1XlI)**

Here are just a few of the things she’s already accomplished: Introduced a bipartisan bill to hold law enforcement accountable for missing persons cases, inspired by a tragedy in her own neighborhood Passed a resolution recognizing Disability Pride Month in Ohio Won support for local farmers through an amendment honoring National Farmers Market Week Led a bipartisan push against a reckless federal AI ban that threatened jobs and education in Central Ohio Voted no on a state budget that handed billions to the wealthy while cutting essential services for working families This is what Leaders We Deserve is all about. Christine is standing up for her values and her community and we’re going to elect more champions like her. With gratitude, David Hogg Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve

name: Rep. Zoe Lofgren
subject: Our sitting president has tried to make a mockery of the J6 Committee and our country.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,

I want to take a minute to talk about Donald Trump’s pardons of the January 6th rioters.

On Trump’s very first day of his second term in office, he pardoned nearly 1,600 violent criminals who took part in the Capitol attacks on January 6th, 2021.

As someone who helped lead the investigation into the January 6th attacks, I’m still disgusted and outraged by this decision.

Even though the J6 Committee was disbanded, the fight is not over. I will continue to lead the charge in Congress to protect our democracy. So please chip in at least

$25 now to fund my reelection campaign and help elect Democrats who will fight back against Trump.

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:

EXPRESS DONATE: $5 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?expresslane=true&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-25_J6C_PRD_ES-28349&amount=5]
EXPRESS DONATE: $25 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?expresslane=true&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-25_J6C_PRD_ES-28349&amount=25]
EXPRESS DONATE: $50 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?expresslane=true&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-25_J6C_PRD_ES-28349&amount=50]

To this day, Donald Trump continues to call the criminals who attacked our Capitol on January 6th, “patriots”... a disgrace to those who have served and continue to fight to protect our Constitution and uphold our democracy.

It’s simple, Peter : While I and my brave colleagues served on the J6 Committee to further protect and fight for our democracy, our sitting president has tried to make a mockery of our work and our country.

That’s why former J6 Committee members like Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger are standing with me and working to help keep me in the fight in Congress.

Please chip in at least $25 now to keep me fighting in Congress and help elect more Democrats who will hold Trump accountable. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-25_J6C_PRD_ES-28349&amount=25]

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:

EXPRESS DONATE: $5 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?expresslane=true&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-25_J6C_PRD_ES-28349&amount=5]

Together.

Rep. Zoe Lofgren

Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help.
Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?refcode=emfooter&amount=25]
Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
Lofgren for Congress
PO Box 913
San Jose, CA 95113
United States

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Supreme Court Election Law Battle Begins!
body:
Election Law Court Update

[INSIDE JW]

JUDICIAL WATCH FILES SUPREME COURT BRIEF IN HISTORIC ELECTION
INTEGRITY CASE

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=35737&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1rOHB2SUlTd0FMdyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=dca924fdf8ccb5553885b89bf3437eeae904b3f359308ab787d79496ada6089c]

Judicial Watch is in the midst of a massive Supreme Court battle that
goes to the heart of protecting the rule of law in elections.

In our latest effort, we filed our opening brief
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=35707&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2Jvc3Qtdi1pbC1ib2FyZC1vZi1lbGVjdGlvbnMtc2NvdHVzLWJyaWVmLTAyNzU0LTI2NDQtNTY4Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=3a30b634aa43d688b087924956aca5ad4734fdf3d0308b58ebe537cd59f9b434]
to the Supreme Court in a case filed on behalf of Congressman Mike
Bost and two presidential electors, who are before the court to
vindicate their standing to challenge an Illinois law extending
Election Day for 14 days beyond the date established by federal law
(_Rep. Michael J. Bost, Laura Pollastrini, and Susan Sweeney v. The
Illinois State Board of Elections and Bernadette Matthews_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=28345&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21pY2hhZWwtYm9zdC1ldC1hbC12LWlsLWJvYXJkLW9mLWVsZWN0aW9ucy1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDI3NTQvXV8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=f4376e8898ff95bf9e3947157b9ae5b6c5656a891d5567d3dadc20895ed43f3c
_(No.
1:22-cv-02754, 23-2644, 24-568)).

In June, the Supreme Court agreed to hear
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=35335&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc2NvdHVzLWVsZWN0aW9uLWxhdy1jaGFsbGVuZ2UvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=4841abe7f2172ec048918b2b4dc7f3bb885d8869c1c3c70c07bd660c90d5538b]
our
appeal of the decision
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=33940&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcG9zdC1lbGVjdGlvbi1kYXktY291bnRpbmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=200db680ce3c703e447d311dde7b46d7b573ff10009ce8fd96a03975cfd9caab]
of the
U.S. Court of Appeals for the Seventh Circuit in this case. The lower
courts had denied that Bost and the electors had standing to challenge
Illinois’ practice of counting ballots received up to 14 days after
Election Day. (The Election Day lawsuit was initially filed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=27407&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbGF3c3VpdC1hZ2FpbnN0LWlsbGlub2lzLXRvLXN0b3AtY291bnRpbmctb2YtYmFsbG90cy1hZnRlci1lbGVjdGlvbi1kYXkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=1b8b2e7ef9a18e3f797a44d49d3fad7b007089973d519a020f4f559472dd9712]
on May 25, 2022.)

Our Supreme Court brief
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=35707&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2Jvc3Qtdi1pbC1ib2FyZC1vZi1lbGVjdGlvbnMtc2NvdHVzLWJyaWVmLTAyNzU0LTI2NDQtNTY4Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=3a30b634aa43d688b087924956aca5ad4734fdf3d0308b58ebe537cd59f9b434]
states:

> Federal law sets the first Tuesday after the first Monday in
> November as the federal Election Day.
>
> ***
>
> Candidates have an obvious interest in the lawfulness and fairness
> of the rules that govern the elections into which they pour their
> time and resources. They also have an obvious interest “in
> ensuring that the final vote tally accurately reflects the legally
> valid votes cast.”
>
> ***
>
> Candidates pour enormous resources into running for election and
> have an obvious interest in the rules that dictate how long their
> races will last and how the ballots will be counted. They also have
> a distinct interest “in ensuring that the final vote tally
> accurately reflects the legally valid votes cast.”

Our legal team makes a simple and powerful argument to the Supreme
Court: It is obvious that candidates have standing to challenge
unlawful rules governing the elections into which they are pouring
untold resources.

In March 2025, the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit
declined to rehear
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=34793&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdm90ZXMtYWZ0ZXItZWxlY3Rpb24tZGF5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=c0f3568420a376267ec55d2667e6ff169135ee4f00825fb2d6696fb02eb9cfbb]
its previous
ruling in which it agreed with us that it was unlawful for Mississippi
to count ballots that arrived after Election Day (_Libertarian Party
of Mississippi v Wetzel et al_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=31309&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2xpYmVydGFyaWFuLXBhcnR5LW9mLW1zLXYtd2V0emVsLWV0LWFsLWVsZWN0aW9uLWRheS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDAwMzcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=8b17a67db0b78887d0c4e1b32c94a7094cecaf7f1d08afbcdb222102c195103c].
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=31309&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2xpYmVydGFyaWFuLXBhcnR5LW9mLW1zLXYtd2V0emVsLWV0LWFsLWVsZWN0aW9uLWRheS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDAwMzcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=8b17a67db0b78887d0c4e1b32c94a7094cecaf7f1d08afbcdb222102c195103c]
(No. 1:24-cv-00037)).

In March 2025 we filed a federal lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=34772&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmFsbG90cy1yZWNlaXZlZC1hZnRlci1lbGVjdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=4c35f56617ad58c6489f018f4427a297e3b065189372590fbb86fed463faa76a]
against California on behalf of U.S. Rep. Darrell Issa to prevent
state election officials from extending Election Day for seven days
beyond the date established by federal law. California counts ballots
received up to seven days after Election Day (_Darrell Issa v. Shirley
N. Weber, in her official capacity_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=34746&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2lzc2Etdi13ZWJlci1lbGVjdGlvbi1kYXktY29tcGxhaW50Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=90a17399bd119174a4f593e03a3e6ce941aa400fbaa6367e91434eb3106cd322]
(No. 3:25-cv-00598)).

Paul Clement, who has argued more than 100 cases before the Supreme
Court, is representing Congressman Bost and the electors with Judicial
Watch before the Supreme Court. Clement is former solicitor general
under President George W. Bush from 2005-2008 and is widely regarded
as among the top Supreme Court litigators in the country.

Robert Popper, a Judicial Watch senior attorney, leads our election
law program. Popper was previously in the Voting Section of the Civil
Rights Division of the Justice Department, where he managed voting
rights investigations, litigations, consent decrees, and settlements
in dozens of states.

T. Russell Nobile, a Judicial Watch senior attorney, is part of our
voting integrity efforts and focuses on campaign and voting issues,
civil rights issues, constitutional law, official misconduct by public
institutions and officials, and other issues.

Other examples of our election law work include:

* In April 2025, we announced
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=34935&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbmFtZXMtY2xlYW5lZC1mcm9tLXZvdGVyLXJvbGxzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=2b65a9d90fd0b27f0f28399da09fac1b54d2a5ebc8e9b021032739afe3c7244a]
that
our analysis of voter registration lists has led to lawsuits and legal
actions under the National Voter Registration Act
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=435&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3YvY3J0L25hdGlvbmFsLXZvdGVyLXJlZ2lzdHJhdGlvbi1hY3QtMTk5My1udnJhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=f158da4a5ae1de35e565a6a8f53da89cd8322253d93d918bf210c72ca3be414b]
(NVRA) that have resulted in the removal of five million
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=21208&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGFnL252cmEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=6895639061ab0e9dd273a0f81e79d0c7c0d5d5fea1149f126ef741e00ac8c21d]
names from voter rolls in
nearly a dozen states and localities over the last several years.
* In October 2024, we filed a lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=33760&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvb3JlZ29uLWNsZWFuLXVwLXZvdGVyLXJvbGxzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=39b27e83ca79bb9fe9d5ce44e69256c7fe13213ae7767178329c679176397cf3]

of itself, the Constitution Party of Oregon, and two lawfully

against Lavonne Griffin-Valade in her official capacity as Oregon

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=33744&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL29yLW52cmEtY29tcGxhaW50LTAxNzgzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=3bcbb1a7c80c081e8328230be286e16ae73fc909d5cf59db4101e40b2f3923cd]
(No. 6:24-cv-01783)).
* In May 2024, we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=32338&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2FsaWZvcm5pYS1jbGVhbi11cC12b3Rpbmctcm9sbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=43118f5469b09d5a03dd6c0922ba3e0197ee76e0636575890f560ca9c7026755]

JUSTICE DEPARTMENT SUPPORTS JUDICIAL WATCH IN ILLINOIS VOTER ROLL
CLEAN UP

Judicial Watch continues to take the lead in cleaning up voter rolls
around the country, and now we have some help from the feds.

The U.S. Department of Justice filed a statement of interest
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=35693&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaWxsaW5vaXMtYm9hcmQtb2YtZWxlY3Rpb25zLWRvai1pbnRlcmVzdC0wMTg2Ny8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=a84ea1bd09c6e26cdd2c7b4fd42b0ffce761ee80c2023f0f0163c307e2698f68]
in our lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=31560&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaWxsaW5vaXMtdm90aW5nLXJvbGxzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=b9d889574013d51b5bb2a699b8d7eb63339c216bd80c8fc0830a6ff6ae1bf019]
that seeks to force the clean-up of Illinois’ election rolls as
federal law requires (_Judicial Watch, Inc., et al. v. Illinois State
Board of Elections, et al. _
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=31565&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaWxsaW5vaXMtYm9hcmQtb2YtZWxlY3Rpb25zLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMTg2Ny9dKE5vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=3b51711290804a71798688d2fc760c6b070d2832612ce7971af2a22999555be3.
1:24-cv-01867
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=31545&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaWxsaW5vaXMtYm9hcmQtb2YtZWxlY3Rpb25zLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMTg2Ny8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=16428315e1a3dc5aa1a52e0025afa58f93fe983bcd5f4115a9b6f427df2cd076])).
U.S. District Court Judge Sara L. Ellis set a hearing in the case for
next week.

The Justice Department filing notes: “This case presents important
questions regarding enforcement of the National Voter Registration
Act.” In a press release
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=35694&F=T&&hash=a3c689197bef0b022f5dc0d33c061c44c7ff9e23347d80c1a73faf5c8cbb009f]
announcing the Statement of Interest, Assistant Attorney General
Harmeet K. Dhillon of the Justice Department’s Civil Rights Division
said:

> It is critical to remove ineligible voters from the registration
> rolls so that elections are conducted fairly, accurately, and
> without fraud. Under the NVRA [National Voter Registration Act],
> states have the responsibility to conduct a robust program of list
> maintenance. The Department of Justice will vigorously enforce those
> requirements to ensure compliance.

The National Voter Registration Act
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=435&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3YvY3J0L25hdGlvbmFsLXZvdGVyLXJlZ2lzdHJhdGlvbi1hY3QtMTk5My1udnJhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=f158da4a5ae1de35e565a6a8f53da89cd8322253d93d918bf210c72ca3be414b]
(NVRA) requires states to “conduct a general program that makes a
reasonable effort to remove” from the official voter rolls “the
names of ineligible voters” who have died or changed residence. The
law requires registrations to be cancelled when voters fail to respond
to address confirmation notices and then fail to vote in the next two
general federal elections. In 2018, the Supreme Court confirmed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=26310&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc3VwcmVtZWNvdXJ0Lmdvdi9vcGluaW9ucy8xN3BkZi8xNi05ODBfZjJxMy5wZGY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=1d1244a9a7e3186f078e968636ba0553fa3d9278af94361dcddcd24ee326f4bb]
that
such removals are mandatory.

Our lawsuit details that 23 Illinois counties, with a combined
registration list of 980,089 voters, reported removing a combined
total of only 100 registrations in the last two-year reporting period
under a crucial provision of the NVRA. This is an “absurdly small”
number, and there “is no possible way these counties can be
conducting a general program that makes reasonable effort to cancel
registrations of voters who have become ineligible because of a change
of residence while removing so few registrations.”

Our lawsuit demonstrates Illinois voter rolls are a mess and the
Justice Department is right to be concerned about the state’s
failures to keep them clean.

In June 2025, the Justice Department filed a statement of interest
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=35459&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY29tcGVsLW9yZWdvbi10by1jbGVhbi12b3Rlci1yb2xscy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=79ae1298842fa15c82a816073e49517f8ad55a6d44b8f95068a5fc24a9a886d1]
in
Judicial Watch’s lawsuit to compel Oregon to clean its voter rolls.

Judicial Watch is a national leader in voting integrity and voting
rights
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=35695&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGFnL2VsZWN0aW9uK2xhdy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=9397a9e3d745abe0c3f21cda7e7ee80355607c49f190c9e5632b403f671aff4b].

In July 2024, we asked
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=33030&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdm90ZXItcm9sbHMtaW4taWxsaW5vaXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=46ba71f07bbcb0c399a0c55329d643509443c5018c20404947f8f490beef4652]

and Breakthrough Ideas

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES OVER REMOVAL OF WEST POINT CREST FROM BIBLES IN
CHAPEL

Judicial Watch is keeping a close eye on our military academies, which
came under leftist pressure to retreat from traditional values during
the Biden administration.

Judicial Watch filed a FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=35726&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9kLXdlc3QtcG9pbnQtY3Jlc3QtY29tcGxhaW50LTAxODU1Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=47c93468653b281e0fc9601817b304d67c29774c1f36e1f11417d433b3704da4]
against the U.S. Department of Defense for records about the removal
of the West Point crest from Bibles in the Cadet Chapel at the United
States Military Academy (_Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of
Defense_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=35726&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9kLXdlc3QtcG9pbnQtY3Jlc3QtY29tcGxhaW50LTAxODU1Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=47c93468653b281e0fc9601817b304d67c29774c1f36e1f11417d433b3704da4]
(No. 1:25-cv-01855)).

The lawsuit was filed after the U.S. Military Academy at West Point, a
component of the Defense Department, failed to respond to a December
13, 2024, FOIA request for:

* All documents that form the basis upon which the decision was made
to remove the West Point Crest from the cover of the Bibles in the
West Point Chapel. Upon information and belief, the West Point Crest
has appeared on the cover of the Bibles in the West Point Chapel since
1984, but circa December 2024, the Crest has been removed from the
Bibles.

* All emails sent to and from Col. Matthew Pawlikowski [former U.S.
Military Academy chaplain
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=35728&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYXJteS5taWwvYXJ0aWNsZS8yMzg4MTIvYV9odW1ibGVfY2hhbmdlb3Zlcl9iZXR3ZWVuX2NoYXBsYWlucz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=0aacc897c2af607a7ebc868ae0503b3947194b660963acf71a2538d2ee28bd16]]
regarding the crest’s appearance on the cover of the Bibles used in
the West Point Chapel.

We filed the FOIA request after receiving information from a reliable
source – the MacArthur Society
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=35729&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9tYWNhcnRodXJzb2NpZXR5Lm9yZy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=843c811dc8416a16d99dd78aaf8eed011fb8e2bc506861cd8725ec7618c69056],
an
association of West Point graduates – that the West Point crest had
been on the Bibles since 1984 and was removed sometime in December
2024.

In a related incident, in a March 12, 2024, “Message from the 61st
Superintendent
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=32774&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2VzdHBvaW50LmVkdS9uZXdzL2NvbW11bml0eS1uZXdzL21lc3NhZ2UtdGhlLTYxc3Qtc3VwZXJpbnRlbmRlbnRdLOKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=06e14a93bff981baa0ab1ce1f2ae2662a861b265cd56fc5cfe4815ffdfcfc48b
Superintendent LTG Steven Gilland announced a change to the Army’s
mission statement, referencing the Army’s continued commitment to

themselves were deleted.

It appears the Biden administration and its leftist accomplices were
determined to sever all connections between West Point and traditional
values. They added divisive DEI programs to the curriculum and removed

statement. Now, we learn they removed the West Point crest from Bibles
in the West Point Chapel. It’s a wonder they didn’t remove the
Bibles.

COURT STANDS WITH PARENT AGAINST BUCKS COUNTY WITHHOLDING COVID
RECORDS

Here’s a victory for the little guy.

The Pennsylvania Commonwealth Court ruled
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=35723&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2J1Y2tzLXYtYnJvY2stanVseS0yMDI1LW9yZGVyLTUzMS02NTgvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=6a372df056f7d375f34db9c6d6ce785711292559f3d6b4a9fec89df54a40fa0f]
that Bucks County, Pennsylvania, acted in bad faith in unlawfully
suppressing public records concerning the county health department’s
Covid-19 school guidance. The Commonwealth Court affirmed the trial
court’s
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=29440&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkZ2UtcnVsZXMtaW4tZmF2b3Itb2YtanctY2xpZW50Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=9abc48ed6d0056dc03225d63616b882aef600c9a79693990877efee074727c22]
May
2023 award of sanctions against Bucks County in the amount of $3,000
to Judicial Watch client, Megan Brock.

Brock is a parent who was sued by Bucks County after the trial
court’s ruling in her favor in an effort to prevent the release of
documents related to Covid restrictions and the re-opening of the
county’s schools that she requested under the Commonwealth’s
Right-to-Know Law (_County of Bucks v. Megan Brock_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=27904&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3RhZ3MvMDI5NzktMDMwODMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=355807b81102c7bac908d2cd49a79c82f4aae9055f23b8141a4b5178fc2830f8]
(Nos.
2022-03083 and 2022-02979)).

In February and March 2022, Brock sent a public records request asking
for all electronic correspondence between Bucks Co. executives and the
Health Department regarding public school Covid-19 guidance
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75527&L=35724&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9idWNrc2NvdW50eS5nb3YvRG9jdW1lbnRDZW50ZXIvVmlldy80NjA0L0NPQi1TY2hvb2wtR3VpZGFuY2UtMDgtMjMtMjAyMT9iaWRJZD0mdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=6b44e5b10a1835176454765ac7d93851de8e998ccf0d62e375c8580a4d1d20b6],
which was issued in August 2021. Brock was trying to determine who
authorized the reopening guidance that was changed to include more
restrictive rules about masks, quarantining, and testing.

“This ruling confirms that Bucks County egregiously targeted my
civil rights by wrongfully withholding public records,” said Brock.
“It's frightening as an everyday American to be bullied and attacked
by your own government. I’m extremely thankful to Judicial Watch for
their hard work in protecting my rights and the rights of all
Americans. When Bucks County filed multiple lawsuits against me for
exercising my constitutional rights, Judicial Watch was there when no
one else had my back. I’m grateful for this legal victory and the
precedent it sets for all Pennsylvanians, who have the right to
government transparency. This was not a fair fight, and I could not
have fought this battle alone. Judicial Watch has again ensured that
no one is above the law, not even radical, local politicians!”

This a nice victory for transparency and accountability over arrogant
local officials who abused citizens and schoolchildren over Covid. The
court’s imposing the maximum bad-faith penalties on Bucks County
sends a warning to every bureaucrat and elected official in
Pennsylvania that no one is above the law.

clean_body: Election Law Court Update [INSIDE JW] JUDICIAL WATCH FILES SUPREME COURT BRIEF IN HISTORIC ELECTION INTEGRITY CASE [] Judicial Watch is in the midst of a massive Supreme Court battle that goes to the heart of protecting the rule of law in elections. In our latest effort, we filed our opening brief [] to the Supreme Court in a case filed on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors, who are before the court to vindicate their standing to challenge an Illinois law extending Election Day for 14 days beyond the date established by federal law (Rep. Michael J. Bost, Laura Pollastrini, and Susan Sweeney v. The Illinois State Board of Elections and Bernadette Matthews [ (No. 1:22-cv-02754, 23-2644, 24-568)). In June, the Supreme Court agreed to hear [] our appeal of the decision [] of the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Seventh Circuit in this case. The lower courts had denied that Bost and the electors had standing to challenge Illinois’ practice of counting ballots received up to 14 days after Election Day. (The Election Day lawsuit was initially filed [] on May 25, 2022.) Our Supreme Court brief [] states: Federal law sets the first Tuesday after the first Monday in November as the federal Election Day. * Candidates have an obvious interest in the lawfulness and fairness of the rules that govern the elections into which they pour their time and resources. They also have an obvious interest “in ensuring that the final vote tally accurately reflects the legally valid votes cast.” Candidates pour enormous resources into running for election and have an obvious interest in the rules that dictate how long their races will last and how the ballots will be counted. They also have a distinct interest “in ensuring that the final vote tally accurately reflects the legally valid votes cast.” Our legal team makes a simple and powerful argument to the Supreme Court: It is obvious that candidates have standing to challenge unlawful rules governing the elections into which they are pouring untold resources. In March 2025, the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit declined to rehear [] its previous ruling in which it agreed with us that it was unlawful for Mississippi to count ballots that arrived after Election Day (Libertarian Party of Mississippi v Wetzel et al []. [] (No. 1:24-cv-00037)). In March 2025 we filed a federal lawsuit [] against California on behalf of U.S. Rep. Darrell Issa to prevent state election officials from extending Election Day for seven days beyond the date established by federal law. California counts ballots received up to seven days after Election Day (Darrell Issa v. Shirley N. Weber, in her official capacity [] (No. 3:25-cv-00598)). Paul Clement, who has argued more than 100 cases before the Supreme Court, is representing Congressman Bost and the electors with Judicial Watch before the Supreme Court. Clement is former solicitor general under President George W. Bush from 2005-2008 and is widely regarded as among the top Supreme Court litigators in the country. Robert Popper, a Judicial Watch senior attorney, leads our election law program. Popper was previously in the Voting Section of the Civil Rights Division of the Justice Department, where he managed voting rights investigations, litigations, consent decrees, and settlements in dozens of states. T. Russell Nobile, a Judicial Watch senior attorney, is part of our voting integrity efforts and focuses on campaign and voting issues, civil rights issues, constitutional law, official misconduct by public institutions and officials, and other issues. Other examples of our election law work include: In April 2025, we announced [] that our analysis of voter registration lists has led to lawsuits and legal actions under the National Voter Registration Act [] (NVRA) that have resulted in the removal of five million [] names from voter rolls in nearly a dozen states and localities over the last several years. In October 2024, we filed a lawsuit [] on behalf of itself, the Constitution Party of Oregon, and two lawfully registered voters of Umatilla County and Marion County, Oregon, against Lavonne Griffin-Valade in her official capacity as Oregon Secretary of State and the State of Oregon, to make “a reasonable effort to remove the names of ineligible voters” from the voter rolls as required by the NVRA (Judicial Watch, et al. v. The State of Oregon et al. [] (No. 6:24-cv-01783)). In May 2024, we sued [] California to clean up its voter rolls. The lawsuit, filed on behalf of Judicial Watch and the Libertarian Party of California, similarly asks the court to compel California to make “a reasonable effort” to remove ineligible registrants from the rolls as required by federal law (Judicial Watch Inc. and the Libertarian Party of CA v. Shirley Weber et al. [] (No. 2:24-cv-03750)). JUSTICE DEPARTMENT SUPPORTS JUDICIAL WATCH IN ILLINOIS VOTER ROLL CLEAN UP Judicial Watch continues to take the lead in cleaning up voter rolls around the country, and now we have some help from the feds. The U.S. Department of Justice filed a statement of interest [] in our lawsuit [] that seeks to force the clean-up of Illinois’ election rolls as federal law requires (Judicial Watch, Inc., et al. v. Illinois State Board of Elections, et al. [. 1:24-cv-01867 [])). U.S. District Court Judge Sara L. Ellis set a hearing in the case for next week. The Justice Department filing notes: “This case presents important questions regarding enforcement of the National Voter Registration Act.” In a press release [] announcing the Statement of Interest, Assistant Attorney General Harmeet K. Dhillon of the Justice Department’s Civil Rights Division said: It is critical to remove ineligible voters from the registration rolls so that elections are conducted fairly, accurately, and without fraud. Under the NVRA [National Voter Registration Act], states have the responsibility to conduct a robust program of list maintenance. The Department of Justice will vigorously enforce those requirements to ensure compliance. The National Voter Registration Act [] (NVRA) requires states to “conduct a general program that makes a reasonable effort to remove” from the official voter rolls “the names of ineligible voters” who have died or changed residence. The law requires registrations to be cancelled when voters fail to respond to address confirmation notices and then fail to vote in the next two general federal elections. In 2018, the Supreme Court confirmed [] that such removals are mandatory. Our lawsuit details that 23 Illinois counties, with a combined registration list of 980,089 voters, reported removing a combined total of only 100 registrations in the last two-year reporting period under a crucial provision of the NVRA. This is an “absurdly small” number, and there “is no possible way these counties can be conducting a general program that makes reasonable effort to cancel registrations of voters who have become ineligible because of a change of residence while removing so few registrations.” Our lawsuit demonstrates Illinois voter rolls are a mess and the Justice Department is right to be concerned about the state’s failures to keep them clean. In June 2025, the Justice Department filed a statement of interest [] in Judicial Watch’s lawsuit to compel Oregon to clean its voter rolls. Judicial Watch is a national leader in voting integrity and voting rights []. In July 2024, we asked [] a federal court to reject the State of Illinois’ motion to dismiss our lawsuit to compel the state to clean up its voter rolls. The lawsuit was filed in the United States District Court for the Northern District of Illinois, on behalf of the nonprofit organizations Illinois Family Action [] and Breakthrough Ideas [], and Carol J. Davis, a lawfully registered Illinois voter (Judicial Watch, Inc. et al v. The Illinois State Board of Elections et al. [] (No. 1:24-cv-01867)). In May 2024, we sued [] California to clean up its voter rolls. The lawsuit, filed on behalf of the Libertarian Party of California, similarly asks the court to compel California to make “a reasonable effort” to remove ineligible registrants from the rolls as required by federal law (Judicial Watch Inc. and the Libertarian Party of CA v. Shirley Weber et al. [] (No. 2:24-cv-03750)). JUDICIAL WATCH SUES OVER REMOVAL OF WEST POINT CREST FROM BIBLES IN CHAPEL Judicial Watch is keeping a close eye on our military academies, which came under leftist pressure to retreat from traditional values during the Biden administration. Judicial Watch filed a FOIA lawsuit [] against the U.S. Department of Defense for records about the removal of the West Point crest from Bibles in the Cadet Chapel at the United States Military Academy (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Defense [] (No. 1:25-cv-01855)). The lawsuit was filed after the U.S. Military Academy at West Point, a component of the Defense Department, failed to respond to a December 13, 2024, FOIA request for: All documents that form the basis upon which the decision was made to remove the West Point Crest from the cover of the Bibles in the West Point Chapel. Upon information and belief, the West Point Crest has appeared on the cover of the Bibles in the West Point Chapel since 1984, but circa December 2024, the Crest has been removed from the Bibles. All emails sent to and from Col. Matthew Pawlikowski [former U.S. Military Academy chaplain []] regarding the crest’s appearance on the cover of the Bibles used in the West Point Chapel. We filed the FOIA request after receiving information from a reliable source – the MacArthur Society [], an association of West Point graduates – that the West Point crest had been on the Bibles since 1984 and was removed sometime in December 2024. In a related incident, in a March 12, 2024, “Message from the 61st Superintendent [ Superintendent LTG Steven Gilland announced a change to the Army’s mission statement, referencing the Army’s continued commitment to “Duty, Honor and Country” without explaining why the words themselves were deleted. It appears the Biden administration and its leftist accomplices were determined to sever all connections between West Point and traditional values. They added divisive DEI programs to the curriculum and removed ‘Duty, Honor, Country’ from the Military Academy’s mission statement. Now, we learn they removed the West Point crest from Bibles in the West Point Chapel. It’s a wonder they didn’t remove the Bibles. In May 2025, we uncovered records [] from West Point revealing that speakers at the March 2024 “Founders Day [ event were instructed to “AVOID saying ‘removed,’ ‘replaced,’ ‘deleted’ [when referring to the new mission statement] – just refer to the ‘updated mission statement and reinforce that the motto remains unchanged.” [Emphasis in original] The records also tied DEI efforts to the mission statement controversy. In November 2024, we filed a FOIA lawsuit [] against the Defense Department for information regarding the rebranding of West Point’s Diversity, Equity and Inclusion (DEI) office to “Office of Engagement and Retention.” In March 2023, records [] from the Defense Department showed the U.S. Air Force Academy had made race and gender instruction a top priority in the training of cadets. In July 2023, we exposed [] records from the U.S. Air Force Academy, a component of the Defense Department, which included instructional materials and emails that addressed topics such as Critical Race Theory, “white privilege,” and Black Lives Matter. In June 2022, we uncovered [] Critical Race Theory (CRT) instruction at the U.S. Military Academy. One training slide contained a graphic titled “MODERN-DAY SLAVERY IN THE USA.” [Emphasis in original] COURT STANDS WITH PARENT AGAINST BUCKS COUNTY WITHHOLDING COVID RECORDS Here’s a victory for the little guy. The Pennsylvania Commonwealth Court ruled [] that Bucks County, Pennsylvania, acted in bad faith in unlawfully suppressing public records concerning the county health department’s Covid-19 school guidance. The Commonwealth Court affirmed the trial court’s [] May 2023 award of sanctions against Bucks County in the amount of $3,000 to Judicial Watch client, Megan Brock. Brock is a parent who was sued by Bucks County after the trial court’s ruling in her favor in an effort to prevent the release of documents related to Covid restrictions and the re-opening of the county’s schools that she requested under the Commonwealth’s Right-to-Know Law (County of Bucks v. Megan Brock [] (Nos. 2022-03083 and 2022-02979)). In February and March 2022, Brock sent a public records request asking for all electronic correspondence between Bucks Co. executives and the Health Department regarding public school Covid-19 guidance [], which was issued in August 2021. Brock was trying to determine who authorized the reopening guidance that was changed to include more restrictive rules about masks, quarantining, and testing. “This ruling confirms that Bucks County egregiously targeted my civil rights by wrongfully withholding public records,” said Brock. “It's frightening as an everyday American to be bullied and attacked by your own government. I’m extremely thankful to Judicial Watch for their hard work in protecting my rights and the rights of all Americans. When Bucks County filed multiple lawsuits against me for exercising my constitutional rights, Judicial Watch was there when no one else had my back. I’m grateful for this legal victory and the precedent it sets for all Pennsylvanians, who have the right to government transparency. This was not a fair fight, and I could not have fought this battle alone. Judicial Watch has again ensured that no one is above the law, not even radical, local politicians!” This a nice victory for transparency and accountability over arrogant local officials who abused citizens and schoolchildren over Covid. The court’s imposing the maximum bad-faith penalties on Bucks County sends a warning to every bureaucrat and elected official in Pennsylvania that no one is above the law. PAKISTANI TRAFFICKER IN BRAZIL HELPED BRING MIDDLE EASTERNERS INTO U.S. The common image of hard-working Mexican families working our fields hides an insidious underbelly of illegal people smuggling, as our Corruption Chronicles_ blog reports []. In a significant case ignored by the establishment media, an illegal immigrant from Honduras has been sentenced to a decade in prison for running a massive years-long alien smuggling operation that “facilitated the illegal movement of Middle Easterners into the United States,” [] according to the Department of Justice (DOJ). The defendant’s “actions put our national security at risk,” the top federal prosecutor overseeing the case in the western district of Texas confirms. While mainstream media coverage focuses exclusively on hard working migrants cruelly deported in nationwide Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) raids, the agency is taking serious criminals off the streets. That part, however, is not receiving any coverage even though the Trump administration is making the information readily available on various Department of Homeland Security (DHS) websites. In this important case, Enil Edil Mejia-Zuniga, a 34-year-old illegal immigrant from Honduras, was the leader of what federal authorities call “a massive alien smuggling conspiracy that spanned three years and involved thousands of aliens from over 11 different countries.” A 33-year-old Mexican illegal immigrant and two other Honduran migrants, ages 26 and 32, worked for Mejia-Zuniga and have also been criminally charged. A final defendant is in custody in Mexico pending an extradition request from the United States. The group made millions of dollars off the migrants they helped smuggle into the U.S., authorities confirm, adding that the case represents the epitome of the ruthless and sophisticated criminal organizations that exploit our borders for personal financial gain. “For more than three years, these individuals operated a transnational smuggling ring driven by greed, moving illegal aliens from 11 countries in blatant disregard of the law,” said Special Agent in Charge Craig Larrabee of ICE Homeland Security Investigations (HSI) in San Antonio, Texas. “Human smuggling undermines the security of our borders and disrupts lawful immigration processes.” The DOJ’s announcement includes several pictures of Mejia-Zuniga posing with rifles and cash. Court documents reveal that from November 2020 through March 2023, the Mejia-Zuniga alien smuggling organization (ASO) brought in migrants from Afghanistan, Yemen, Egypt, India, Pakistan, and Colombia, through Eagle Pass, Texas. Aliens primarily contracted with a Pakistani smuggler based in Brazil to be transported to the United States. The Brazilian-based associate worked with the San Antonio-based Mejia-Zuniga to facilitate travel of the illegal immigrants from South America to the United States. Mejia-Zuniga directed operations of the ASO and paid drivers, armed “coyotes,” and stash house operators. The Honduran man admitted to smuggling between 2,500 to 3,000 aliens into the United States in just two years. His business charged between $6,500 to $12,000 per alien. Mejia-Zuniga said he made $30,000 for every ten illegal aliens who made it to the Rio Grande River and another $30,000 if those ten illegal aliens made it to San Antonio. Evidence gathered by the feds during their investigation includes wire transfers, customer ledgers, foreign identification documents and photos of the entire Mejia-Zuniga clan with firearms. This important yet unreported case was cracked under Operation Take Back America [], a national plan launched in March to repel the damages of the Biden administration’s disastrous open border policies by controlling illegal immigration, eliminating drug cartels such as Jalisco New Generation, Sinaloa, Michoacan and Los Zetas as well as other transnational criminal organizations (TCOs) like Tren de Aragua and the famously violent Mara Salvatrucha (MS-13). Thousands of illegal immigrants throughout the country have been charged with serious crimes under Operation Take Back America and the initiative has led to the apprehension of countless others arrested for illegally reentering the U.S. who already had felony convictions involving narcotics, firearms, and sexual offenses. Additionally, federal authorities have seized enormous amounts of illicit drugs, including more than 44 million fentanyl pills and nearly 70,000 pounds of methamphetamine. name: Zoe & Amanda
subject: "We're not going back." Zoe & Amanda have a message 🔥
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Devin for Progress
body:
Handmaids, drums, and special guest Alexis Mercedes Rinck. Join us for a celebration of women!

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/23704129c213/seattles-biggest-teslamusk-protest-yet-45013?e=10cc7d1928)

| Hey friend,
**This Saturday we’re showing up in solidarity to protest Project 2025** and the growing war on women’s rights across the country. **We would love for you to be at U Village to stand with us.**
---
| [SIGN ME UP!](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=2c505b9a0e&e=10cc7d1928)
---
|
**This isn’t just protest, it’s a reclamation of our power,** our voices and our bodies. We cannot allow our rights to be taken away under the covers. Together, we will bring the truth to light.
**Defund Musk’s Women’s Group is a young, all inclusive movement** that will continue to grow and organize locally in the near future. Stay tuned for more news on our actions and consider joining us!
**Bring your heart, your outrage, your presence.****We are not going back.**
[ See you tomorrow,](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=28258c52ce&e=10cc7d1928)—Amanda & Zoe (Amanda pictured on left and Zoe on the right)

PS. If you can't make it to U Village, join other great events at [Lynnwood](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=52d9d22bb6&e=10cc7d1928) and [Renton](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=2c4b47e48e&e=10cc7d1928)!

We've been through so much together and have always been bonded together by our shared resolve to never back down. But now, with your House GOP Membership expired, only uncertainty remains...[RENEW MY MEMBERSHIP

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: This hat means more than you think…
body:
I want to send you a FREE limited-edition “47” hat...

What it represents is more powerful than you realize
| | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zed4p7ootlfpdk5hjfmrj4taoucgq00jr9nl33c8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6clh62o35c5h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
I'll cut straight to the point... I want to send you a FREE limited-edition "47" hat...The same hat college students have literally begged for during our campus tour stops.
---
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zf0uirqpbkqi166neuvll4ivjmhom4jctrdnrbc8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6clh62o35c5h2bs)
---
But this isn't just any hat... It's a symbol.A symbol of what's happening right now across college campuses in America. _Students are waking up... Chanting "USA!"... Waving flags... and standing up for faith, family, and freedom._Everywhere Turning Point USA goes, we're seeing record crowds -- thousands of students -- fired up to defend this country and reject the Left's lies.And guess what?**They 're PROUD to be American.** This isn't just a moment... It's not a mere "shift"... This is a generational REVOLUTION!**And Friend, I want YOU to be part of it.**_All I ask?_**Make a gift of ANY amount to help Turning Point USA reach even more young people ...**...and I'll send you a limited-edition "47" hat as my thank-you.
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA &**
**Claim Your "47" Hat**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zq7c34n8vrijhusvj08t9mlp9vm1ug1l70dd5id0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6clh62o35c5h2bs)
---
Friend, this isn't a gimmick... It's not another piece of "merch"... This hat means something.To every student who wears one -- it's a statement: _" I'm not afraid to stand up for this country."_ To every patriot like you who fuels this mission -- it's a reminder:_ "I helped wake up a generation. name: Dan, House Republicans
subject: Will my heart have to go on without your membership?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Friend, your membership expired and I’m heartbroken.

Friend, when I glanced at the membership roster and saw your account expired - it was like my heart was a glass vase shattered on the floor.
We've been through so much together and have always been bonded together by our shared resolve to never back down. But now, with your House GOP Membership expired, only uncertainty remains...[RENEW MY MEMBERSHIP
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkchma6g1br25hrm4tr2vba22okpt56de2408eu8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6clh62o32c3h2bs)I refuse to give up on you. As one of our top patriots, your membership has been the cornerstone of our Majority - what are we to do without you by our side? That's why we're giving you one more chance to renew.[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zujg1lho7kao1lkceejdgafouaalk2fe05lt68s0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6clh62o32c3h2bs)[RENEW MY MEMBERSHIP

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Socialism in America
body:
You have been selected to represent citizens in your state in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on Socialism.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9mdg8g5n22j8fmg9346k55pajt0ce34oj6l5i4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb6clh62o32c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend of Liberty,

**You have been selected to represent citizens in your state in Hillsdale College's National Survey on Socialism. You can complete your survey at the link below: **

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4tgsksegfd30jmbf1ulmhaagvk20v367nmmsp7g_rp22sh2s8i6epb6clh62o32c3h2bs)

With your response, you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of opinion that can help us more clearly understand real Americans' views--views that will interest policymakers and opinion leaders.

A recent poll showed that over half of Generation Z is likely to vote for candidates with socialist positions. We have seen some of this in recent elections.

Recently, voters in America's largest city nominated a self-avowed socialist to be mayor. Some of his proposals include...
* Banning ICE agents from city limits

* Establishing city-owned grocery stores

* Instituting a $30-an-hour minimum wage

* Replacing the police with social workers

**In short, this candidate will bring _real, unapologetic socialism_ to America.**

**Why did this happen? **

For one thing, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried.

For another, too many are no longer being taught about America's great heritage of liberty and the importance of the Constitution to freedom.

This is because of the "progressive" Left's increasing success in hijacking American education at both the K-12 and college levels. **So, it 's no surprise that those who support socialist candidates tend to be college-educated!**

In the face of these efforts to indoctrinate the young and undermine informed patriotism, **Hillsdale 's educational outreach is needed now more than ever.**

By responding to **Hillsdale College 's National Survey on Socialism**, your honest opinions will help us understand the rise of socialism and form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country--Americans like you, who still revere our founding principles of liberty, as set forth in the Declaration of Independence, and which form the foundation of our Constitution.

If you agree, please represent your state and take **Hillsdale College 's National Survey on Socialism** today.

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zv5h50j09c7u2pi9sdrk0ep8pc20gm1s2qfqeto0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6clh62o32c3h2bs)

In the face of socialism's recent success, we must remember: **it is never too late to preserve and defend liberty through education.**

You can easily make your gift after completing the **National Survey on Socialism**, which you can access at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsket7336sf29id4leisgl84naqrn6fhsftiigdg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6clh62o32c3h2bs)

Warm regards,
Labin Duke, Th.M.
Associate Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Alliance Defending Freedom
subject: BREAKING: Huge SCOTUS win on gender ideology
body:
Every child deserves to be kept safe from dangerous procedures.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4cd5hlmrl2uorn047r6lpspj3i6c952mjta8io0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6clh62p72c1h2bs)

## **[BREAKING: Court Gives Green Light to EVERY State to Protect Children](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn5a3bvnpigh57938jjkip5mguvhns9ts08fjio8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6clh62p72c1h2bs)**
Dear Fellow American,

Praise God! The U.S. Supreme Court has ruled, 6-3, in _United States v. Skrmetti_ that states can protect kids from harmful drugs and surgeries. Every child deserves to be kept safe from dangerous procedures.

This is a landmark victory for every child in our country, as the ruling will allow EVERY state to implement similar laws to protect children from the harms of gender ideology.

This win moves us that much closer to finally ending the practice of experimenting on children.
[ DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdtg67hdj98q66gvh2a8hjsqradphrfmo5ugh4ag_rp22sh2s8i6epb6clh62p72c1h2bs)
**Gender ideology is on the ropes.** Now we have to keep the momentum going and finish the job. Several cases and many clients are still waiting for justice from the lies of gender ideology, including:
* **Selina Soule** --she and several other female athletes have been standing up for fairness on and off the field for years. We've beaten back efforts to rewrite Title IX at the federal level, but many states, like Connecticut, continue to push policies that force girls to compete against male athletes.
* **Dan and Jennifer Mead** --their daughter's school secretly treated her as a boy, as part of the school's "social transition" policy. Many school districts around the country still have these policies in place.
* **Brian and Katy Wuoti** --this loving foster couple had their license revoked because they wouldn't agree to push Vermont's radical gender ideology agenda. They are challenging this illegal policy, along with another family.

[With your gift today,](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp3siuvdecgru3jjvmu261mglb2t3fav97ngb1fg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6clh62p72c1h2bs) we can represent more clients in court (free of charge) and advocate for more good laws that protect children. **Plus, you can help maximize the impact of a special $250,000 challenge grant!**

Thank you for your support. Countless children are now protected from much of gender ideology's irreversible harms.

In Christ,

John Bursch
Senior Counsel, Vice President of Appellate Advocacy
Alliance Defending Freedom

P.S. Praise God! The Supreme Court has acted decisively to protect children from harmful drugs and procedures, ruling 6-3, in _United States v. Skrmetti._ Your gift today helps ADF clients who are still waiting for justice. [Plus, you can help maximize the impact of a $250,000 challenge grant!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zisk1to0dv094ffaolmpfeu3jgb4sj58k2b8450g_rp22sh2s8i6epb6clh62p72c1h2bs)

Skrmetti that states can protect kids from harmful drugs and surgeries. Every child deserves to be kept safe from dangerous procedures. This is a landmark victory for every child in our country, as the ruling will allow EVERY state to implement similar laws to protect children from the harms of gender ideology. This win moves us that much closer to finally ending the practice of experimenting on children. Gender ideology is on the ropes. Now we have to keep the momentum going and finish the job. Several cases and many clients are still waiting for justice from the lies of gender ideology, including: Selina Soule --she and several other female athletes have been standing up for fairness on and off the field for years. We've beaten back efforts to rewrite Title IX at the federal level, but many states, like Connecticut, continue to push policies that force girls to compete against male athletes. Dan and Jennifer Mead --their daughter's school secretly treated her as a boy, as part of the school's "social transition" policy. Many school districts around the country still have these policies in place. Brian and Katy Wuoti --this loving foster couple had their license revoked because they wouldn't agree to push Vermont's radical gender ideology agenda. They are challenging this illegal policy, along with another family. we can represent more clients in court (free of charge) and advocate for more good laws that protect children. Plus, you can help maximize the impact of a special $250,000 challenge grant!** Thank you for your support. Countless children are now protected from much of gender ideology's irreversible harms. In Christ, John Bursch Senior Counsel, Vice President of Appellate Advocacy Alliance Defending Freedom P.S. Praise God! The Supreme Court has acted decisively to protect children from harmful drugs and procedures, ruling 6-3, in United States v. Skrmetti. name: Dan, House Republicans
subject: Will my heart have to go on without your membership?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Friend, your membership expired and I’m heartbroken.

Friend, when I glanced at the membership roster and saw your account expired - it was like my heart was a glass vase shattered on the floor.
We've been through so much together and have always been bonded together by our shared resolve to never back down. But now, with your House GOP Membership expired, only uncertainty remains...[RENEW MY MEMBERSHIP

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: The Left wants me to be their sacrificial lamb
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
The President walked free. But now, the Left is calling for my head.

The President walked free. But now, the Left is calling for my head.
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zoeh1u2rcf4d9tv1f9gpq5vosa1nis7aqfft7nfg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6clh6ao72cdh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
I was retained as President Trump’s lawyer shortly after he was wrongly accused of being a Russian agent.
---
Thank God the truth came out, and the President walked free.
---
But now we know the _full story_. Newly DECLASSIFIED evidence alleges that my former client was FRAMED...
---
Director of National Intelligence Report: “Declassified Evidence of Obama Administration Conspiracy to Subvert President Trump’s 2016 Victory and Presidency”
---
Imagine if they got away with it. Imagine if President Trump were sitting in prison as an innocent man – and not because of a mistake, but because of a _set-up_ ...
---
As a lifelong prosecutor, that makes me sick to my stomach.
---
I spent my career obsessing over one thing: ensuring those I prosecuted were _truly_ guilty. I NEVER wanted to look back and think I took away liberty from an innocent man – and God forbid, his _life_.
---
**But unfortunately, that may soon be __my own fate__.**
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial as an innocent man for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
And the judge presiding over my case was appointed by _Obama’s_ former Homeland Security Secretary! _It’s rigged from start to finish!_
---
_Democrats couldn’t take down President Trump. So now, they’re calling for the head of the man who helped him walk free._
---
**The Left wants me to be their sacrificial lamb.**
---
_But I’m not going to roll over and surrender. I’m going to recall those powerful words of our President and _fight, fight, fight!__
---
While the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
**That’s why I’m humbly asking YOU to fight for my freedom and justice.**
---
My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — [**“THE PEOPLE’S PARDON”**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zo403ggso3nh23b78bqsv4t8scuc4eov3b2r7rrg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6clh6ao72cdh2bs)— calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.
---
_Thanks to so many kind souls, we’re closing in on our signature goal! I hope you’ll sign to push us over the top._
---
[**Please help me reach this life-saving (_truly_!) goal today by immediately adding your name to “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON” as citizens unite to call for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES against me.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z39gujf9sqrlj1p3re20h9e0v1l4o2jqmnmajclo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6clh6ao72cdh2bs)
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zprts2vtr9v9iep8gks32em1afu9r9fedud9181o_rp22sh2s8i6epb6clh6ao72cdh2bs)
__
---

[ADD YOUR NAME](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zois06c79rlitb3bc214l7putnqsqhfm8ltmac6g_rp22sh2s8i6epb6clh6ao72cdh2bs)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zih00cds5sqv1981gurq0lk35m2hopm21lup7mt8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6clh6ao72cdh2bs)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund
---

name: James =?UTF-8?Q?O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: Join Me to Save OMG from a Lawsuit Threatening Press Freedom
body:
On May 14, 2025, Jamie Mannina, a former Pentagon contractor, sued me and OMG in Washington, D.C. federal courts after we caught him on tape saying, “Trump’s a sociopathic narcissist...I’m in conversation with a couple of retired generals to try to explore what we can do” about Trump.

| [****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcu1gia6o2uegjektlfhtpgdjqb8fqdbjkb1i998_rp22sh2s8i6epb6clh6eor2cth2bs)
[****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zddvjp0qnneoogpd155fkm6am8aqcd85nbh5d840_rp22sh2s8i6epb6clh6eor2cth2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, founder of O'Keefe Media Group (OMG), where we risk everything to expose corruption through undercover journalism.

Right now, we're facing a newly filed, **federal lawsuit that could destroy our mission and silence journalists everywhere** --[**and I need your help**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlo32pum93k9j81ve7v6l1tl2easm2r0bl7vau48_rp22sh2s8i6epb6clh6eor2cth2bs).

On May 14, 2025, Jamie Mannina, a former Pentagon contractor, sued me and OMG in Washington, D.C. federal courts after we caught him on tape saying, "**_Trump 's a sociopathic narcissist_** _..._ I'm in conversation with a couple of retired generals to try to explore what we can do" about Trump.

His baseless claims--defamation, fraud, wiretapping--**are meant to bankrupt us**.

As I told the Associated Press, "This is an attack against the First Amendment... the process is the punishment."

If Mannina's defamation claim wins, **it 's over for OMG**.

Our "American Swiper" program, which drives our exposes, could spark countless lawsuits from others we've exposed, ending our work.

**We have just 21 days from being served to hire top D.C. attorneys and respond, or we risk losing by default**.

Liberty Guard is hosting our legal defense fund, and [**I 'm asking you to join our fight with a donation today.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zen9psls5ss5mlf1vkr26btshd3lk7jf1j21tgso_rp22sh2s8i6epb6clh6eor2cth2bs)

Please donate today to stand with OMG and save press freedom.

More than ever, I need patriots like you to help respond by this 21-day deadline and keep the OMG alive and allow us to **keep fighting corruption with the truth**.

[**Your support will defend not just OMG but the right to fearless journalism.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh3oo4hfoj6t20m94r7d2kcqbv6k6p1s20q0amfo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6clh6eor2cth2bs)

Join The Fight Today,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. We have 21 days to act, or the powerful win. [**Donate now to protect the First Amendment.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zuf2ciqcm53o2ifc8movblb4mt2rg086u3n2lc60_rp22sh2s8i6epb6clh6eor2cth2bs)

---
