name: Erica Henry
subject: [FWD] “unwed.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112166055/559627004/2022509128?refcode=EM_F_250724BumpB_N_EH_NO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmMjM4M2EyLTI0NmEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DMAdg6ss2sGZhx84tdKhef6RKt315tv0wtVw8T4wbnk=)
---
Peter – we wanted to make sure you saw this...

The _Nashville Banner_ recently reported the disturbing story that a 35-year-old woman in Tennessee was denied prenatal care by her physician because she was “unwed.” The worst part? As of 2025, discrimination like this is actually LEGAL in the state of Tennessee.

It’s worth noting that the states with the least amount of women in state government almost all have abortion bans and other laws that limit women’s access to healthcare. Tennessee is one of those states. While 3.5 million women live in Tennessee, women make up only 17% of the state’s government. That means these sexist laws that limit women’s bodily autonomy, healthcare, and safety are actually being written by rooms full of men – 83% men in the case of Tennessee.

**At Her Bold Move, we’re working to chip away at the male supermajorities in state governments across America by electing more _women_ to the halls of power. **

[**We believe women lawmakers will be our best defense against dangerous and sexist policies. Rush $25 to support our work and help us elect more women ASAP.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112166056/559627006/2022509128?refcode=EM_F_250724BumpB_N_EH_NO_5_NG_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmMjM4M2EyLTI0NmEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DMAdg6ss2sGZhx84tdKhef6RKt315tv0wtVw8T4wbnk=)

For better laws,

Erica Henry
Senior Political Advisor
Her Bold Move

\----------- Forwarded message ---------
---
Peter, discrimination is now legal in at least one American state.

A 35-year-old woman in Tennessee was **denied prenatal care** by her physician because she was “unwed.” According to the _Nashville Banner_ , a physician turned her away because they “didn't feel comfortable treating her” and cited “differing values.”

Although this type of discrimination is illegal across most of America, Tennessee recently passed the Medical Ethics Defense Act. This law grants medical professionals the right to deny healthcare to patients based on their religious, moral, or ethical beliefs. There are no protections for people in rural areas with limited options for healthcare, there are no requirements to refer patients elsewhere, and there’s no legal recourse.

**83% of the lawmakers in Tennessee are _male_.**

We are horrified by this story. We will not sit back as male politicians pass laws that limit women’s bodily autonomy, healthcare, and safety.

[**We cannot accept this reality for our fellow women. We’re working to elect PRO-WOMEN women – especially in red states like Tennessee. Help support our candidates by donating $25 today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112166057/559627007/2022509128?refcode=EM_F_250724BumpB_N_EH_NO_5_NG_N_L2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmMjM4M2EyLTI0NmEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DMAdg6ss2sGZhx84tdKhef6RKt315tv0wtVw8T4wbnk=)

This is the first reported case of a woman being denied prenatal care for being unmarried in the state of Tennessee – but it will likely continue to happen more frequently.

The states with the _least amount of women_ in state government almost all have abortion bans and other laws that limit women’s access to healthcare. Tennessee is one of those states. While 3.5 million women live in Tennessee, _women make up only 17% of the state’s government._

The legislator who sponsored this bill, Representative Bryan Terry, said he believed the law would help Tennessee recruit and retain physicians (???!!). In reality, the state has actually seen a _decline_ in OB-GYNs across the state since Tennessee’s total abortion ban went into effect. Tennessee has the highest maternal mortality rate in the country and ranks among the worst for infant mortality.

[**At Her Bold Move, we believe this is a _solvable_ problem. We’re working to chip away at the male supermajorities in state governments across America by electing more women to the halls of power. We believe women lawmakers will be our best defense against dangerous and sexist policies. Rush $25 to support our work and help us elect more women ASAP. **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112166059/559627008/2022509128?refcode=EM_F_250724BumpB_N_EH_NO_5_NG_N_L3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmMjM4M2EyLTI0NmEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DMAdg6ss2sGZhx84tdKhef6RKt315tv0wtVw8T4wbnk=)

For ALL women,

Ileana Paules Bronet
Her Bold Move
---

Because men shouldn't be making laws about women's bodies.

**Support this important work with a contribution today!** [DONATE!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112166060/559627010/2022509128?refcode=EM_F_250724BumpB_N_EH_NO_5_NG_N_biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmMjM4M2EyLTI0NmEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DMAdg6ss2sGZhx84tdKhef6RKt315tv0wtVw8T4wbnk=)

Hey folks,
My friend Richard Chew from WCPT joined me yesterday and we got into it on all the big news of the day: the Epstein case, media corruption, my debut on Fox News, and how both parties are failing to deliver any real accountability to the wealthy and powerful. We also answered some of your questions and talked honestly about faith, power, and what this moment demands from all of us.
**📌 Highlights from the conversation:**
* **00:01:46** - Trump won't rule out a pardon for Ghislaine Maxwell. Richard and I unpack what that really means--and why it's terrifying.
* **00:06:34** - What happens if the Epstein list does get released? We get into the likely playbook and why the goalposts keep moving.
* **00:17:00** - A listener asks: Why is pedophilia suddenly dominating American political discourse? We trace the roots--from the Catholic Church scandals to QAnon conspiracies.
* **00:24:00** - I made my Fox News debut. It was exactly as contentious as you'd think. Here's what happened.
* **00:34:27** - We talked generational change in the Democratic Party--why it's overdue, and why it's about more than just age.

**If you value work like this --conversations that are honest, urgent, and rooted in real accountability--become a paid subscriber today. It's the best way to keep this community growing and keep these conversations going:**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..v84dCj64CA6FLmPRvpRczeramfkFHA-ddDszyCMhLC8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=169261787)
With urgency,
--Mike

name: Josh Weil
subject: Florida Man strikes again (but not the one you’re thinking of)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.41.25%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Hey Friend, I’m sure you’ve seen the headlines:
“Florida Man wrestles alligator in a gas station parking lot.”
“Florida Man arrested for building a homemade rocket to the moon.”
But there’s one Florida Man who keeps making the news, and it’s not funny anymore:
📣 Florida Man in a suit, slashing education budgets, ignoring veterans, and driving up housing costs, all while cashing lobbyist checks.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/3979334F51797274356834534A6C6D4D5764374E772B49386973344F7154754C5A4450307568456C7970545A3431356659626E746579416B534A457259646F4A/editor_images/Ron%20Desantis%20Florida%20GIF%20by%20GIPHY%20News.gif]
This Florida Man is in our government. And unlike the meme, his damage is real. He and my opponent Ashley Moody have been stamping and passing every possible measure to obliterate affordability and quality of life for Americans.
I’m running for U.S. Senate to change that, not for attention, but for action:
✅ Real solutions to the affordability crisis
✅ A renewed promise to veterans and public servants
✅ Leadership that listens, not headlines that distract
Let’s put the “Florida Man” narrative behind us, and build something we can be proud of.
[Chip in $15; let’s retire the punchline and bring some sanity to the Senate] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?refcode=NTLJUL23]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: There are massive cracks in the Trump coalition right now
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I’m going to keep going to the floor of the Senate to pass this resolution releasing all of the Epstein files.
#

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july25.UmJNyp&refcode=em250726-1-160pic&refcode2=3925.734936.uqddAh&t=1&akid=3925%2E734936%2EuqddAh)
---
Peter, it’s Ruben.
I’m going to keep going to the floor of the Senate and fight to release all of the Epstein files.
I’m going to do it because of guys like Markwayne Mullin, Oklahoma’s Senator, who explicitly says he’s blocking it to give cover to Trump.
I’m going to do it because we’ve already seen the pictures of Trump with Epstein, the videos, the creepy birthday letter he wrote to him.
I’m going to do it because he lied to his supporters about it, promised them retribution, promised to release the files, and then did a complete flip flop on it and is working every angle to prevent it.
Because the Wall Street Journal just reported that Pam Bondi explicitly told Trump he was in those files.
Because Trump built an entire career off of telling the “hard truths” and taking the fight to the “establishment” and the “elites,” when all along he was the biggest liar of them all, the epitome of the elites he claims to fight.
Because if this reaches a critical mass we can break through beyond just the Epstein files. If we can show Trump’s people beyond a doubt that he’s a fraud, a liar, an abuser, an enabler, whatever — it opens the door to getting them to see through those lies.
It’s how we can make them realize that his whole con was to protect himself, protect his elite friends, and take as much money and power as he possibly could. How we get them to realize that it’s Trump who is attacking unions, attacking farms, attacking Medicaid, Medicare, Social Security.
Most of all, it’s how we show them that we are better than him. That we’ll tell them the truth, fight for them, work for them.
The Trump saga went way too far. But after years of Teflon Don, he’s hurt. He’s worried. He’s on the ropes. His own people are turning on him.
It could be the beginning of the end, and I’m not about to let that slip by.
Stay engaged. I’m on this every day.
Thank you,
Ruben.

**🚨 Please — just one more minute 🚨**
This is not a fundraising email, and we don’t expect you to donate. But if you appreciate what Ruben’s doing, we are not going to stop you from making a donation.
This work doesn’t come cheap, and we truly appreciate anything you send Ruben’s way.
[**So, if you can, make a grassroots donation and help power Ruben’s fight by using this link.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july25.UmJNyp&refcode=em250726-1-160pic&t=2&akid=3925%2E734936%2EuqddAh)
[DONATE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july25.UmJNyp&refcode=em250726-1-160pic&t=3&akid=3925%2E734936%2EuqddAh)

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. subject: Downplaying the loss of VA jobs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
Winsome Earle-Sears was caught complaining about Trump’s attacks on jobs. Not because she feels for the thousands of Virginia families affected or is worried about the devastating impact on the Commonwealth’s economy, but because it’s hurting her campaign for Governor.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112170269/559634591/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTdjM2Q4ZC0yODZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xoig_nF1lrITxlJLye2cbGfMoYcEK0_3r-6kgu4iKTc=&emci=31b3240f-9069-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=ca7c3d8d-286a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=15759664)
---
Winsome Earle-Sears was caught complaining about Trump’s attacks on jobs. Not because she feels for the thousands of Virginia families affected or is worried about the devastating impact on the Commonwealth’s economy, but because it’s hurting her campaign for Governor. Recently, a fired federal worker called Sears out, saying: _“After 20 years in the federal government and service in the U.S. Coast Guard, I was laid off when the Trump administration and DOGE targeted federal workers, many of whom are Virginians. These weren’t just job cuts; they were gut punches to families like mine. When Lt. Gov. Winsome Earle-Sears downplayed these attacks, saying she would help Trump ‘get the job done’ and that laid-off workers would be ‘all right,’ it was both shocking and deeply insulting.”_ [**This is why we can’t let Earle-Sears win. Will you make a split donation between the Virginia Democratic Party and Abigail Spanberger’s race so we can not only elect a Democrat to lead our Commonwealth, but give her the trifecta she needs to pass real lasting change?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112170270/559634593/-883788062?refcode=E14330-20250726-JobLosses-SL-DPVA-Economy&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTdjM2Q4ZC0yODZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xoig_nF1lrITxlJLye2cbGfMoYcEK0_3r-6kgu4iKTc=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112170271/559634595/-1793336781?express_lane=true&refcode=E14330-20250726-JobLosses-EG-DPVA-Economy&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTdjM2Q4ZC0yODZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xoig_nF1lrITxlJLye2cbGfMoYcEK0_3r-6kgu4iKTc=)

Sears has previously been caught downplaying the attacks, saying they’re “the media is making it out to be a huge, huge thing... and I don’t understand why.”
If she doesn’t even pretend to care about Virginia’s families when hoping for their votes, what will she do as governor? We can’t let Sears or any part of the MAGA right take a foothold in Virginia, and that’s why we need your help to ramp up Operation Virginia Victory between now and November.

The truth about Pam Bondi's Epstein failures is painful, but as an investigative reporter who has previously been summoned to the Oval Office by President Trump to share findings on disloyal insiders, I believe you deserve to know the full story so you can share it and hold leaders accountable.

This isn't just incompetence; it's a calculated stall that protects the powerful and betrays the victims.

**If the truth matters to you,[**chip in here**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/b7mO65763M4cpVbUxbWfqwXQ/CaINGBFqoJ0f4vz3uouV5A) to support my deep dives.**

Bondi hyped the files relentlessly, claiming day-one releases of a client list and massive video evidence that would dismantle the pedophile elite.

Instead, we got a holiday-weekend memo dump that denies it all - no list, no murder, just closure without justice.

This echoes her Florida tenure, where Epstein's crimes went unpunished, allowing the horror to continue.

Insiders are in an uproar, with reports of division that could lead to high-profile exits like Dan Bongino, who contemplated resigning from the FBI amid his clash with Bondi.

**Help me expose this fully - [**donate now**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/b7mO65763M4cpVbUxbWfqwXQ/CaINGBFqoJ0f4vz3uouV5A) to support more of my exclusive reports that are dominating the news cycle. **

The Deep State thrives on such distractions, black-pilling voters and paving the way for radical threats, including mass migration, human trafficking, and Qatar's efforts to buy off our lawmakers.

Your support gives you insider knowledge to discuss these issues with others, while keeping me independent.

**Join the effort - [**chip in today**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/b7mO65763M4cpVbUxbWfqwXQ/CaINGBFqoJ0f4vz3uouV5A) and let's demand better.**

I've influenced real change before; together, we can do it again.

Stay vigilant,
Laura Loomer

name: Forward Party
subject: Fund America’s Comeback - And Join Us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We’re turning 3 and we want you there!

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_fundraising_email_2_a&n=1)
---
| Peter \-- We’re going to keep this one brief - it’s the start of another beautiful summer weekend and we don’t want to take too much of your time. Earlier this week, we made you a promise: While we have to ask for money because we’re a political party, we promise to only ask for donations for one week out of every month, taking the rest of our time to focus on what really matters - solving problems for each of you. Today, we’re asking again. **Will you contribute to help build the Forward Party into a true home for the politically homeless?** | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/forward_turns_3?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_fundraising_email_2_a&n=2 "Celebrate Our Birthday Together!") [Chip In $33 For 3 Years Today!](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate_3year?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_fundraising_email_2_a&n=3)
---
We also invited all of you to our big birthday party next [Tuesday the 29th at 7 pm](https://home.forwardparty.com/forward_turns_3?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_fundraising_email_2_a&n=4) and we want you to come. Together, we’ve had the most remarkable three years of growth. We started as an idea - that all Americans, not just the ones on the furthest extremes of the two parties, matter (crazy concept, we know). That seed has grown into the third largest party in the country in just three years - imagine where we can go with the right funding and your continued support. The sky really is the limit. So join us for our birthday celebration:
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/forward_turns_3?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_fundraising_email_2_a&n=5)
A donation today helps us grow this party step by step.
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/forward_turns_3?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_fundraising_email_2_a&n=6 "Celebrate Our Birthday Together!") [Chip In $33 For 3 Years Today!](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate_3year?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_fundraising_email_2_a&n=7)
---
Here’s to another three years of building and another step closer to fixing our broken politics together.
**Not Left. Not Right. Forward.**

clean_body: We’re turning 3 and we want you there! | | | Peter \-- We’re going to keep this one brief - it’s the start of another beautiful summer weekend and we don’t want to take too much of your time. Earlier this week, we made you a promise: While we have to ask for money because we’re a political party, we promise to only ask for donations for one week out of every month, taking the rest of our time to focus on what really matters - solving problems for each of you. Today, we’re asking again. Will you contribute to help build the Forward Party into a true home for the politically homeless? | "Celebrate Our Birthday Together!" We also invited all of you to our big birthday party next and we want you to come. Together, we’ve had the most remarkable three years of growth. We started as an idea - that all Americans, not just the ones on the furthest extremes of the two parties, matter (crazy concept, we know). That seed has grown into the third largest party in the country in just three years - imagine where we can go with the right funding and your continued support. The sky really is the limit. So join us for our birthday celebration: A donation today helps us grow this party step by step. "Celebrate Our Birthday Together!" Here’s to another three years of building and another step closer to fixing our broken politics together. Not Left. Not Right. Forward. Forward Party Copyright © 2025 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is: 1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ForwardParty.com

clean_body: I just finished reviewing your answers to the 2025 Voter Verification Audit, and I have to say—I’m very impressed. Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Peter, I just finished reviewing your answers to the 2025 Voter Verification Audit, and I have to say-- You've got a clear understanding of what's at stake in 2026, and that's exactly why I'm reaching out today. Under President Trump, illegal immigration encounters have hit a record low, but that hasn't stopped the radical Left from launching their attacks. That's why I am coming to you, Peter. Thank you, Senator Marsha Blackburn | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Eli
subject: I am asking, with all humility
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Crane for Congress
body:
I get it - you’re tired of politicians...
I understand, Patriot.
I know you're tired of politicians emailing you asking for money, and I don't blame you. With inflation still being reeled in, every dollar counts.
But let me tell you, **this is different.**
My name is Eli Crane, and I'm a pro-Trump Navy SEAL Conservative warrior from Arizona. I've been on the front lines, fighting for our country in 5 war-time deployments.
I'm not afraid to take a stand: _I've always proudly championed Trump's America First agenda, I'm for a secure border, I'm for election integrity, and I'm for protecting our kids from woke indoctrination._
Democrats hate me, and the Establishment Republicans aren't too fond of me either. That's why they're throwing everything they've got at me - **a whopping $50 MILLION war chest** to take me down in 2026.
But I'm not backing down. I'm a Navy SEAL, and we don't give up. **_[That's why I'm asking you, with all humility, to chip in a few bucks before my critical fundraising deadline.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=070a6f399e1c4809a1e9e35b8a73ce82&_e=v6ZdCMmeh9TRJZLQ49tL_za-Xotp750HW32pBVCztxOApRh0BUUXrTYWUBJRwKY6DC456uczG_qbyxM4e3HHHPChHayk3Ai3xK3pWST7htNYMtHlNzAcysOpsDWXf_zYUw2yrwuPtVSKBr1qLY2o5P7FD0imlfgQ3qRMUYF_KfWfQvbMaLdNlG7lkagRmVx5BsotbM3pMpLn8jZNJ4VLmWglxwHpVrA_n8i7vRtLXZRzCUgBZncOTxU0roTV_5bNSicUFWCyGAnd88SNOlNuloeXuiwnWGpXaPuLorgKOJVaf-kVMNwMyd3XKuFCriVyB_E0wd_EXjVuRSDs3tTOKclFd1fpPvb55W6JNClWMPW4EMIButw_af4Kytz3n6Lz96r7X_y6xaCWWjOhT0z0u9UzE7zlRjgfw2oPC3UM24p2D4SparjKvnNt0Ekf1-Ybz50Tj-GxLe8BbKCNV_iVOtP4BqoP8tDAFbi8TwsgN1GsdYz5babMgmoDpkWdlWOBKy0zGT9S8XX_6cr7M35Cy_mf1mvBRifVNqIr_TdRq4WY7q2bK_WjFnOs6DLvC3AOeROrgAYcRiTt7G9hX8QYPhyyKYTJvYvsn_AnXcaIVUcKChuJDh6m42l_7WQzWjKLjZ94dCeycJd_jQgHIbVBlxzAqfjXp9b39r-Fqr6XzN34hUb9jYoAK-IoVfZZrd-ljO9LWdkvPo1484_tHykEIHDEVezUvAyRLsNOv1sAaY0DoN973YSDFFkvBUdy-hhykjVtQ2ts1xEHn9Z7bORmYg%3D%3D)_**
I know times are still tough, and if you can't afford to give, I understand. But I'm counting on patriots like you to help me take on the Establishment and the radical Left. My candidacy is in your hands.
**__**[DONATE NOW >>](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=070a6f399e1c4809a1e9e35b8a73ce82&_e=v6ZdCMmeh9TRJZLQ49tL_za-Xotp750HW32pBVCztxOApRh0BUUXrTYWUBJRwKY6DC456uczG_qbyxM4e3HHHPChHayk3Ai3xK3pWST7htNYMtHlNzAcysOpsDWXf_zYUw2yrwuPtVSKBr1qLY2o5P7FD0imlfgQ3qRMUYF_KfWfQvbMaLdNlG7lkagRmVx5BsotbM3pMpLn8jZNJ4VLmWglxwHpVrA_n8i7vRtLXZRzCUgBZncOTxU0roTV_5bNSicUFWCyGAnd88SNOlNuloeXuiwnWGpXaPuLorgKOJU0WA84fSWmJ5aq4nZsizUf9lkA6dSEGScJIZvsLcKSwJD9-tePH1MlnNs0OGcIi-tAkQpwZO7BfNhULrKLgNmJrEFcS3nz7ZJJtsy4gTXTuw_Aa562Z2pRHfNlnBYk9-MRTGqyzYtulYPZrJnb1oqUs-i0GJ-9yqyYgxjxnU4xYSciTHeinQuIqvGww2KK3mgnvx4gfn22bi5ltFWIMTDOBrEEgjcuY3mbUKtk3woLEk1xjUJ_WJFw9bM6_vWqo8bur9eKk0fUA_4dYnZhw4iPXaB9bdB9a9fF5iZO380uoHFy54NC5nAioZJs_D6uhJa1SPnRrqhTvUv66tntdkCydxFrGHn2fAsnfP059Rhnoxxa5NsUexJEt3cds-zYl3SRjZinPfkFLVy0lPk9gV4pZUx2EyiqnrU1x_VyVd33oezzDZv4OYBbP9FKqzkT0W7uJMxBtG1LCBSA8oYopFxdyNOPk7_kl9AfEbM-c8aupg%3D%3D)

clean_body: I get it - you’re tired of politicians... I understand, Patriot. I know you're tired of politicians emailing you asking for money, and I don't blame you. With inflation still being reeled in, every dollar counts. But let me tell you, this is different. My name is Eli Crane, and I'm a pro-Trump Navy SEAL Conservative warrior from Arizona. I've been on the front lines, fighting for our country in 5 war-time deployments. I'm not afraid to take a stand: I've always proudly championed Trump's America First agenda, I'm for a secure border, I'm for election integrity, and I'm for protecting our kids from woke indoctrination. Democrats hate me, and the Establishment Republicans aren't too fond of me either. That's why they're throwing everything they've got at me - a whopping $50 MILLION war chest to take me down in 2026. But I'm not backing down. I'm a Navy SEAL, and we don't give up. I know times are still tough, and if you can't afford to give, I understand. But I'm counting on patriots like you to help me take on the Establishment and the radical Left. My candidacy is in your hands. God bless you.\- Eli Crane | | To ensure that you don't miss out on important messages, please add info@email.craneforaz.com to your address book. Not Sure How? name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Three ways Heartland Patriots plans to make an impact in 2026 and beyond
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Investing. Organizing. Centering real working people.
#
Peter — you might be wondering how a grassroots movement called Heartland Patriots plans to make an impact. Today, I’m going to share three ways:
1. **Investing into candidates and campaigns.** This is the most direct way we can affect the biggest elections in 2026 and beyond. We’ll put our resources where they matter most — behind good candidates in competitive races.

2. **Organizing early and organizing everywhere.** We’re not waiting until the weeks before the election to show up. Our movement is building the infrastructure we need to reach voters about pro-freedom, pro-worker candidates and causes _right now._

3. **Centering real working people, not political insiders.** We’re supporting candidates who know what it’s like to live as an everyday person in this country — not career politicians bankrolled by corporate PACs and shady mega-donors — because those are the people voters identify with the most.

**[Now that you know more about what we plan to do over the next cycle and beyond, will you please add a donation of $10 or whatever you can today? None of this will be possible without grassroots supporters like you, so anything you can give today will make a real difference to our movement.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92710?refcode=em20250726-9175&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9175%2E614464%2E1zXSLo)**

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: A right-wing Super PAC just launched a massive $5 million ad buy attacking me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
Hey folks, it’s Jon.
| | |
---
Hey folks, it’s Jon. This just in: A right-wing Super PAC just launched a massive **__$5 million__** ad buy attacking me.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112172657/559640607/274859036?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5569-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzllMTIzNi0yYTZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MPkHR7Z4AswOi6rD8d3wozwxT4qmQdBIz04z0Tq7aI0=)
If you already know the stakes of this race — and you’re ready to fight — please use this link to split a contribution between my re-election campaign and Jacky Rosen today: _[**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rosenfornevada_ossoff**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112172660/559640608/274859036?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5569-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzllMTIzNi0yYTZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MPkHR7Z4AswOi6rD8d3wozwxT4qmQdBIz04z0Tq7aI0=)_
Otherwise, here’s why your support is so important to my campaign, especially today.
This new wave of attack ads is only just the beginning, folks. In the months ahead, Republicans are going to spare no expense and try every dirty trick in the book to defeat me.
Because if they win here in Georgia, they don’t just expand their Senate majority — _they lock it in for the long-term._
With that power, Trump’s last constraints in the Senate vanish. What’s left is total submission. No oversight. No brakes on extremist nominees. No guardrails when he comes for the rule of law.

So all eyes are on our race here in Georgia — and the entire country is counting on us, not only to hold the line, but also to send a clear message:
Americans won’t stand by while this administration dismantles Medicaid and defunds hospitals and nursing homes.

We won’t stand down while they violate fundamental human and civil rights.

And we won’t be silent as Trump launches a power grab unprecedented in our history.
I will fight, and I _will_ win. But I can’t do it alone.
_[**So please, split a donation of $5 — or whatever you are in a place to give — between my re-election campaign and Jacky Rosen to help me fight back against these attacks and defend this seat.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112172662/559640609/274859036?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5569-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzllMTIzNi0yYTZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MPkHR7Z4AswOi6rD8d3wozwxT4qmQdBIz04z0Tq7aI0=)_
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112172663/559640610/274859036?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5569-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzllMTIzNi0yYTZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MPkHR7Z4AswOi6rD8d3wozwxT4qmQdBIz04z0Tq7aI0=)
---
Five years ago, here in Georgia, we lit a beacon of hope and possibility for the whole nation. It’s still shining.

And come November 2026, we will raise it higher.
In a landslide, we will do our part to end this spiral into chaos and corruption.

Thank you — for everything.

— Jon
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112172664/559640611/274859036?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5569-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzllMTIzNi0yYTZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MPkHR7Z4AswOi6rD8d3wozwxT4qmQdBIz04z0Tq7aI0=)
|

name: NDRC
subject: Trump says the quiet part out loud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Donate to help keep maps fair in Texas and nationwide
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112172968/559640990/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwMGMyY2Q2LTI4NmEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nvZ58tJIMogHobQAtDAWUOriAUtGXqqP-soxv7D6p5U=&emci=5e6ef6aa-6769-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=700c2cd6-286a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)
---

> _“The Republicans in Congress are looking at a very, very narrow majority, and they’re looking for every opportunity around the country to increase that majority with things like redistricting [and] the election.**They’re gonna use every tool at their disposal to do that.** ”
>
> — Texas Republican strategist, as reported in The Hill, July 5, 2025_
Peter — **A special legislative session is underway in Texas** during which lawmakers will try to redraw the state’s congressional map — a maneuver designed to tilt the 2026 midterm elections toward Republicans and strengthen their chances to hold control of the U.S. House of Representatives. Why? Because Trump is demanding it: | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112172970/559640991/-246980373?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_TXGerrymanderingRedux_email_20250726-NDRC-Tier1-TXGerrymanderingRedux_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250726-NDRC-Tier1-TXGerrymanderingRedux_&utm_campaign=TXGerrymanderingRedux&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwMGMyY2Q2LTI4NmEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nvZ58tJIMogHobQAtDAWUOriAUtGXqqP-soxv7D6p5U=)
---
They’re saying the quiet part out loud: **The goal of redrawing congressional maps should be to build a better, more representative government. To use their current power to gain more _unearned power_ — no matter what voters really want — is called cheating.**
[**The NDRC is built for this fight — we’re leading the national effort to stop gerrymandering and fight for a democracy built on fair representation. Make a donation right now to stop these shameful attempts to manipulate maps at the state level and tighten control on power at the federal level.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112172971/559640993/-246980373?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_TXGerrymanderingRedux_email_20250726-NDRC-Tier1-TXGerrymanderingRedux_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250726-NDRC-Tier1-TXGerrymanderingRedux_&utm_campaign=TXGerrymanderingRedux&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwMGMyY2Q2LTI4NmEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nvZ58tJIMogHobQAtDAWUOriAUtGXqqP-soxv7D6p5U=)

body:
We get it. You might be thinking, “How much can $5 really do?"
---
Derek, we have an important request: Can you pitch in $5 to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot who will fight back against the harmful and disastrous MAGA agenda? No, that’s not a typo! _**Just $5._** We get it. You might be thinking, “How much can $5 really do?” when Trump and his Republican-controlled Congress have billionaires behind them? **But it’s not just your $5.** It’s $5 from a bookkeeper in North Carolina, $5 from a caregiver in California, $5 from a teacher in Georgia — millions of $5 donations coming together to power our grassroots movement. So Derek, we’re asking you to join your fellow Democrats in this fight. Because when we all pitch in, we can take on Trump’s budget bill, protect Social Security and Medicare, and defend our democracy by ensuring we hold Trump and his administration accountable. **[Will you give $5 (or more!) to help us win local and statewide races this year, take back Congress in 2026, and the White House in 2028? This work is more important now than ever.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250726_4040_fr&amount=5&refcode2=4040_22930333_xLiROJ&akid=4040%2E22930333%2ExLiROJ)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250726_4040_fr&refcode=em_20250726_4040_fr&amount=5&refcode2=4040_22930333_xLiROJ&akid=4040%2E22930333%2ExLiROJ)**

| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23239%2E4449941%2EQo-Hb1) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23239%2E4449941%2EQo-Hb1) **↘↘↘ PLEASE CONFIRM YOUR SUPPORT ↘↘↘** [ **_I, dpwillis67@gmail.com, stand with _NPR_ against Trump’s BASELESS attacks on the free press >>_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64810?t=3&akid=23239%2E4449941%2EQo-Hb1) | [CLICK HERE TO CONFIRM >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64810?t=4&akid=23239%2E4449941%2EQo-Hb1)
---

[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64810?t=5&akid=23239%2E4449941%2EQo-Hb1)
This is a tough email to send.

**Trump is DENYING funding to _NPR_ and _PBS_ to try to block the free press:**
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64810?t=6&akid=23239%2E4449941%2EQo-Hb1)
But, _NPR_ REFUSES to go down without a fight. They’re SUING the Trump Administration for this baseless attack.
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64810?t=7&akid=23239%2E4449941%2EQo-Hb1)
We’re worried that folks are abandoning the free press and NPR in favor of supporting other networks...

Donald Trump and the GOP must be LOVING this!

[ **_Look, you’re 1 of [25] activists selected in your city. Your participation is CRITICAL to verifying that Good Democrats across the country still listen to and support _NPR._ Before 11:59 PM, please confirm your support for _NPR:__**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64810?t=8&akid=23239%2E4449941%2EQo-Hb1)
**↘↘↘ PLEASE CONFIRM YOUR SUPPORT ↘↘↘**
[ **_I, dpwillis67@gmail.com, stand with _NPR_ against Trump’s BASELESS attacks on the free press >> _** [CLICK HERE TO CONFIRM >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64810?t=10&akid=23239%2E4449941%2EQo-Hb1)
--- ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64810?t=9&akid=23239%2E4449941%2EQo-Hb1)
Thank you for your support,

Fight for Reform
_NPR is not associated or affiliated with Fight for Reform and has not sponsored or approved of this communication._

FEC_ decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections.

name: Skyhawk 4K Drone
subject: Where should we send your Skyhawk 4K Drone.
body:
This foldable, lightweight drone lets you record ALL your epic adventures!...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21675/6374453/a3382a77fdf52880e21f5f99f752c89077f71559/1d3add0f1997264097951886941f940de81c15d1)
---
| | |
---
_July 26th, 2025 at 06:23 PM UTC_
---
| | |
---
| | **Fellow Patriot,**
**This foldable, lightweight drone lets you record ALL your epic adventures!** [**Get yours now!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21675/6374453/20ee4855552a9b188fb489b4b1aab4e16aae5832/1d3add0f1997264097951886941f940de81c15d1)
The**Skyhawk 4K** is a precision engineered drone specifically designed for easy flying, making it perfect to fly inside, or to record while on the move.
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21675/6374453/a3382a77fdf52880e21f5f99f752c89077f71559/1d3add0f1997264097951886941f940de81c15d1)
---
**It’s foldable** ... The propellers fold in to make it easier to hide or carry!
**Records video** in HD at 60 frames per second and takes high res photos.
**Gravity Sensors** ... Detects ground and other obstacles and changes course automatically to avoid collisions. And more! [**Yes, Please Rush My Skyhawk 4K Drone to My Doorstep Today!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21675/6374453/20ee4855552a9b188fb489b4b1aab4e16aae5832/1d3add0f1997264097951886941f940de81c15d1)
These drones are flying off the shelves for good reason ...
It’s the most advanced drone you’ll get at this price.
No doubt you’ll find 100 uses for this drone!
---
|
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21675/6374453/a3382a77fdf52880e21f5f99f752c89077f71559/1d3add0f1997264097951886941f940de81c15d1)

name: Mark Warner
subject: A few words about my friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
It's going to take each of us giving a few bucks here and there to flip Virginia blue and retake the majority in the U.S. Senate.

Hi folks, it's Senator Mark Warner. [_**I'll get straight to the point: I'm asking you to make your first $25 contribution split between my re-election campaign and Abigail Spanberger's historic campaign for Governor today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112173584/559642269/-26502794?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-26_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODhkZDVmZjYtMmI2YS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zyqw01lH80i6pRlAwwrUK2xF49uKeuJHKPLESL1sIBw=)
_**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112173585/559642270/-26502794?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-26_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODhkZDVmZjYtMmI2YS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zyqw01lH80i6pRlAwwrUK2xF49uKeuJHKPLESL1sIBw=)**_
[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112173586/559642271/-26502794?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-26_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODhkZDVmZjYtMmI2YS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zyqw01lH80i6pRlAwwrUK2xF49uKeuJHKPLESL1sIBw=)

As the Trump Administration takes a sledgehammer to Virginia jobs and to programs that millions of Americans rely on, the whole country is looking to _one person_ to flip a Governor's seat this November.
I'm of course talking about my friend, Abigail Spanberger.
_She's ready to stand up to the chaos in Washington and put our communities first._
The Republicans know Abigail is a formidable candidate. That's why Abigail's opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, who's embraced Trump's dangerous agenda at every turn, is launching attacks left and right.
If Abigail wins on November 4th, it won't just deal a serious blow to Trump's agenda, it would reignite the Democratic Party ahead of next year's midterms.
So, I'm asking each of you to step up with a small contribution to make our victories possible.
[_**Peter, what do you say? Will you invest a few dollars today to help elect Abigail Spanberger as our Governor this November and power my Senate campaign in 2026? It's going to take each of us giving a few bucks here and there to flip Virginia blue and retake the majority in the U.S. Senate.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112173587/559642272/-26502794?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-26_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODhkZDVmZjYtMmI2YS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zyqw01lH80i6pRlAwwrUK2xF49uKeuJHKPLESL1sIBw=)

clean_body: It's going to take each of us giving a few bucks here and there to flip Virginia blue and retake the majority in the U.S. Senate. Hi folks, it's Senator Mark Warner. = = = As the Trump Administration takes a sledgehammer to Virginia jobs and to programs that millions of Americans rely on, the whole country is looking to one person to flip a Governor's seat this November. I'm of course talking about my friend, Abigail Spanberger. She's ready to stand up to the chaos in Washington and put our communities first. The Republicans know Abigail is a formidable candidate. That's why Abigail's opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, who's embraced Trump's dangerous agenda at every turn, is launching attacks left and right. If Abigail wins on November 4th, it won't just deal a serious blow to Trump's agenda, it would reignite the Democratic Party ahead of next year's midterms. So, I'm asking each of you to step up with a small contribution to make our victories possible. = = = = = = = Thank you, Mark Warner By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Message & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info. Text STOP to stop receiving messages. . Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States

body:
Across New Jersey and all over the country, parents are facing impossible choices.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112174041/559643942/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWZjYTcwNi0yZDZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yl0n9rEZKQA2IU1kMdG9UAu9IouGbiOGvGZ8i_DgFBg=&emci=e995793a-c568-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=41fca706-2d6a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=26261389)
---

| | Parents and working families are struggling under an affordability crisis being made worse by the Trump administration, and across New Jersey and all over the country, parents are facing impossible choices. They want to provide for their families – but for far too many, the cost or availability of child care makes it nearly impossible to work, make ends meet, or pursue opportunity. **That's why I'm proud to support the Child Care for Working Families Act** – comprehensive reform we need to tackle the childcare shortage, deliver families immediate relief, and make sure we better support the workers who go above and beyond to deliver this high-quality care. I believe no family should have to choose between putting food on the table or paying for child care. And no child care worker should have to work full-time while living in poverty. [**Add your name now to show your support for lower child care costs. name: Ilhan Omar HQ
subject: BREAKING: “DNC member weighs challenge to Rep. Ilhan Omar.”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter — This is
huge news.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250726-io?refcode=em20250726-36876&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36876_1203867_y6sR6K&akid=36876%2E1203867%2Ey6sR6K ]DNC member weighs challenge to Rep. Ilhan Omar

We learned that Ilhan Omar’s potential opponent in the race for reelection
is getting closer to stepping into the ring.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250726-io?refcode=em20250726-36876&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36876_1203867_y6sR6K&akid=36876%2E1203867%2Ey6sR6K ]If you understand what that means for our progressive movement and our
fight to re-elect Ilhan, rush a split contribution right now between
Justice Democrats and Ilhan Omar to power this campaign >>

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250726-io?refcode=em20250726-36876&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36876_1203867_y6sR6K&akid=36876%2E1203867%2Ey6sR6K ]Chip in $5

Peter,
Ilhan’s faced tough primary challenges in every election cycle since 2018.

And in each of those races, Ilhan won because she had the support of a
grassroots team that stood beside her. A grassroots team that knocked
doors, made phone calls, organized their community, and chipped in $5 or
$10 at a time to fund our efforts.

If anyone is thinking about jumping into this race, we can be certain that
their #1 priority will be securing the financial support they’ll need to
build a campaign and run constant attack ads against Ilhan. For all we
know, those donations could come from AIPAC, corporate Super PACs, or
billionaire mega-donors.

Simply put, we can’t be caught off guard while Ilhan’s challenger builds a
humongous war chest to spend against her. That would be a disaster for our
chances.

So, it’s critically important that we respond to this breaking news by
recommitting ourselves to reelecting Ilhan and chipping in today.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250726-io?refcode=em20250726-36876&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36876_1203867_y6sR6K&akid=36876%2E1203867%2Ey6sR6K ]Please, split a contribution between Justice Democrats and Ilhan Omar
right now to help our campaign prepare to take on any and all challengers.
Ilhan is a powerful voice on the issues we care about and a leader in this
progressive movement, and it’s up to us to have her back.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250726-io?refcode=em20250726-36876&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36876_1203867_y6sR6K&akid=36876%2E1203867%2Ey6sR6K ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Team Ilhan Omar

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250726-36876-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36876_1203867_y6sR6K&akid=36876%2E1203867%2Ey6sR6K

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36876%2E1203867%2Ey6sR6K

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Republicans are working to rig the map
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Yesterday, I joined Congressmen Joaquin Castro and Greg Casar,
Congresswoman Jasmine Crockett, and State Representatives Gina Hinojosa
and James Talarico in Austin to fight the Republican redistricting power
grab.

I’ll share a full recap in the next few days, but I wanted to send a short
note as soon as I could.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250726-1.vT5Fri&refcode=ema20250726-240249&t=1002&akid=240249%2E444211%2Es9JwJD ]Beto O'Rourke speaking in Austin.

Republicans are attempting to rig the system in their favor by redrawing
Texas’ congressional districts—years before the next census—in the hopes
of flipping five Democratic-held seats from blue to red.

If we fail to defeat them in this, if we are unable to hold these seats
and win a majority in the House, the consolidation of authoritarian power
will be nearly unstoppable. More Americans whisked off the streets by
masked, plainclothes agents without warrants or badges; more of Trump’s
political opponents targeted for persecution and violence; and more likely
that a corrupt, complicit congress rolls out the royal carpet for Trump’s
third term.

We’re not going to let this happen. We’re showing up, organizing, and
fighting this head-on—and we need your help to make sure we succeed.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250726-1.vT5Fri&refcode=ema20250726-240249&t=1003&akid=240249%2E444211%2Es9JwJD ]Will you chip in today to help us keep the fight going? Your support
helps us stay on the road, host town halls, and connect with Texans to
push back on the GOP’s power grabs.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250726-1.vT5Fri&refcode=ema20250726-240249&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=240249%2E444211%2Es9JwJD ]DONATE $3

Thank you,

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=240249%2E444211%2Es9JwJD

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

Friends,Immigration enforcement is a controversial topic in California, but it really shouldn’t be.

The facts are clear:

✅ It’s against the law to enter the United States illegally

✅ California’s “sanctuary” laws protect criminals and prevent cooperation with federal law enforcement

✅ The Democrats have made California a magnet for illegal immigrants

I recorded a short video explaining what the Governor can do to bring California in line with federal law ... and what I will do as Governor when inaugurated in January 2027.

It’s time to restore safety, common sense, and the rule of law in California.

subject: Mamdani + Bernie Fight Oligarchy, New Endorsements, Get Big Money Out of Primaries
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

NEWS FROM THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

HEADLINES: Fight Oligarchy Actions | Mamdani Momentum | New
Endorsements | Get Oligarch Money Out of Dem Primaries | Path Forward
Survey Results | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

Our movement knows we’re on the right side of history — and we’ve got
leaders like Bernie Sanders and Zohran Mamdani leading the charge to
put power back in the hands of We the People.

That’s why Our Revolution is focused on building grassroots power to
Fight Trump & the Oligarchs with this three-point strategy:

1. Fight the Oligarch Agenda - from Capitol Hill to City Halls - and
fight FOR an agenda that delivers for poor and working people
2. Elect Progressive Champions up and down the ballot who are
committed to breaking the power of oligarchs
3. Get Oligarch Money out of Democratic primaries and eliminate in
the influence of corporations, billionaires and consultants in
our political process

Read on below to learn more about how we’re leaning into our mission
and fighting on all 3 fronts!

★ ★ ★

[1]Fight Trump & The Oligarchs

★ ★ ★

Trump continues to slash healthcare and critical programs, defund
public media and pad his pockets - and those of his benefactors -
with massive tax breaks and brazen crypto schemes. Inspired by
Bernie, WE ARE FIGHTING BACK — on Capitol Hill and in the streets!

Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team is taking bold action to
confront the worst of the Trump agenda. We delivered [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33226?t=1011&akid=9083%2E5885482%2EAR-uqA ]70,000
petitions directly to Senate offices, demanding they reject Trump’s
brutal budget cuts, and we organized dozens of lobby visits -
including with GOP Senators like Lisa Murkowski and Susan Collins -
on Capitol Hill.

We’ve also held rallies across the country and even marched outside
Trump’s luxury golf resort — where he was dining with crypto
billionaires.

We’re not letting up. In fact, we’re escalating!

★ ★ ★

[3]Take Back The Party

★ ★ ★

HITTING THE STREETS - AND SUBWAYS - FOR ZOHRAN!

In the final days of the NYC mayoral election, Our Revolution made
over 60,000 calls and texts to Get Out the Vote for Zohran.

Our volunteers also fanned out across the city — talking to
undecided voters in the subways at rush hour and crowd canvassing in
key battlegrounds like Harlem, Sunset Park, the Upper East Side, and
Co-Op City.

And we weren’t alone — former US Rep. Jamaal Bowman joined us on the
ground, connecting with his former constituents and rallying New
Yorkers citywide. His trusted voice moved voters that we might not
have reached otherwise.

It was people-powered, passionate, and exactly what our movement is
all about!

Unfortunately, the fight isn’t finished. Our Revolution activists are
demanding that the Democratic Establishment unite behind Zohran. We
recently delivered over 30,000 petitions to holdouts like NY Sen.
Kristen Gillibrand to call on her to apologize for unfairly attacking
Zohran and to officially endorse him.

“Democratic leaders love to talk about unity—until a progressive
wins. Every cycle, we’re told to fall in line for the good of the
party,” Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33227?t=1012&akid=9083%2E5885482%2EAR-uqA ]ABC News.

“Well, Zohran Mamdani is the nominee—and yet the establishment’s
silence is deafening,” he continued. “It’s time for party leaders to
live up to their own standards and stand with Zohran against these
billionaire-funded attempts to undo the will of the voters.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31227?t=1013&akid=9083%2E5885482%2EAR-uqA ]Donate any amount to fund our Citizen Action Team and the work
we’re doing to pressure the Democratic Establishment and take on
Trump and the Oligarchs.

★ ★ ★

ANOTHER VICTORY!

Just last week, Our Revolution-backed candidate Adelita Grijalva won
the Democratic primary for Congress in Arizona’s 7th District.

She isn’t just carrying the progressive legacy of her father, Rep.
Raúl Grijalva — she blazed her own trail as progressive policy leader
on the Tucson City Council member and as a former school board
president.

★ ★ ★

NEW ENDORSEMENTS!

At Our Revolution’s [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33228?t=1014&akid=9083%2E5885482%2EAR-uqA ]Fight the Oligarchy Town Hall this past
Monday, over 50,000 activists came together to strategize to elect
our three newly-endorsed candidates: Donavan McKinney (MI), Robert
Peters (IL) and Troy Jackson (ME) — all working class champions
backed by Bernie Sanders.

Our Revolution is backing Donavan McKinney in his race for Congress
(MI CD-13) against Democratic incumbent and self-funded millionaire
Shri Thanedar, who voted to thank ICE and backs crypto deregulation.

“I grew up poor, not knowing where my next meal was coming from,”
Donovan shared. “In 10th grade, my mom was crying because another
young black kid was murdered in our neighborhood. She looked me in
the eyes and said, ‘You have to survive.’ That moment made me realize
we need to fight for a better community.”

As a State Rep, Donavan has gone toe-to-toe with powerful Oligarchs —
he’s introduced legislation to ban monopoly utility money in politics
and pushed fellow Democrats to reject corporate cash from state
contractors.

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution endorsed Robert Peters in his bid to win an open seat
in Congress representing Illinois’ 2nd district.

As a State Senator, Robert advocated for economic and criminal
justice reforms and won: Passing laws to end cash bail, strengthen
labor protections, and make sure public resources go to the public —
not to enrich Oligarchs.

At our Town Hall, he pledged to take this fight to Capitol Hill:
“Nobody should worry about healthcare, food, or housing. We need to
restore dignity to working people and stand up to billionaires who
put profits before people.”

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution is supporting Troy Jackson’s run for Governor of Maine
based on his track record as a labor leader who stood up to the
timber titans and took on powerful corporate interests as State
Senate President.

His commitment to working people started young. “When I was a kid, my
dad was on strike. The landowner told workers: Go back to work now,
or be replaced tomorrow. That’s when I learned how little the rich
think of us.”

Troy took that lesson to the State Capitol, leading the charge to
take on Big Pharma and greedy insurance companies, crack down on
corporate tax breaks, and protect elections from out-of-state
billionaires.

Now, he’s running to lead the state and deliver power back to the
people — and take it away from the billionaires and corporate
lobbyists who’ve rigged the system for too long.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31227?t=1015&akid=9083%2E5885482%2EAR-uqA ]Help us out-organize Big Money and elect progressives like these
up and down the ballot — every dollar helps!

★ ★ ★

[8]Elect Candidates

★ ★ ★

NEW SURVEY RESULTS ARE IN!

A new survey of 5000+ Our Revolution members show - once again - that
there is a crisis of confidence in Democratic leadership, stemming
from years of corporate influence and a failure to be an effective
opposition party to Trump and the Oligarchs.

* 87% feel let down or frustrated by Party leaders
* 68% are pessimistic about Dems’ “Project 2029”
* 95% say listen to the grassroots not consultants
* 90% say Dems win when they embody change & inspire with bold
ideas

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33229?t=1016&akid=9083%2E5885482%2EAR-uqA ]FULL POLL RESULTS HERE

“Time and again, our base is demanding something much deeper: a party
that actually fights for us and not the wealthy elites,” Our
Revolution executive director Joseph Geevarghese told the media.

★ ★ ★

DON’T PARTY WITH OLIGARCH MONEY!

The survey results underscore the important work Our Revolution
leaders are doing inside the Party to Get Big Money Out of Democratic
Primaries.

At Our Revolution’s [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33228?t=1017&akid=9083%2E5885482%2EAR-uqA ]Fight the Oligarchy Town Hall on Monday,
Larry Cohen, Our Revolution Board Chair & DNC member, unveiled a new
effort to ban outside Big Money independent expenditures in
Democratic primaries. “Voters—not billionaires—should decide our
candidates,” he noted. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33230?t=1018&akid=9083%2E5885482%2EAR-uqA ]Read his piece in BarnRaiser here.

Larry introduced Susheela Jayapal, an Our Revolution endorsed
candidate who ran for Congress in Oregon’s 3rd District, to talk
about how outside money hijacked her race. “Billionaires spent $6
million to defeat me,” she said. “Voters never got to hear my message
through the flood of attack ads.”

Momentum to ban Big Money is growing. Arizona Democrats just passed
a rule to block outside spending in primaries—and with Our
Revolution’s backing, new DNC Vice Chair Ken Martin will bring a
similar resolution to the national party this August.

“This is a winnable fight,” said Jane Kleeb, DNC Vice-Chair and Our
Revolution Board Member said at the Town Hall, “but only if we
organize. The future of the party—and who it serves—is on the line.”

As the Democratic establishment turns once again to consultants and
billionaire donors to plan their Project 2029 strategy and agenda,
our movement is growing larger and louder — and working for
transformative change.

Leaders like Zohran Mamdani prove that our progressive priorities and
organizing model is what earns trust and wins elections.

“What’s moving people is not poll-tested platitudes,” Our Revolution
Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese said. “It’s unapologetic
leadership that centers working people and takes on corporate greed.
From Mamdani in New York to grassroots organizers in Michigan, the
path forward is being charted by people who know that democracy
doesn’t trickle down—it rises up.”

★ ★ ★

[12]Action Center

★ ★ ★

Our Mission in this moment: Fight Trump and the Oligarchy. We have
built a powerful network of organizers and activists — 60,000+
connected across the country — and we’re getting to work!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33231?t=1019&akid=9083%2E5885482%2EAR-uqA ]Let’s keep fighting. Sign up for a training session this Sunday
to gear up for August Recess and our anti-oligarchy summer actions!

And now we have a [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28759?t=1020&akid=9083%2E5885482%2EAR-uqA ]new tool to help you plug in the way you want.
Whether it’s pressuring lawmakers in their office or amplifying the
message online, there are tons of ways to help!

★ ★ ★

NEW STICKER!

When you pick up this new Defund Oligarchy Sticker (and other great
merch!) you’ll help power our collective action to take on the worst
of Trump and his billionaire cronies while electing progressives to
build power across the country. Thank you.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/19903?t=1021&akid=9083%2E5885482%2EAR-uqA ]MERCH STORE

★ ★ ★

[16]Thank you to all who Donate & Volunteer

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?t=1022&akid=9083%2E5885482%2EAR-uqA ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=9083%2E5885482%2EAR-uqA ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=9083%2E5885482%2EAR-uqA ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=9083%2E5885482%2EAR-uqA ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=9083%2E5885482%2EAR-uqA ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=9083%2E5885482%2EAR-uqA ]Website |

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=revreport20250726.I_-WQu&t=1008&akid=9083%2E5885482%2EAR-uqA ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a
month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=revreport20250726.kUsWVJ&t=1009&akid=9083%2E5885482%2EAR-uqA ]GIVE MONTHLY

name: Fair Fight: Together
subject: Be our guest: Join Sherrilyn Ifill, Nana Gyamfi, and Sarah Rich for a conversation on immigration and democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
Can you join us next Thursday? |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112175876/559648934/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250726_T1_FFTogether_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTUxYWVlNC0zMDZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=62jQUI5TwP1FHaHIe8ZoLiS5kyJyUJGQxOXI7SXFx_Y=&emci=3751aee4-306a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3951aee4-306a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1037277)

| | Team, Immigration has been filling the headlines — and it’s time for a conversation that cuts through the chaos, calls out the extremist tactics used to divide us, and gets at the heart of what this issue means for our country’s future. That’s the agenda for the next installment of our Fair Fight: Together series of virtual discussions, and we hope you can make it to hear from these esteemed experts:
* **Sherrilyn Ifill,** Civil Rights Attorney and Vernon E. Jordan Jr. Esq. Endowed Chair in Civil Rights at Howard University
* **Nana Gyamfi,** Executive Director of the Black Alliance for Just Immigration
* **Sarah Rich,** Senior Attorney at Democracy Forward

[**Please join this engaging, timely, and necessary conversation on immigration and our democracy next Thursday, July 31, at 7:00 p.m. ET — click here to save your spot on the Zoom.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112175877/559648935/-1651119156?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250726_T1_FFTogether_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTUxYWVlNC0zMDZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=62jQUI5TwP1FHaHIe8ZoLiS5kyJyUJGQxOXI7SXFx_Y=&emci=3751aee4-306a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3951aee4-306a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1037277#/registration) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112175878/559648936/-1651119156?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250726_T1_FFTogether_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTUxYWVlNC0zMDZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=62jQUI5TwP1FHaHIe8ZoLiS5kyJyUJGQxOXI7SXFx_Y=&emci=3751aee4-306a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3951aee4-306a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1037277#/registration)
---
[RSVP NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112175879/559648937/-1651119156?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250726_T1_FFTogether_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTUxYWVlNC0zMDZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=62jQUI5TwP1FHaHIe8ZoLiS5kyJyUJGQxOXI7SXFx_Y=&emci=3751aee4-306a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3951aee4-306a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1037277#/registration)
---
As the Trump Regime continues to attack immigrant communities and people of color around the country, it’s critical to address how these threats connect to a broader authoritarian agenda.
And it’s vital that we continue to fight back.
To gather together in community and gear up for the work ahead, we hope you can join us next Thursday. With insight from our distinguished panelists, we’ll sort through the latest chaos, understand what it says about where we are as a country, and identify the implications for all of us moving forward.

clean_body: Can you join us next Thursday? | | | Team, Immigration has been filling the headlines — and it’s time for a conversation that cuts through the chaos, calls out the extremist tactics used to divide us, and gets at the heart of what this issue means for our country’s future. That’s the agenda for the next installment of our Fair Fight: Together series of virtual discussions, and we hope you can make it to hear from these esteemed experts: Sherrilyn Ifill, Civil Rights Attorney and Vernon E. Jordan Jr. Esq. Endowed Chair in Civil Rights at Howard University Nana Gyamfi, Executive Director of the Black Alliance for Just Immigration Sarah Rich, Senior Attorney at Democracy Forward | As the Trump Regime continues to attack immigrant communities and people of color around the country, it’s critical to address how these threats connect to a broader authoritarian agenda. And it’s vital that we continue to fight back. To gather together in community and gear up for the work ahead, we hope you can join us next Thursday. With insight from our distinguished panelists, we’ll sort through the latest chaos, understand what it says about where we are as a country, and identify the implications for all of us moving forward. In solidarity, Fair Fight = | 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. Dear Friend,

You may know Hillsdale College--but you probably haven't met Frank.

Frank knew he wanted to serve. But without access to a proper education--one rooted in our Western tradition--he might never have become the sheriff's deputy he is today.

He's just one of many Hillsdale alumni making a difference--in law enforcement, government, education, business, and family life.

Right now, there are thousands of young people like Frank. They want to lead. They want to do good. **But they need your help** to receive a proper education and become responsible adults who have good character and care about their communities--self-governing citizens.

Today, you can read what Frank has to say and help make stories like his possible for others by supporting:

* A classical education for K-12 students nationwide

* Free online courses for millions of Americans, including the young

* _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty, sent free of charge to families across the country

Because of our extensive outreach efforts, even the smallest gift goes a long way to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

None of this work is possible without informed patriots like you--because we accept no government funding, and neither do our students. Not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. **NOT. ONE. PENNY.**

**Will you help educate and inspire the next generation of American leaders? You can do so at this secure link:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/annual-fund](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/Lyck12gh1l2-OjvH0W1zAsmC-vRtf2P-MC8zpObenAUq395tHpsLppBgzgZFnY7GCPNU_xBKjvQMBNnAhBp4LcnwRddDHp3oaIRRG22Ju0flq6xNkc7fpkI3bjwmKxCwpmaHhq0TvaDUOmmHq8v_eRJ8DUVo0Clo8AmtDbcPEqxDax4l9MMyX9X5LTINjiFeJbuEYnS3aR6y0Roltepo5H-qwhVqcd9dAfcKyoaHjoMVEEaP1oPwdjqdO7WPvnRQ6aiZw6UKpEakrudyv_Px04AvP9GjDl2Hit9zs1R8t_0cvwaeF5Q9ZJHcDMs6LVbu2wl75NlqoSnwC2vllKy5HCIYqPuCxaVWTxJ7tsb6J2Uj80Xjn2ARVPYzVI7pac4jZbIGUg9dMAfOx_GAaMRqDfyX-qYOVhRvXRVhFWsIjixnn3kJmzM0u25KW0oNEOBeD7wZb8xGMvH5NNljo1-paChepLYRnYT-IeRXZCwbDhRxm-N3FPHo7x55eIKtjXKwWlaQcKS1eTD2ju--r1YDNIzr6toAB2p97FT6DqmAo4ZR9jnJMv-m_ntBT2hIww5D6d8bAZfU8wuNvRasKuX7-EHWPVmT_gOra4QQbB48PwMUkFUQk0POKv2t1Rj3VNWLqz1Oumw6gT4mw37PTDd78sjRQ7BClQx6bxTvuDteLamp715oEV6VMxtsERrgdsfxYoYJ257tZUiXFRMGZFVIBtneGnss6di6QxWBsQf3YQ/PbUHEUzor4bI9A69QCBuk1o8tQKeUc13/11)**

Thank you for taking the time to read my email and Frank's story. Remember, your support can make a difference in a young person's education.

Warm regards,

Labin Duke, Th.M.
Associate Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College

\----------------------------------------------

Dear Friend,

**When I 'm on patrol, I often think about how I got here. **

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/GjLcrordDNcR8zW7ZRVn4-JUsNR8l1CtFJ6BOO78H43rEUDNWjfEXlaUBdcN895XFiosrc-mTDhTHUx5UtHB14lHY4Hon73OhvgyxPO1eaqdCI-GE72mgqcAhhuSQ-AbU57UKJlBeVG8RgU7O2Etjz6Ip32wq1MJH_cjda8jyEXQujdIa5LbsWS2owLhwcOVIMOiI6YDeuMm6YGMntvSEYDb9mQxdul1bR6Js19QBREqw5caWJqf5VT6tZaidlYoq9ohPtGK-MySs1SQde27ziCh3fdDmFrLQQ99MNCvufTBJjl72ZHYA3rmTytn43nsMsy0bDoiTNGTo-aFadSayZnWz3c6rYW3sZEEpvBcfGXXRvz8vIaJuc8nPBWtruHGSWHqhj9e5XAMAvoJVoxQEVbQtb13sPeJMX0wIuMuOtbS0hgv1KNh0wvpsQ4nzHddSu_7Tvz0RENamyoiSKdEdVQ4k0k_SPfYObUuaziXcD29gUWs50fF_NsRY1vkTI0r04gxkqnpR6aTjxno3TH7eGlZTmQO5ibetNs72c8mokToSlEOSOwySFJ_qkRoWap66a65BVVVNTbl0UaBtwCMhAwxzI3kmqRzpznlFi4OI2lJtreJfpLvWR8ywiUu5Zo3mBAnRK7adnF5silVHAbLoaHCJuHCjq4dWnFoPCSOD4Kxh-66q_B-DLG9tGzHspVqi4zZhQQcUTjUONL5ddX3Gy6Wl97VBLKfAlgtV_E2mA/Itkch1VsTEo5XteKOA0g4JvH4cH_Riyu/11)
Allow me to introduce myself. I am a sheriff's deputy and a recent graduate of Hillsdale College.

**Labin Duke from Hillsdale heard my story --and he thought you should hear it too. People like you helped support my education, so you should know how this generosity made it possible for me to work in law enforcement and keep our communities safe.**

Hillsdale taught me to love truth and defend liberty; now, I do it every day.

Growing up in D.C., I was drawn to politics. Majoring in politics at Hillsdale felt natural--but I never expected how much it would shape me.

After four years studying thinkers such as Plato, Aristotle, Locke, and Madison, I knew politics was about securing justice and peace--**and I was driven to build a career that defends it.**

Law enforcement was a natural choice, and in my career, I've seen firsthand the application of justice in real life.

**Many people helped make my education possible with their generous support of Hillsdale College and its mission.**

There are young men at the College who want to become leaders and serve their country and communities. But we need to make sure this education continues--and that Hillsdale can teach many more beyond its campus. That's where you come in...

**[You can ensure the next generation fights to defend liberty by giving a tax-deductible donation to Hillsdale today](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/HUg57Ho8QH7d5_bn3gwCOznBwIEtcr1qFHbHLnYDHcQbNjd_DHanwHhVrtxib0dYYb0owttpL1epJPVgSp03q-QduDAnL1Qt9gb2XInqCSmMwdtV96kyBy3VMZpsw1QQWWm-30UNdr_KYoCEvlf7mLtfNM_1z5219hvPsoWuzvr0h8TfxWC2wduGok0WYszCZlTc1Xr9K22F3xHfV6VZKqsF16X2oj_ulwHR7E1xgEN98bfgJuXcdSzxTJVu9ZDAhSa4_2ciH44i1RNjUcQnZDzBscHXpnPjpMjRQlgabkntCVSEfPK86a9MkUqMHaLGWnZoQVpz1QPBVlr1t0ant6nIRr_0gjQws9JZzw7HV3eHtpUmrWD9pFOPwB8aJg0MG9DGkRyFKZTvU7pheOR6VQ2jKFydh3O4ToXlMg7zZG_hU0oqWW4q000yWVrDiTPiWSXz71wcPWLNOwXmZQD09iIJONLYNpeM7WJhaaVuDNw3p2CljqVQQoxl_BrXDogIYUb35Qkswall307_0uDz1IEy2U7FG94SDf5RkkLHcNBqx_p1nOuUjvTonOhUbIf1uPrOS6IDvyVahWBPfIpjlhGOiCibNs2bFkfa_3jRKD8SBu752C-IEQeJ6touyk2S61CxRsUUn_gDMiG7IvLZikvKYi0Je-hFe7SMDdf3z11dKbdYim3WzV_AhqJx6ewQCLbZ-IK4dtsxfi6ap3xxd8G-wh5Nh2IVblYM9Cj9ZA/V0KdBBXMNLM68d-4RMW3223rCEryaC0x/11).**

Hillsdale is so much more than its campus. I have friends across the country who work every day to defend liberty.

**Your gift isn 't just a donation--it's a strategic investment in the future of our nation. **

**You can make that happen using the secure link below. **

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/annual-fund**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/PiezWd8rJS_yTCmBHKSwLOyVqGEN1jnbk6hIQyBD1Ro7rE6gWXUniGoo-yav9d-m_JpecYGENgBksmt1dPQyG1D5BKUuE3bXaQV_xtfMstq557o9gDp2hr8Jmld4M__BfBUEPjY8Av88EG9lmEYx4dSFTENwMVWYCfv-mVFVPoe68nvHlMV_LsDZnLwiFG0V4m-yJhqGzNQzDdTDL4yjxhYK6Fhkn6OzIptrybuLJc26FaLNDTDZcRll-9aznjN0Zy_wT0KKoAkivEHtfV1boEQ_kXCWFBqcBK_JwlgzQ7J35GvLjREecU1SiQ73h4govDVSo5mMuCdsE2Jjm1-h_R4_JOWacUCcOdm0XWNdRu6wqgqfCUlbqucDW9Hb3ldqkHKC0ZSNvIgr2rK-kxygAg_gaVaOSmNZXdWxtBc8XZy5mxzwNmWvEXjoc6D9iphO2Xwgla9rtAS4ME_OFpeEEOQasQF4PSG5CdEWp-3BtZiIBVZF3RS-seCCz7Urh2WybnKha4CVFjABzgsnYAysixPP-eVFkGYep3kb21x0htE7P5ZK1gQXLh_U08qhwWfwBsRpzmeKS5n6ICszPDr3uPxvGJkwmLnvTZcEgoJDwjzQLKKmSHyK6Zisb_EHdCnfGJzJstlhcUjLlyH90UtcY0L3U9O2jTRLNjtM1W4xXS7UZr-jSSWxS2DEtwc5pEsMQxojLlTKTc-xawFGxdrdZTeQB898cvHe47Xm1oxMnw/rNpzZEFiyTkqov26SdZNKzwG2WnZhdxg/11)

Thank you for your generosity and commitment to the principles that put me on the road fighting to keep our communities safe.

Warm regards,

Frank
Hillsdale Alum

P.S. My main task is to keep the roads safe. If you drive, please do so carefully. I'd hate to have the first time we meet be a traffic stop.
