Allow me to introduce myself. I am a sheriff's deputy and a recent graduate of Hillsdale College. Labin Duke from Hillsdale heard my story --and he thought you should hear it too. People like you helped support my education, so you should know how this generosity made it possible for me to work in law enforcement and keep our communities safe. Hillsdale taught me to love truth and defend liberty; now, I do it every day. Growing up in D.C., I was drawn to politics. Majoring in politics at Hillsdale felt natural--but I never expected how much it would shape me. After four years studying thinkers such as Plato, Aristotle, Locke, and Madison, I knew politics was about securing justice and peace--and I was driven to build a career that defends it. Law enforcement was a natural choice, and in my career, I've seen firsthand the application of justice in real life. Many people helped make my education possible with their generous support of Hillsdale College and its mission. There are young men at the College who want to become leaders and serve their country and communities. But we need to make sure this education continues--and that Hillsdale can teach many more beyond its campus. That's where you come in... . Hillsdale is so much more than its campus. I have friends across the country who work every day to defend liberty. Your gift isn 't just a donation--it's a strategic investment in the future of our nation. You can make that happen using the secure link below. ** Thank you for your generosity and commitment to the principles that put me on the road fighting to keep our communities safe. Warm regards, Frank Hillsdale Alum P.S. My main task is to keep the roads safe. If you drive, please do so carefully. I'd hate to have the first time we meet be a traffic stop.

name: Team Gillibrand
subject: They’re setting the narrative early — will you help us push back?

body:
This summer slowdown could cost us the Senate — will you help?
Donald Trump’s allies are flooding key Senate races with cash — trying to set the narrative before voters even tune in. If they define the conversation early, they can shift the momentum before Democrats can fight back. And this summer’s slowdown in grassroots donations is exactly what they’ve been counting on. These right-wing PACs aren’t just testing the waters — they’re trying to rewrite the story before it begins. That’s why Kirsten is working overtime to boost our Democratic candidates, combat misinformation and defend our Senate majority. name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: re: Trump is threatening our entire fundraising operation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is another one of Trump’s authoritarian crackdowns, targeting the entirety of Democratic fundraising.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1733%2E791427%2EMFZSMy)

**[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july25.Ih7rVK&efcode=em250726-1-180&t=2&akid=1733%2E791427%2EMFZSMy)
Friend — This is another one of Trump’s authoritarian crackdowns, targeting the entirety of Democratic fundraising.
ActBlue is by far the number one payment platform for Democrats, progressives, and left-leaning organizations.
It’s how we’ve been able to raise millions of dollars from tens of thousands of donors across each of Ilhan’s campaigns, with folks chipping in just $5 or $10 at a time. Each of those donations made our many victories possible.
But Trump wants to use the power of the presidency to go after his political rivals and shut down one of our most important campaign tools. He wants to go back to the old days, when corporations and billionaires like him could write huge checks to directly buy elections while small-dollar donors — millions of regular people — are left without a voice.
**Using the federal government to stifle your political opposition is what dictators do. We have to send a message that Democrats and progressives are ready to fight back.**
Help me show Trump and the entire GOP that they will not take us back to a time when the grassroots is ignored and the fat cat oligarchs rule.
**[Rush a contribution right now as we prepare to fight this authoritarian crackdown. Every dollar we can raise today helps us prepare for the future, no matter what happens, and prove the enduring power of grassroots supporters like you.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july25.Ih7rVK&efcode=em250726-1-180&t=3&akid=1733%2E791427%2EMFZSMy)
**[CHIP IN $5](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july25.Ih7rVK&refcode=em250726-1-180&t=4&akid=1733%2E791427%2EMFZSMy)**
This movement has always been unstoppable, and that won’t change now. We won’t sit by while Trump makes it easier for billionaires and corporations to buy our elections.
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=5&akid=1733%2E791427%2EMFZSMy)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=1733%2E791427%2EMFZSMy)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=7&akid=1733%2E791427%2EMFZSMy)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=8&refcode2=1733_791427_MFZSMy&akid=1733%2E791427%2EMFZSMy)**.

body:
Earlier this month, state Democrats rallied supporters at our first-ever Down Ballot Defenders Summit. Here’s what they had to say about the fight against MAGA in our legislatures: | | |

body:
Peter,

We need to do everything we can to make sure this campaign has what it needs to fight back against the extreme Republicans in Congress. They're doing everything they can to block progress and protect Donald Trump.

They’ve made it clear they’ll ignore the rule of law, shut down votes, and put Trump over the people they’re supposed to serve. **But that’s not how democracy works.**

subject: quick follow-up

body:
humbly asking for your endorsement

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=450%2E49239%2Enir3kJ)
null, I wanted to quickly follow up to make sure you got my note.
---
I'm still looking for another 217 grassroots Democrats to personally endorse my campaign to become Michigan's next senator, and**I noticed you haven't had a chance to add your name yet.**
**That's why I'm humbly asking one more time:[Will you personally endorse my campaign to keep Michigan blue, take back the Senate for Democrats, and put a stop to Trump's disastrous agenda?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4059?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=450%2E49239%2Enir3kJ)**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4059?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=450%2E49239%2Enir3kJ)
---
Thank you for your support. It means the world to have you by my side in this race.

Haley Stevens
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Team Haley**
Date: Sat, Jul 19, 2025
Subject: What I'm hearing from folks like you
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4060?t=4&akid=450%2E49239%2Enir3kJ)
---
null,
On the campaign trail, I've been talking directly with Michiganders across the state – folks like you who are concerned for the future – and **here's what I've been hearing:**
🛟 People are worried about the future of Medicare and Social Security.

🩺 Folks in Michigan and across the country want improved and affordable access to health care.

💰 Working families need real action to create and protect good-paying jobs.

⛓️💥 And many expressed deep concerns about the future of our fundamental freedoms, civil rights, and American democracy itself.
These aren’t just political talking points, null. They’re _real_ concerns from _real_ people. And they’re exactly why I’m running for Michigan's battleground Senate seat – **because I have a track record of getting things done.**
📌 I helped stabilize the auto industry and save over 200,000 Michigan jobs as chief of staff on President Obama's Auto Rescue Task Force.
📌 I played a leading role passing the bill to grow our manufacturing economy by bringing America’s semiconductor industry back to where it belongs: Michigan.
📌 Most recently, I introduced the Stop Trump's Abuse of Power Act – a bill to ban the president from deploying active duty troops on U.S. soil without consent from state or local leaders.
That barely scratches the surface, and I know there's a _lot_ more work to do. So it's a good thing I grew up the Michigan way: surrounded by grease, grit, and hard work. And I'm in this race now because I'm ready to ensure my hard work in the U.S. Senate continues to support Michigan's working families.
But with new polling showing that I'm the Democrat with the very best shot at beating MAGA Republican Mike Rogers, the GOP is getting scared – **and they're gearing up to spend millions to flip this seat red.**
**So, null, I need****you on my grassroots team to help me****keep up my track record of fighting for hardworking Michigan families.****[Will you join me by endorsing my campaign before 11:59 p.m. tonight? My team set an ambitious goal to get 25,000 signatures by midnight, and right now, I’m still 31% short.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4059?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=450%2E49239%2Enir3kJ)**
| | [Add Your Name](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4059?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=450%2E49239%2Enir3kJ)
---
Thank you so much for your support,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** Null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4059?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=450%2E49239%2Enir3kJ) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4060?t=8&akid=450%2E49239%2Enir3kJ)

Thank you,
Haley

clean_body: humbly asking for your endorsement

name: Major General Paul Eaton, U.S. Army, Ret.
subject: We face significant challenges
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Trump and his entire party want to see the promise of the VA broken, and we can’t allow that to happen.
#
Peter, this is Paul Eaton.
If you were deployed overseas at any point, you likely were in close proximity to a burn pit. And for years, Veterans knew they were suffering because of those burn pits. Cancer, respiratory issues, loss of smell. For far too long, Veterans were forced to face those challenges on their own. I spent a year downwind from a burn pit in Kirkush, Iraq — and still remember the experience.
But after years of working at it, VoteVets got the PACT Act passed in 2022. Finally, Veterans could get treatment for the ailments they suffer from as a result of toxic exposures. Millions have had their claims processed and approved, and the program has been an outstanding success.
Too successful for Donald Trump and VA Secretary Collins, evidently. They’ve placed the PACT Act at the dead center of their crosshairs. It’s no mistake that their initial plan for budget and staff cuts at the VA reduced both to the numbers they were at before the PACT Act passed.
They work to undermine this extremely popular and successful program, even in the face of additional evidence. A new study from the National Institutes of Health and the VA found significantly higher rates of mental illness and brain damage among the men and women stationed near toxic burn pits. The PACT Act undoubtedly deserves more resources to address this, not less.
Now, the issue before us is two-fold.
First, Trump’s taken aim at the funding for research exactly like this. At the top of his chopping block are the grants, loans, scientists, doctors, and researchers that establish links through these studies.
Second, he’s taken aim at the programs themselves. Through staff and funding cuts, he’s undermining care provided by the VA. Through process and program changes, they are diverting care from VA facilities to private providers. Together, they pursue the same ends: Degradation of care to justify further privatization of services provided through the VA — and larger profit margins for themselves and their donors. And let me emphasize that while privatization might sound like an efficient idea, in reality it will send our Veterans to providers untrained to handle veteran specific issues. My British Army friends have horror stories of such a decision rendered in Britain.
VoteVets has taken on efforts to privatize and destroy the VA for the last twenty years. At this point we’ve killed more attempts than we can count. But these attacks, at this very moment, are by far the most serious threats the VA has ever encountered.
The VA still pursues perfection — aggressively — and at its core it is a solemn promise between our country and those who wear the uniform: When you serve, we will take care of you. Trump and his entire party want to see the promise of the VA broken, and we can’t allow that to happen.
VoteVets is spending significant time and resources combatting Trump’s efforts to destroy the VA, both on the campaign trail and in our nation’s capital. The only way that work continues is through donations from our generous supporters.
If you are willing to make a donation today, $5 or anything you can, know this: You will be funding the most comprehensive and effective effort to defend the VA and the care it provides for our Veterans.
And now, I have to formally ask: [**Can we count on you? If you’re still with VoteVets, please make that $5 donation. With thousands of other supporters joining you these contributions will add up very quickly. clean_body: Trump and his entire party want to see the promise of the VA broken, and we can’t allow that to happen. Peter, this is Paul Eaton. If you were deployed overseas at any point, you likely were in close proximity to a burn pit. And for years, Veterans knew they were suffering because of those burn pits. Cancer, respiratory issues, loss of smell. For far too long, Veterans were forced to face those challenges on their own. I spent a year downwind from a burn pit in Kirkush, Iraq — and still remember the experience. But after years of working at it, VoteVets got the PACT Act passed in 2022. Finally, Veterans could get treatment for the ailments they suffer from as a result of toxic exposures. Millions have had their claims processed and approved, and the program has been an outstanding success. Too successful for Donald Trump and VA Secretary Collins, evidently. They’ve placed the PACT Act at the dead center of their crosshairs. It’s no mistake that their initial plan for budget and staff cuts at the VA reduced both to the numbers they were at before the PACT Act passed. They work to undermine this extremely popular and successful program, even in the face of additional evidence. A new study from the National Institutes of Health and the VA found significantly higher rates of mental illness and brain damage among the men and women stationed near toxic burn pits. The PACT Act undoubtedly deserves more resources to address this, not less. Now, the issue before us is two-fold. First, Trump’s taken aim at the funding for research exactly like this. At the top of his chopping block are the grants, loans, scientists, doctors, and researchers that establish links through these studies. Second, he’s taken aim at the programs themselves. Through staff and funding cuts, he’s undermining care provided by the VA. Through process and program changes, they are diverting care from VA facilities to private providers. Together, they pursue the same ends: Degradation of care to justify further privatization of services provided through the VA — and larger profit margins for themselves and their donors. And let me emphasize that while privatization might sound like an efficient idea, in reality it will send our Veterans to providers untrained to handle veteran specific issues. My British Army friends have horror stories of such a decision rendered in Britain. VoteVets has taken on efforts to privatize and destroy the VA for the last twenty years. At this point we’ve killed more attempts than we can count. But these attacks, at this very moment, are by far the most serious threats the VA has ever encountered. The VA still pursues perfection — aggressively — and at its core it is a solemn promise between our country and those who wear the uniform: When you serve, we will take care of you. Trump and his entire party want to see the promise of the VA broken, and we can’t allow that to happen. VoteVets is spending significant time and resources combatting Trump’s efforts to destroy the VA, both on the campaign trail and in our nation’s capital. The only way that work continues is through donations from our generous supporters. If you are willing to make a donation today, $5 or anything you can, know this: You will be funding the most comprehensive and effective effort to defend the VA and the care it provides for our Veterans. And now, I have to formally ask: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** As always, thank you for your support. Very respectfully, Paul Eaton Major General, U.S. Army, Retired Senior Advisor, VoteVets PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.

body:
When Trump gambles with trade, it’s working families who lose. **_POLITICO:_ Beshear says Trump’s tariff spree undermines the president’s supporters **

_"The Kentucky governor said the tariffs will hurt residents of his state, which Trump won overwhelmingly in 2024."_

[**Chip in now if you reject Donald Trump's dangerous tariff war and help Gov. Andy Beshear fight for common-sense leadership at every level >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112179588/559659170/841405539?refcode=em25_250725_tariff_fndd_gq_act___ITTPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250725_tariff_fndd_gq_act___ITTPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=3462d368-356a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzQ2MmQzNjgtMzU2YS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WwI_OiLsOJYWayQiayJSHhqQddIdONuOpo3VPm10jKc=) Peter,

We want to have a deeper conversation with you about what it means for leaders to listen to and support the people they represent. We’d like for you to read this whole email, but if you don't have time, and already support our mission of electing common-sense, compassionate leaders, [**you can chip in right now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112179589/559659171/841405539?refcode=em25_250725_tariff_fndd_gq_act___ITTPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250725_tariff_fndd_gq_act___ITTPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=3462d368-356a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzQ2MmQzNjgtMzU2YS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WwI_OiLsOJYWayQiayJSHhqQddIdONuOpo3VPm10jKc=)

Gov. Andy Beshear is once again calling out Donald Trump for his reckless and impulsive use of tariffs against our most prominent trading partners. That’s because these tariffs will have a devastating impact on Kentucky families, small businesses, and most important industries.

Kentucky exports under Andy’s leadership are at an all-time high – _2024 saw a 18.7% increase in exports from 2023._ A whopping $47.7 billion worth of Kentucky products were sold to markets globally. This is money that goes directly back into our state’s economy, helping our businesses expand and creating jobs that support Kentucky families.

And the countries Trump is targeting with these tariffs? **They are some of Kentucky’s most valued trading partners.** There’s Canada, who buys nearly a quarter of our exports. There’s Japan, who is not only a trading partner but has also made long-term investments here, including the largest Toyota plant in the world in Georgetown, Kentucky. And there’s Mexico, who remains once again a top 5 trading partner with the Bluegrass State.

Unfortunately, Trump is continuously suggesting he will add even more tariffs on even more trading partners, and countries around the world are reacting by working to limit how much business they do with the United States. That means Kentucky businesses will lose one of their biggest markets for the foreseeable future, hurting our economy and even leading to job losses.

Trump won the state of Kentucky in the 2024 election by a whopping 30 points, in part by promising to address rising costs. But his tariff policy is having the exact opposite effect.

Andy believes that our elected officials—no matter their political party—should be working to help the people they represent, not hurt them.

That’s why In This Together PAC was formed: to take on elected officials who make empty promises on the campaign trail then turn around and do the opposite, and support good candidates and good people who will do the right thing for their constituents, regardless of politics.

But to get those leaders elected, we need your help.

[**If you agree with our mission to end self-serving politics, chip in anything you can today. Together, we can help Andy continue the fight to elect honest, common-sense leaders at every level who will move us forward, not drag us backward.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112179591/559659173/841405539?refcode=em25_250725_tariff_fndd_gq_act___ITTPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250725_tariff_fndd_gq_act___ITTPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=3462d368-356a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzQ2MmQzNjgtMzU2YS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WwI_OiLsOJYWayQiayJSHhqQddIdONuOpo3VPm10jKc=) body:
Thousands have signed. But your name is still missing and time is running out.

|

Peter,

We’re disappointed to see your name still isn’t on the letter to Governor Gavin Newsom.

While Trump threatens to JAIL Democratic leaders for defending our democracy, _you’ve stayed silent._

Governor Newsom showed courage. The very least we can do is show we have his back.

**But right now, your name is still missing.**

Don’t let Trump’s authoritarian tactics slide, take a stand for our democracy:
[Add your name now »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112179645/559659295/1158394903?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250726_EMLTR_E1_T0_AC_NS_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhYzczZjQ1LTM1NmEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tcbN1So1U6wwY3PZlgf9y1zG74UmD9wU-hDjBOSmK3o=) | [SIGN THE LETTER »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112179646/559659296/1158394903?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250726_EMLTR_E1_T0_AC_NS_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhYzczZjQ1LTM1NmEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tcbN1So1U6wwY3PZlgf9y1zG74UmD9wU-hDjBOSmK3o=)

Trump wants to privatize it, New Dems are fighting to protect it

| **Donald Trump is once again floating the idea of privatizing the U.S. Postal Service — putting at risk a public institution that millions of Americans rely on every single day.****** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112179658/559659310/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250726_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDYyZDM2OC0zNTZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SaC2k2o4BFZtVtCnFsRFfmQDX6jm6s0B4smJzW7JKfg=&emci=ca563682-6969-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3062d368-356a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)** | [ADD YOUR NAME: DEFEND THE USPS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112179659/559659311/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250726_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDYyZDM2OC0zNTZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SaC2k2o4BFZtVtCnFsRFfmQDX6jm6s0B4smJzW7JKfg=&emci=ca563682-6969-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3062d368-356a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)
---
**The USPS is more than a mail carrier, it’s a vital lifeline for our democracy and our communities.**

It delivers prescription medications to seniors and veterans.
It ensures every American — _no matter how rural their address or how limited their mobility_ — has access to essential mail services and mail-in voting.

**And it does all this at the same cost to everyone, because it’s a public service rooted in _fairness_.**

That’s exactly why Trump and his allies want to dismantle it, because they don’t believe in a system that treats every American equally.

New Dems are fighting to protect the USPS from privatization because we believe that public services should serve the public, _not turn a profit for the privileged few._

**[If you agree that the USPS should stay in the hands of the people, add your name now and stand with us in this fight! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112179660/559659312/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250726_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDYyZDM2OC0zNTZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SaC2k2o4BFZtVtCnFsRFfmQDX6jm6s0B4smJzW7JKfg=&emci=ca563682-6969-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3062d368-356a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)**

It delivers prescription medications to seniors and veterans. It ensures every American — no matter how rural their address or how limited their mobility — has access to essential mail services and mail-in voting. And it does all this at the same cost to everyone, because it’s a public service rooted in fairness. That’s exactly why Trump and his allies want to dismantle it, because they don’t believe in a system that treats every American equally. New Dems are fighting to protect the USPS from privatization because we believe that public services should serve the public, not turn a profit for the privileged few. Thank you for your support! name: Adam Schiff
subject: How we stop Trump:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi, Adam Schiff here. It's my honor to serve as California's newest Senator and one of your DSCC Vice Chairs, fighting to flip the Senate blue.

**[In a moment, I'm going to tell you why we _must_ take back the Senate majority to stop Trump's agenda. But first, I need to ask: Will you donate $5 to the DSCC to make it happen?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21879?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250726-AdamSchiff-VCSchiffTrumpFRRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250726-AdamSchiff-VCSchiffTrumpFRRF-Pros-sl1&akid=20829%2E9716520%2E2JIuwD)**

Let me make this as plain as possible: **Donald Trump isn't fit to lead.**

We see it in his actions every day. Pardoning January 6th defendants on his first day in office, cutting Medicaid to pay for massive tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans, attempting to end birthright citizenship, turning his back on our allies -- **if you invented a fictional politician hellbent on harming our country, they would look exactly like Donald Trump.**

But how have Senate Republicans responded to this shocking display? With shrugs, and -- more importantly -- _votes_ to let Donald Trump have his way with our government.

**And that is exactly why we _must_ take back the Senate: Republicans will _never_ stand up to Trump, so if _anyone_ is going to stop this madness and hold him accountable, the responsibility falls to Democrats like us.**

**[DSCC leadership, myself included, is counting on this team to raise $50,000 by midnight to keep our plan to flip the Senate on track._Nothing_ could be more important in these early days. So let me personally ask you -- will you rush $5 or more immediately to help fight for a Democratic majority? >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21879?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250726-AdamSchiff-VCSchiffTrumpFRRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250726-AdamSchiff-VCSchiffTrumpFRRF-Pros-sl1&akid=20829%2E9716520%2E2JIuwD)**

Every donation meaningfully improves our odds of keeping KS-03 blue next year.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112180151/559660758/-1340363074?refcode=email_072625_overwhelming&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDc5NTZmMi0zNjZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_hMcVjB6Mwuujb6N6OouXf4EzLyqlC6O41OxdKpWGpc=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112180152/559660759/-1340363074?refcode=email_072625_overwhelming&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDc5NTZmMi0zNjZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_hMcVjB6Mwuujb6N6OouXf4EzLyqlC6O41OxdKpWGpc=)
---
One of the reasons I signed on to become Sharice’s campaign manager is because she’s truly one-of-a-kind.
She’s the only Democrat to win a federal election in Kansas in the last 15 years. She defeated a Republican incumbent to do it. And her background is unlike anyone else’s in Congress — and if you’re anything like me, you know that’s exactly what Washington needs right now. Not more of the same.
Here’s the thing: Yes, Sharice got to where she is because she worked her heart out for years. But most importantly, supporters like _you_ worked your hearts out too. You knocked on doors, made phone calls, spread the word about Sharice’s campaign, and chipped in when you could.
And it’s going to take another massive show of support to win this time around. Because right now, National Republicans are emboldened. They think last year’s difficult election was a sign of things to come. They believe that if they spend enough money and spread enough lies, they can finish the job and take Sharice down next year.
I know that sounds scary and overwhelming — but it’s not meant to be. Because as long as we re-create the same coalitions that powered Sharice to victory before, we can do it again.
[_**So with so much riding on the outcome of next year’s election, can I count on you to pitch in and join Sharice’s team? Every donation — no matter the amount — helps us make sure Democrats don’t lose this must-win seat in Kansas.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112180153/559660760/-1340363074?refcode=email_072625_overwhelming&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDc5NTZmMi0zNjZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_hMcVjB6Mwuujb6N6OouXf4EzLyqlC6O41OxdKpWGpc=)

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: These Republicans…
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Take a look at this.
#

This guy just ripped away healthcare for over 17 million Americans — the largest cut to Medicaid in history.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july25.e1MNu_&refcode=em250726-1-b&t=1&akid=10702%2E3935704%2E5oBZGm)
She voted for the bill.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july25.e1MNu_&refcode=em250726-1-b&t=2&akid=10702%2E3935704%2E5oBZGm)
So did she.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july25.e1MNu_&refcode=em250726-1-b&t=3&akid=10702%2E3935704%2E5oBZGm)
And so did more than 200 other Republicans, including these people:
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july25.e1MNu_&refcode=em250726-1-b&t=4&akid=10702%2E3935704%2E5oBZGm)
There’s no doubt that these Republicans and their big-money donors are celebrating this disastrous bill, but the fight isn’t over yet.
**Every member of Congress you see here is up for election in 2026. GIFFORDS is working to defeat Republicans who put billionaires’ interests above the American people, but that requires a lot of resources.**
[**Will you pitch in any amount to help fight back against the NRA’s influence and retire Republicans like these? Every grassroots donation will help us elect gun safety leaders up and down the ballot.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july25.e1MNu_&refcode=em250726-1-b&t=5&akid=10702%2E3935704%2E5oBZGm)

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T095693e0-ff55-4b20-acce-3d92a6931f52/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, Anti-choice politicians have worked diligently to restrict abortion access in **11 states** and completely ban access in **12 states**. What’s more, they've endangered the lives of women by restricting contraceptives, defunding lifesaving services, and blocking health care providers from delivering essential care. Extremist politicians won't stop until their rightwing agenda is completely in place. But the good news is, Randall, **voters are fighting back.** In 2024, we saw Missouri, Ohio, and Arizona take a stand for reproductive rights and reinstate abortion access through citizen-led ballot initiatives. Now, more states are trying to do the same — and Democrats across the country are taking a stand to defend abortion against ongoing attacks. _But we can't do this alone._ [**If you're with us in this fight, will you add your name to our petition with 10,000 Concerned Activists to protect reproductive rights and tell anti-choice politicians that we will not accept their extremist agenda?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf60ac9fe-ef12-448f-ba45-b96a353355dc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8d78ccf1-964c-4622-83dc-d4285d5fe47f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Defending our Democratic majority in VA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-tcg [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-tcg]
Friends, I’m reaching out today about three critical races in Virginia this November.
Democrats currently hold the narrowest possible majority in the House of Delegates, and we’re working around the clock to defend and expand that majority this year.
I’m asking for your help: Will you split a donation between incumbent Delegates Josh Thomas and Joshua Cole, and former state delegate Elizabeth Guzman? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-tcg]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-tcg]
All three of these candidates have been a part of successful General Assembly elections before, from our major gains in 2017, securing control of both chambers in 2019, and regaining our majority in 2023. And all three of them are proven leaders for Virginia who serve as strong voices for their constituents.
But their races are going to be incredibly close this year, and they need your support.
Please chip in any amount to re-elect Delegate Joshua Cole and Delegate Josh Thomas and help Elizabeth Guzman flip her seat back to blue. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-tcg]
Thanks so much for your support!
-Tim Kaine
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-tcg [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-tcg]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-tcg]
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272

clean_body: [] Friends, I’m reaching out today about three critical races in Virginia this November. Democrats currently hold the narrowest possible majority in the House of Delegates, and we’re working around the clock to defend and expand that majority this year. I’m asking for your help: Will you split a donation between incumbent Delegates Josh Thomas and Joshua Cole, and former state delegate Elizabeth Guzman? [] DONATE TODAY [] All three of these candidates have been a part of successful General Assembly elections before, from our major gains in 2017, securing control of both chambers in 2019, and regaining our majority in 2023. And all three of them are proven leaders for Virginia who serve as strong voices for their constituents. But their races are going to be incredibly close this year, and they need your support. Please chip in any amount to re-elect Delegate Joshua Cole and Delegate Josh Thomas and help Elizabeth Guzman flip her seat back to blue. name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: Stop ICE’s human trafficking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
Why is the Supreme Court letting Trump kidnap people? | |
---
Peter, **The MAGA justices on the Supreme Court are letting Trump do whatever he wants.** They’ve now told him he can fire federal workers en masse, declare illegal executive orders with no oversight, and ship immigrants off to countries they’ve never set foot in before. Masked, plainclothed ICE agents are jumping out of unmarked vehicles and grabbing people off the street. Then, they ship them off to be detained in a foreign country they’ve never set foot in. **That’s kidnapping and human trafficking.** Most of those who have been targeted by ICE haven’t broken the law. But they’re stripped of their right to due process and sent to countries where they’re likely to suffer cruel and unusual punishment. **The Supreme Court has made it clear that they won’t uphold the Constitutional rights of those living in America. They don’t work for us—they work for Trump and his billionaire backers.** [**Congress must step up and investigate, expose, and stop ICE’s human trafficking now. Tell your members of Congress that we won’t stand for American-sponsored gulags!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_F3B1_4HNFXEReA99IH9p0utZ6k8aGLi0k2HLV5I0MJuYylqrGvKBB14vguE_wX_ICfwSOPUTBsPvVNrnhpTId3Jrf81hBtfTFKkGnX-XZoOnjNveR83LQb28dklWtmgjFvHUye7_Lj6R8J3Tl5CPHLlC3FRYQRlFHx5ldvKp32DjIcFScZ3GYpnyGIpnO4Om2SPkv8CpOzaTt7u3zkfGAlOu-YTrTNzi9ZML9aXb0RE6O-hAPqm5BeFD1vslzpABJog2r9v_3su6rnysKCYzN6OT9ZLhVSrYmbc8GPa5x6o1I3KqGuSwxsDRT9Zk7xCjI0aVOfVVohb7uzMfWhSlPaBJB1pJGZ6F0j5iQgJ21QxKVw07s7Eyy5neWSYRIeLWZhugAT3Pq8AXWIkVsH2dLVc-wmRcbWMjfjesHqH3QmA/4ii/7s8HIl7zQvu6MkW-hD8OIg/h0/h001.R6n1KTp6UqDzFd7zGJJQ6PlTWiGYI6IHEXK9PTdxMo8) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_F3B1_4HNFXEReA99IH9p0utZ6k8aGLi0k2HLV5I0MJuYylqrGvKBB14vguE_wX_ICfwSOPUTBsPvVNrnhpTId3Jrf81hBtfTFKkGnX-XZoOnjNveR83LQb28dklWtmgjFvHUye7_Lj6R8J3Tl5CPHLlC3FRYQRlFHx5ldvKp32DjIcFScZ3GYpnyGIpnO4Om2SPkv8CpOzaTt7u3zkfGA6z-iXTZJLo6pdPEZZQPiBjDrSALX6Kr1P-kCxFBFvSZvc4sGtfQKr6fY9CpM2butibYf_gXt9NYB0Hfawjv-6etrQ4P8_seJ1sPifGUFFVGmHoBvE93XjHSCtlw8SXt-4swx3ID-SyEBrQM7BYDH14ujZiOOQg3vt8jn5KfBwj7DIwOKAZUlDUp5417MWjJYgr-q-GT2-RPZXlh_vetcDQ/4ii/7s8HIl7zQvu6MkW-hD8OIg/h1/h001.HPxcCKPhNkzbzz3PYGA0Q6kEfU8RGOdts-xsKuhbmSU) ICE is trafficking detainees to South Sudan, Angola, Uzbekistan, and at least 17 other countries. Some are even being sent to a torture prison in El Salvador—where it’s been said “the only way out is in a coffin.” **This is not what democracy looks like. Instead of protecting our rights, the MAGA Supreme Court is letting Trump send innocent people to American-sponsored gulags.** Congressional action helped release Kilmar Ábrego Garcia from the El Salvadoran torture prison. But we can’t let up the pressure on our legislators until every wrongfully imprisoned detainee is brought home. [**Tell Congress: No American gulags. Investigate ICE, release the findings, and bring every wrongfully detained person home now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_F3B1_4HNFXEReA99IH9p0utZ6k8aGLi0k2HLV5I0MJuYylqrGvKBB14vguE_wX_ICfwSOPUTBsPvVNrnhpTId3Jrf81hBtfTFKkGnX-XZoOnjNveR83LQb28dklWtmgjFvHUye7_Lj6R8J3Tl5CPHLlC3FRYQRlFHx5ldvKp32DjIcFScZ3GYpnyGIpnO4Om2SPkv8CpOzaTt7u3zkfGA8Nrn-Tb7KHXFz4Nws7yqmj7PtP4fV2Iozh_QSnptQkNHzOu35wUMPMD98OFy5Zjfz7p60ZVBMbrk260uw_cEtMidRXoZRmjBmbMkrNdYxN4orh3M1gHzbfF49w28cey3kNMaLnLPtJDeEu82jQrMesDLWGMBsEsHj2_igKcyjp0LAR1MMXVvyGsstQV0UZlnwJLzufVXE_zWSVi4-GVyjw/4ii/7s8HIl7zQvu6MkW-hD8OIg/h2/h001.H-mbxkJuDtLqa77w6UYxwnyi9QbsRBAbkgVqb9zc7dk) Thank you for standing up for our Constitutional rights, Morgan Stahr

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Help us keep WI moving Forward
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Republicans will see Gov. Evers’ retirement as a pickup opportunity.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4890%2E35263%2EAutdKj)
Peter — Wisconsin Governor Tony Evers announced that he won’t seek reelection in 2026. While I’m saddened to hear this, I’m grateful for Governor Evers’ service. Our state motto is simply _**“Forward,”**_ and Gov. Evers embodied that commitment to progress every single day. From joining me on the road last year to hear directly from Wisconsin families to working together to secure our tech hub designation and $49 million to create jobs and grow our biohealth economy, Gov. Evers strived to propel our state forward as a national leader. It was a pleasure and a privilege to work together and guide our state toward innovation. On behalf of my office, the Democratic Party of Wisconsin, and Wisconsinites — I thank Gov. Evers for his years of hard work and service. **Now, we have to ensure that his successor measures up.** National Republicans will see Gov. Evers’ retirement as a pickup opportunity, but we have to hold the line. Electing a strong, Democratic governor in 2026 is the best way to defend our state from Republicans who want to drag us backward. **[Split a donation between my campaign and the Wisconsin Democratic Party so we can elect a governor who keeps our state moving forward.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-wisdems25.-LiUeZ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20250726_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4890%2E35263%2EAutdKj)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to the Democratic Party of Wisconsin and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-wisdems25.PB8YHS&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20250726_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4890%2E35263%2EAutdKj)

name: Jay Jones
subject: Donald Trump is backing Jason Miyares for Attorney General
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?]
Team,
Donald Trump is backing my opponent 100%! Just look at what he said about Jason Miyares at a rally:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?]
We know why Trump is backing Virginia Attorney General Jason Miyares: Miyares has been backing the Trump agenda in Virginia every single day.
If you’re already in to stop him, here’s the link to contribute to my campaign: https://jones4va.org/secure-donate-726 [https://jones4va.org/secure-donate-726]
Trump, who is weaponizing the federal government against his enemies, who's pardoning violent insurrectionists, who's accepting luxury jets from foreign princes — THAT'S who thinks Miyares is doing a "great job."
Do you know why Trump loves him? Because Miyares is his loyal foot soldier in Virginia.
While Trump fires thousands of federal workers here in Virginia — many of them veterans — Miyares says nothing.
While Trump's budget threatens to rip healthcare away from 300,000 Virginians, Miyares stays silent.
While Trump plots to eliminate the Department of Education and gut our public schools, Miyares nods along.
As Virginia's Attorney General, I will fight back against Trump, Miyares, and every MAGA crony's attempt to hurt families like yours. Our Commonwealth will always be my priority.
But team, I can't take on Miyares and Donald Trump alone. Will you donate $25 or more to help me fight for all families as Virginia's next Attorney General? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?amount=25]

subject: Thursday’s deadline is rapidly approaching
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250726-1449-foote&t=1001&akid=1449%2E342411%2EpQ1iIh ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

We’re in the final stretch of the month — and that means it’s time to come
together ahead of [ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250726-1-movement.4-ndKY&refcode=em20250726-1449&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1449%2E342411%2EpQ1iIh ]Thursday’s end-of-month fundraising deadline and do
what we do best: Show up and show out.

The Squad Victory Fund exists to build people power and help our
progressive champions in Congress hold the line, take bold action, and
defend our democracy.

From standing up to corporate greed to demanding social justice, our
movement isn’t about one candidate or one race — it’s about a shared
vision for real, progressive change.

To turn that vision into action, we have to hit every milestone —
including this one — which is why we’re coming to you today:

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250726-1-movement.4-ndKY&refcode=em20250726-1449&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1449%2E342411%2EpQ1iIh ]Will you chip in $3 to help meet our end-of-month
fundraising goal before Thursday? Every contribution helps power our
movement, amplify our voices, and keep the fight going.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250726-1-movement.4-ndKY&refcode=em20250726-1449&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1449%2E342411%2EpQ1iIh ]Contribute ››

Thank you for standing with us,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1449%2E342411%2EpQ1iIh

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: The death threats need to stop.

Friend,
**I got into politics to solve problems without resorting to violence, which is exactly why we have elections instead of wars over who leads our country.**
But the extremists in the Democratic party have poisoned the minds of their base with such hate-filled propaganda that I face serious death threats almost daily.
**Just recently a former federal employee from Voice of America was indicted after spending over a year making violent threats against me, my family, and my staff.**
_At one point, he told me directly:_
**_“We’re coming after you and your staff, and we are locked and loaded._** **_We’re going to take you all out. You’re going to get one between the eyes.”_**
This is a direct result of elected Democrats and their allies in the media attacking me day after day for the past 5 years.**__**
**__**
**_It needs to stop. NOW._**__
As a rank-and-file member of Congress, **_[I don’t have the luxury of government security details...](http://email.email.greene4congress.com/c/eJxckk-PmzwYxD-NuTkCGxty4PBmeZNVpa5WqnrYk-W1H4hb_2Ftkyj76SsITatenxnmNxos3WTNcOtQc0CEnI1OiBBE_0OEnNq3Gx_0x-mA3xzF0L-Un4tInjbnhTy8XskX9vLto35y6eupffaH1-pSPdz5NsHDuyF34KSxy7XpC921zSD1UEBXNYyymrX7qjh3HErWskHx4Z1Ue63LplSaM6L21dDuVV2YjpSElQ3hFS_rer9jwFlJWTu8y5rR5h3V5QrajRHAQ62CHyOktFPBFbY75zyltdcRkWMCNUfYXY2PoBcHIkcn448QDeAsbzZEfM_BCU8QJgs4XCDiKViTjTLSJ6yWj_IodPDCyasKws9KuBHPUoATv_sieowLLho_ItrnOAMifM5OONBmdoj220LrMYU5KkC098qKbcJNUtJN0owe0f4ejTe8zObvDhbmJBZp9hqizFmqn2Jl_Cm1JQafwec7DZ-__-9f-fPnfECEC2-NRrT_57i-HNrfSK1OX6q-iJ2ersZak3iD6nJcf8Ey-aUjvwIAAP__eLjKVQ)_**
**_I pay for protection out of my own campaign funds or my personal savings._**
Democrats know that when they force me to drain my campaign funds paying for security, they make it easier to beat me at the ballot box.
**_[So I’m asking you for you to chip in whatever you can manage to help keep me safe and fighting for our country](http://email.email.greene4congress.com/c/eJxcks-OmzAYxJ_G3ByBDYYcOOwuSqqtNqrUQ7sny7E_iFv_YW2TiD59BaFp1es3w_xGg4Udje7nFtXPiJCLVhERgugTIuTYvM-sVx_HZ_xuKYbulP9aRPKyOa_k4XVSnKrT14_yxca3Y_PJPX8prsXDneYRHt4NuQMrtFmudZeptql7ofoM2qKuaFVWzb7ILi30TV4AU7Q-N6yvKaE9U-ccinpPBDvvM92SnFR5TVjB8rLc7ypgVU6rpj-LsqL1GZX5CtoNAcBBKb0bAsS4k95mpr2kNMa11wGRQwQ5BdjdtAugFgciByvCDx804CRm4wO-5-CIR_CjAeyvEPDojU5aauEilstHaeDKO27FTXruJsntgCfBwfI_fRE9hAUXtBsQ7VKYABE2JcstKD1ZRLttofUY_RQkINo5afg24SZJYUehB4dod4_GG14k_W8HA1PkizQ5BUGkJORPvjL-ltoSvUvg0p2G1efv32h6JU9viDDujFaIdv8d15dDu5mU8vhadFlo1XjTxujIalTmw_oLlsmvLfkdAAD__0sgyZU)_****.**
[CHIP IN](http://email.email.greene4congress.com/c/eJxcksuu2jAYhJ_G2RkltnNhkUUhgupIRZW6YmUZ-09wjy_BdkD06auElFbd_jOZbzSxsKPR_bNF9Q4RctUqIkIQ_YIIOTbnZ9Wr23GHz5Zi6E75r1kk-9V5J2-vk-JUnn7c2N7Gb8fmq9t9L-7F252eI7y9K3IDVmgzX-suU21T90L1GbRFXdKSlc22yK4tlUAqyfJLznpyUWVZqx5qxZrtltb1lmW6JTkp85pURZUztt2UUJU5LZv-IlhJ6wti-QLaDAHAAZPeDQFi3EhvM9NeUxrj0uuAyCGCnAJsHtoFULMDkYMV4acPGnAST-MDfuXgiEfwowHs7xDw6I1OWmrhIpbzR2ngyjtuxUN67ibJ7YAnwcHyP30RPYQZF7QbEO1SmACRakqWW1B6soh260LLMfopSEC0c9LwdcJVksKOQg8O0e4VjVe8SPrfDgamyGdpcgqCSEnIT74w_pZaE71L4NKLhuPn_eM8NPubQ6TizmiFaPffcXk5tHsSJo8fRZeFVo0PbYyOVY1YPiy_YJ783pLfAQAA__9bMcq-)
Thank you. Truly.
_In Liberty_

body:
Reading through hundreds of responses to our July Priority Issues Survey.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112182366/559667771/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.07.26_SurveyFollowup_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTJkYjU5ZC0zYTZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZkVRswKe1-pQmFCWM0syDDrQFzQiV5HJHyhkaWTbBiU=&emci=eed75186-9269-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=212db59d-3a6a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=23483442) | Peter, Earlier this week, we asked what you think Congress should be focusing on right now. **We got a FLOOD of responses, but we’re still missing yours! Can you take a minute to complete our Priority Issue survey?** [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112182368/559667773/1927629176?contactdata=PggjbY6f0SnQnoUDSaNz/xl5PE1n5mjvjoXu+ii2NyiM3IaK9Zj0+FQOuZSCjPHsvOrhpWeKfjifNnKWlgoCQAa6liu/Szxq+Eba8N2fs1KRpreugb0RMB/bcrKaDPcZP63fuhXfBCvG4vReCCcNq4KORHKfn9eVgKWUpySOzMM=&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.07.26_SurveyFollowup_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTJkYjU5ZC0zYTZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZkVRswKe1-pQmFCWM0syDDrQFzQiV5HJHyhkaWTbBiU=&emci=eed75186-9269-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=212db59d-3a6a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=23483442) We’ve found common themes in the responses we’ve received so far: **Medicaid and the Big Bad Bill** _I am very afraid of the impact of SNAP and Medicaid cuts in our community. Food insecurity is already a huge problem, and I don’t see how local donations will be able to bridge the gap._
— Supporter in Bainbridge Island _I hate the new 'Big Beautiful Bill' that Congress passed. I know Emily did everything she could to stop it, but I find it unforgivable that the republicans are willing to support tax cuts for the rich while cutting funding and programs for the poor._
— Supporter in Port Hadlock **The actions of ICE** _Stop Trump's illegal immigration actions. No more picking people up, wearing masks, and sending them off to other countries. So illegal. So terrible!_
— Supporter in Gig Harbor _ICE should not be allowed to wear masks or arrest persons without proper identification._
— Supporter in Cosmopolis **The climate crisis** _Depoliticize climate change and restore funding for alternative energy, conservation, climate science, and disaster response. This should not be partisan. Why does the GOP keep their head in the sand? Fossil Fool money?_
— Supporter in Port Angeles _The world is burning/flooding/drying up. Without a healthy planet, all the politics in the world will be moot. These silly things, like renaming buildings, distract from the big issues._
— Supporter in Port Orchard **Taking on Trump and the GOP** _Republicans in Congress have conceded their authority to Trump to evade responsibility. I understand their fear of primary challenges, but if they don’t want to do the job, they should find another job._
— Supporter in Tacoma _Democrats need to be less mannerly. I'm tired of taking the high road and losing._
— Supporter in Port Angeles _Too many elected Dems have weak voices or none. Holding back until the midterms is a bad plan. Democracy is falling. Please be strong. We need you!_
— Supporter in Seattle _Use every technique and tool necessary to move our country back to a democracy. No more playing by 200-year-old rules. You must learn how to fight the fight effectively so that democracy endures._
— Supporter in Poulsbo **Those are the issues some of your neighbors are concerned about – how about you? ** [_**Please take a minute to take the survey and let us know what you think Congress should focus on right now → **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112182370/559667775/1927629176?contactdata=PggjbY6f0SnQnoUDSaNz/xl5PE1n5mjvjoXu+ii2NyiM3IaK9Zj0+FQOuZSCjPHsvOrhpWeKfjifNnKWlgoCQAa6liu/Szxq+Eba8N2fs1KRpreugb0RMB/bcrKaDPcZP63fuhXfBCvG4vReCCcNq4KORHKfn9eVgKWUpySOzMM=&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.07.26_SurveyFollowup_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTJkYjU5ZC0zYTZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZkVRswKe1-pQmFCWM0syDDrQFzQiV5HJHyhkaWTbBiU=&emci=eed75186-9269-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=212db59d-3a6a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=23483442) Our team really appreciates your feedback. Thank you so much! – Emily Randall for Congress

Lately, it feels like we're being pulled in a million directions: • There’s the Big Bad Bill, the Big Betrayal, the Big S****y Bill — whatever name you give it, it will have a devastating effect on our health care system, especially rural hospitals that rely on Medicaid funding. • There’s the continuing corruption and abuse of power in the Trump administration. I’ve been investigating Elon Musk’s conflicts of interest at the Department of Transportation. • And there’s ICE sending masked agents into our communities to arrest our neighbors with no due process and the SHAMEFUL conditions at detention centers like “Alligator Alcatraz.” **Those are a few of the things at the top of my mind this week — but what about you? ** [_**Please take a minute to fill out our July Issue Survey. clean_body: Reading through hundreds of responses to our July Priority Issues Survey. | Peter, Earlier this week, we asked what you think Congress should be focusing on right now. We got a FLOOD of responses, but we’re still missing yours! Can you take a minute to complete our Priority Issue survey? We’ve found common themes in the responses we’ve received so far: Medicaid and the Big Bad Bill I am very afraid of the impact of SNAP and Medicaid cuts in our community. Food insecurity is already a huge problem, and I don’t see how local donations will be able to bridge the gap. — Supporter in Bainbridge Island I hate the new 'Big Beautiful Bill' that Congress passed. I know Emily did everything she could to stop it, but I find it unforgivable that the republicans are willing to support tax cuts for the rich while cutting funding and programs for the poor. — Supporter in Port Hadlock The actions of ICE Stop Trump's illegal immigration actions. No more picking people up, wearing masks, and sending them off to other countries. So illegal. So terrible! — Supporter in Gig Harbor ICE should not be allowed to wear masks or arrest persons without proper identification. — Supporter in Cosmopolis The climate crisis Depoliticize climate change and restore funding for alternative energy, conservation, climate science, and disaster response. This should not be partisan. Why does the GOP keep their head in the sand? Fossil Fool money? — Supporter in Port Angeles The world is burning/flooding/drying up. Without a healthy planet, all the politics in the world will be moot. These silly things, like renaming buildings, distract from the big issues. — Supporter in Port Orchard Taking on Trump and the GOP Republicans in Congress have conceded their authority to Trump to evade responsibility. I understand their fear of primary challenges, but if they don’t want to do the job, they should find another job. — Supporter in Tacoma Democrats need to be less mannerly. I'm tired of taking the high road and losing. — Supporter in Port Angeles Too many elected Dems have weak voices or none. Holding back until the midterms is a bad plan. Democracy is falling. Please be strong. We need you! — Supporter in Seattle Use every technique and tool necessary to move our country back to a democracy. No more playing by 200-year-old rules. You must learn how to fight the fight effectively so that democracy endures. — Supporter in Poulsbo Those are the issues some of your neighbors are concerned about – how about you? Our team really appreciates your feedback. Thank you so much! – Emily Randall for Congress PREVIOUS EMAIL: Hi Peter, it’s Emily — and today, I’m asking for your opinion. YES, we read these responses, and YES, they are extremely helpful as we plan our strategy for the rest of the year, both inside and outside Congress. I’ve had hundreds of conversations with folks across Washington’s 6th District. Lately, it feels like we're being pulled in a million directions: • There’s the Big Bad Bill, the Big Betrayal, the Big Sy Bill — whatever name you give it, it will have a devastating effect on our health care system, especially rural hospitals that rely on Medicaid funding. • There’s the continuing corruption and abuse of power in the Trump administration. I’ve been investigating Elon Musk’s conflicts of interest at the Department of Transportation. • And there’s ICE sending masked agents into our communities to arrest our neighbors with no due process and the SHAMEFUL conditions at detention centers like “Alligator Alcatraz.” Those are a few of the things at the top of my mind this week — but what about you? ** I appreciate you taking the time to read this email. Sincerely, — Emily = | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. # [Idaho has a DOGE Committee?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=169313607&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5MzEzNjA3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTM1NDY1NDYsImV4cCI6MTc1NjEzODU0NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIxMTQ4MjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.bQyCMZrvGsnrRWGtkgJK64th8JnEhTha1N9KLmXgo7s)
### I have mixed feelings.
| | [Brian Lenney - Nampa's Senator](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)
---
| Jul 26
---
| [](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=169313607&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5MzEzNjA3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MzU0NjU0NiwiZXhwIjoxNzU2MTM4NTQ2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjExNDgyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.7OvZxofoD9VkwzBiCDsCBBxW0O6LqPdFh0WLZ-3y2AE&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/brianlenney/p/idaho-has-a-doge-committee?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

I tend to side with the whiners and detractors on [Idaho's new DOGE (Department of Government Efficiecny) committee](https://substack.com/redirect/c0c93bbd-6ea6-4c79-99fb-0defed8dfe2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
It feels like a publicity stunt, and I'm skeptical it'll deliver.
I mean, we have a FINANCE committee after all (aka [JFAC](https://substack.com/redirect/06c7a080-fad3-4c19-9e14-ae07ae719683?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)). Why don't they spend more time digging in and slashing (we know why)?
But...
"Let's not rush to judgment!"_ <-(this is me talking to myself)_
Because we also had the same level of angst directed at Idaho's DEI Committee that met in 2024/2025.
Remember the [DEI committee](https://substack.com/redirect/9c89223d-da70-4378-98f0-92dbb6f32976?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (made up of Idaho legislators)?
The same whiners called it a waste of time, yet its findings led to [a bill that eliminated DEI indoctrination in higher education](https://substack.com/redirect/27233ecb-9592-4317-bfdf-215124169c36?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)!
_**Yes, in 2025, a bill produced by the DEI Committee was passed into law, and we killed mandatory DEI discrimination in Idaho higher ed!**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/270d030f-c11d-4861-a876-c043ec9f3620?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
My point?
_**The DEI committee proved its worth.**_
Now, the DOGE committee might fail, or it might produce something valuable, but let's keep our powder dry and see what happens.
Cheers,
Brian
**P.S.** you can **[submit your ideas to the DOGE Committee here](https://substack.com/redirect/27a400cf-7f22-4832-9e38-a531abb3457d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
I did.
One of them is a suggestion to defund [the socialist Idaho LAUNCH program](https://substack.com/redirect/0528c5d1-831c-4b37-9802-ffd10d905cf4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
The other is to end the $500,000+ a year [Idaho Commission on Hispanic Affairs](https://substack.com/redirect/6af46ccd-ba3e-4116-8079-9dba018b06db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (their website screams irrelevance).
Check them out:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/86b5f6c4-6743-4978-9110-e7bbccd621c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/17b5931b-3500-48f2-9dd7-83811ad77896?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**» [Submit your idea to Idaho DOGE here](https://substack.com/redirect/27a400cf-7f22-4832-9e38-a531abb3457d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

name: The New York Sun
subject: Times v. Sun l David v. Goliath
body:
The Times has betrayed its readers

| | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=71a512d5670e4c6f9b1f82970d382992&_e=iW3zB1aXccFEr7s9BkMFvy-n7n5dqgsvlxxOMsIZwlNWkZnkPrQvyrlFKap3fbl15M4StNksGPzShBDrJJYYqXwl-LWa0lp3l7w6VkTRnTY8FIVW5nzkjm6p8WrPF3Arja1Qb46lAmlEJzfHlD3ezsdmsQzPFR_2-q7fmv6XhSymZGC_ZgrESf-VgEll2et-OnpqdzzlJEQjwZRs_lAw_1kcqOEIDs5V8kH4QD4NN98sTrLJRmOxRsIO6sivOJ-1uZ62dYm_CA0syIBXHwur8hoWrUJlyt_lwd0zEeD7sa8N3GZIUsKkVuOyKaJl7B0znpfN9MV3-Dz2N1YlFqyBtULRx3S_rSVGGJ7zeL8IYEeiLjTb67BpKvomsHBPY8KrPbkXpAYWzwUbOdHg810q4i6Jd800pSwvA0yf5ssrGqftCYmI2is8oGPqKz7r-r4KP2sZ_raB0d-Z__sbgfr1gc6OLu29YW_20Rp7HHGyuqrpEZs7UhGYOJuOE3cJSmooclk310pEFAgWjJFHN6lSnQPvrom7G3L9Ud71NHrUgEnGKWvUs92S6b6sX_X8-e4a7Zh5ydKJxIvRfmwzkWpJXN6XKu7Y1qlQtSLuwalZvO0%3D)
---
|
---
| | Peter,It wasn't so long ago that The New York Times was upheld as the gold standard in journalism. Today, many Americans feel the paper has betrayed its readers.

Now, enthusiasm is growing over The New York Sun returning to its historic role as a counterweight to the Times. We've heard a lot of frustration over the widening gulf between what the Times claims to be and what it is in reality.

Fellow American,

The radical left already made their move in North Texas — not long ago, ****3,000 activists packed into Dickies Arena and rallied behind Socialists Bernie Sanders, Robert Francis “Beto” O’Rourke, and Greg Casar.****

Their mission? FLIP this seat and turn Texas blue for good.

**I’m their top target — because I represent one of the most competitive districts in the state. And they know if they can take me down, they’ll have the momentum to do it everywhere.**

[**Support Beth →**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a8f29d5d2c644327866eb7a78afaadd8&_e=Dm7K8U9LxDfMhYIE0oWBym_I0nPz521PlvAF3YwcXdeJwhc1wWScW0eGLj1JgRosaOtgzbbVwBDK67ukGJp3mThuuwW2PEeLdp4vdmu9S0UzfCe-BlWzbwe2Y4TEbCbOr-unpI_TaZXusz6ShGct4TMfhEwJffxfrNkLt_lq6YaSl9cZqa8zmOmuC02JxGL7LIds80aotPNm204pFYARnV93_Xq-XMlaXXkGQCg1g5XsX87vyOV5FZYy8yVzj1QEQDHoS4XUH7GWs0ZRmp8YJOOAnA5aiGhiw7WPFV7jICCwwFk8igyj45CYLbigfxMsDS1ycieqX-NFs802ylT-lstnZz7onjjkJAKDgpv5m5wh_E_jgNiCNA7sSNKIKsnVkzOt68fAPU0BGGgh8NUUZAFOJb95UOrjFjxe5-BK5Kg2fmMQEQa1rB6fqI3F1jxnMnC4nl7FMetu5suFilTKZKRkzUc--c8hC58HLKRihSWa6zwNl7u_q8Csye19KSDYqmBnaerv6c1VlxvibqGl9LGHwgltQjz1HngwYbjjQ037dEhwC9HlEVMH0gZPxdA_AsfkRDxrCwpSwQJoPeIENBzep4VoUHYGnPkCHF5hlihqtuOFMSM6qPB1DjZiJl0kA7ytVDsvjygf7efH77jINhOOvenJRIth4TldUeI7XArK29tx0O8bi1kTlOBHKX7I8UMAdnQyEPScD-jV3742_7BPLLboAu07ByeippGGLQ35QZ78wP926LCfr0PGE0zu)
They’re not slowing down. The Bernie-Beto-Casar machine is building a war chest, organizing on the ground, and testing the waters for a full-blown takeover.

This isn’t just about my race. It’s about stopping the far-left agenda that’s trying to destroy our energy economy, erase our borders, and rewrite what it means to be American.

**I won’t mince words, fellow American – I need your help.**

[**Can you chip in $25, $50, or even $100 to help me hold the line in Texas?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a8f29d5d2c644327866eb7a78afaadd8&_e=Dm7K8U9LxDfMhYIE0oWBym_I0nPz521PlvAF3YwcXdeJwhc1wWScW0eGLj1JgRosaOtgzbbVwBDK67ukGJp3mThuuwW2PEeLdp4vdmu9S0UzfCe-BlWzbwe2Y4TEbCbOr-unpI_TaZXusz6ShGct4TMfhEwJffxfrNkLt_lq6YaSl9cZqa8zmOmuC02JxGL7LIds80aotPNm204pFYARnV93_Xq-XMlaXXkGQCg1g5XsX87vyOV5FZYy8yVzj1QEQDHoS4XUH7GWs0ZRmp8YJE6JU8lcAz0kDGVQcv8ZYTD6PAwVUMUID4AyPXB_rlSnC1Hr3SqaLh9OfgVV3OBdtltthFkhQWCDIGPphJiRX5F8KhowGvSCNZGwM-NEB4l9f0gtgu89rtZQ52CRJd_bF4ynbmo17Q-g4UNxR6IVdT1BmNSDgQSynds-LnD6n0rjW0OfpWsb03uy4w716yDLgrCo-2JtsuFMJ-i_RArjjqHPEhG7NSef8PbdmwQqFQtOlRwtXzAu6puPNFG9FNnv0hVdAM-0a4sgwnSt4HCY90nk6JslYaoFbI6ZfTh0joanZNCRplrWHR9ReJDq-499ul4ZsYGHwF9V3bvbhlUB011WMAiqCh8dEPa401QhCuxkiPzLWvddNApFSo1_oDL9wUeHKMbSDM2JdXOLmQYDTmgsKx-q69rG_IffXQzRe5k9Pce8QxEtpiHBwAx9Hhy5tdqMZQD7UHrn9GZiSqhp2xWeephlOlARC5mMn5WUyR5p)

Democrats are already pouring millions into districts like mine. They’re convinced they can buy their way back into power — and they’re targeting this district as a key pickup.

We’re not waiting around.

_**We draw the line right here in Texas.**_

And we draw it _today_.

**Beth Van Duyne**

**GET TO KNOW BETH:
** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world.

Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration?

**Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress.**

She's been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country.

**Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law** who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans.

clean_body: I’m their top target — because I represent one of the most competitive districts in the state. | Fellow American, The radical left already made their move in North Texas — not long ago, **3,000 activists packed into Dickies Arena and rallied behind Socialists Bernie Sanders, Robert Francis “Beto” O’Rourke, and Greg Casar. Their mission? FLIP this seat and turn Texas blue for good. I’m their top target — because I represent one of the most competitive districts in the state. And they know if they can take me down, they’ll have the momentum to do it everywhere. They’re not slowing down. The Bernie-Beto-Casar machine is building a war chest, organizing on the ground, and testing the waters for a full-blown takeover. This isn’t just about my race. It’s about stopping the far-left agenda that’s trying to destroy our energy economy, erase our borders, and rewrite what it means to be American. I won’t mince words, fellow American – I need your help. Democrats are already pouring millions into districts like mine. They’re convinced they can buy their way back into power — and they’re targeting this district as a key pickup. We’re not waiting around. We draw the line right here in Texas. And we draw it today. Beth Van Duyne GET TO KNOW BETH: | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world. Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration? Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress. She's been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country. Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law** who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans. | PAID FOR BY BETH VAN DUYNE FOR CONGRESS

name: Center for American Liberty
subject: Safeguard vulnerable children
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11436581/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvTkdlcDg5ZDRwMg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MjY/LbmNsUEVYSUdxbQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNLS2tTb0xtdDhZNU1scw/gaIUBIg/seif8e186ae)
|
---
| |
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Dear Friend, The Center for American Liberty just filed a critical brief in our landmark **Regino v. Staley** case. Because we refuse to allow government bureaucrats to strip parents of their rights to raise their kids as they see fit. Our lawsuit is fighting to stop California’s totally unconstitutional “Parental Secrecy Policy” that keeps parents in the dark regarding their children’s mental health. Under this Parental Secrecy Policy, the Chico Unified School District “socially transitioned” a vulnerable 11-year-old girl and then hid it from the girl’s mother Aurora Regino. The school gave this 5th grade girl a boy’s name, boy pronouns, and a male identity at school... ...without even calling the girl’s mom! Which is why the Center for American Liberty is fighting the school district in court. But Chico Unified School District doesn’t want to face the consequences of its actions. **Instead, they’ve tried to dismiss our lawsuit.** That’s why we’ve filed this critical legal brief reaffirming:
---
* Parents have a constitutional right to consent to critical decisions about their children’s health, identity, and upbringing.
* School policies that socially transition children behind parents’ backs violate basic family integrity and due process rights.
* The policy’s secrecy mandate wrongly assumes parents will harm their children just because they assert a transgender identity

---
This policy isn’t just unconstitutional...**it’s dangerous.** And we won’t back down until the “Parental Secrecy Policy” is permanently stopped. [**Will you send in an emergency gift as we battle for the rights of parents to raise their children without government overreach?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Every dollar you send will be used to protect the rights of parents and safeguard vulnerable children. Thank you for standing up for our American values.
---
| | SIncerely,
---
| | **Mark Trammell** CEO, Center for American Liberty
