name: Bo Mitchell
subject: Our health care system failed my family. Now it’s failing millions more people.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bo Mitchell for Congress
body:
It doesn’t have to be like this.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112183605/559672596/1330170104?refcode=BM_ATA_EM_FR_Healthcare_250726_all_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkyNTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2E0OGIyZTctM2M2YS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eBL4a-u1AGieG3W1VRjFNRKIHSG8C2G7wQr6i-625fQ=)

| | Peter,

I’d like to tell you about my dad, and why I didn’t have health care coverage for half my childhood—and why [_**I’m running for Congress so that other families don’t have to face that same reality.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112183606/559672609/-1616459761?refcode=BM_ATA_EM_FR_Healthcare_250726_all_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkyNTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2E0OGIyZTctM2M2YS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eBL4a-u1AGieG3W1VRjFNRKIHSG8C2G7wQr6i-625fQ=)

My dad worked for himself, as a drywall finisher. He was the only income for the family. When I was young, he had a massive heart attack that required triple bypass surgery. He was 39, with three small kids at home. He was lucky—he survived. But he needed several months to recover.

Because of that heart attack, the health insurance company raised our premiums so high that we couldn’t afford to pay them, and we lost our health insurance coverage. I didn’t have health care coverage from the time I was 10 until I turned 19, when I started working at a doctor’s office. I learned to get by without going to a doctor. If you broke a couple of fingers playing backyard football, you wrapped them up with popsicle sticks and kept on going.

**I don’t want that to be the reality for other families—because everyone deserves to be able to go to the doctor, to take their kids to the doctor, and to get the health care that they need.**

But thanks to the Republican majorities in Congress, it’s about to be the reality for even more Tennessee families. New cuts to Medicaid in the massive GOP spending bill are expected to kick nearly 300,000 Tennesseans off of their health care, all to pay for tax cuts for the most wealthy. This bill will literally cost lives.

_I know that we deserve better._ We deserve a representative in Congress who will fight to make sure that everyone can access affordable health care when they need it, that families can afford to put food on the table, and that our communities can thrive. **I’m running to be that representative.**

[_**I’m asking you to stand with me because this is our moment to seize. Republicans in Congress are determined to take us backwards—let’s show them that we’re not backing down. Please, chip in to my campaign for Congress today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112183607/559672624/-1616459761?refcode=BM_ATA_EM_FR_Healthcare_250726_all_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkyNTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2E0OGIyZTctM2M2YS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eBL4a-u1AGieG3W1VRjFNRKIHSG8C2G7wQr6i-625fQ=)

clean_body: It doesn’t have to be like this. | = | | Peter, I’d like to tell you about my dad, and why I didn’t have health care coverage for half my childhood—and why = My dad worked for himself, as a drywall finisher. He was the only income for the family. When I was young, he had a massive heart attack that required triple bypass surgery. He was 39, with three small kids at home. He was lucky—he survived. But he needed several months to recover. Because of that heart attack, the health insurance company raised our premiums so high that we couldn’t afford to pay them, and we lost our health insurance coverage. I didn’t have health care coverage from the time I was 10 until I turned 19, when I started working at a doctor’s office. I learned to get by without going to a doctor. If you broke a couple of fingers playing backyard football, you wrapped them up with popsicle sticks and kept on going. I don’t want that to be the reality for other families—because everyone deserves to be able to go to the doctor, to take their kids to the doctor, and to get the health care that they need. But thanks to the Republican majorities in Congress, it’s about to be the reality for even more Tennessee families. New cuts to Medicaid in the massive GOP spending bill are expected to kick nearly 300,000 Tennesseans off of their health care, all to pay for tax cuts for the most wealthy. This bill will literally cost lives. I know that we deserve better. We deserve a representative in Congress who will fight to make sure that everyone can access affordable health care when they need it, that families can afford to put food on the table, and that our communities can thrive. I’m running to be that representative. = Thanks so much for being on this team— Bo Mitchell **= | | Click here to . | Paid for by Bo Mitchell for Congress

name: Hillsdale College via Victory Mailings
subject: The debt we owe America’s Founders
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj206q1hr6ge6c88yrwln68exrbzb353fr1x8naty9w5fel6ct2ke4t7lvjndh1fyo86wjg7htc7zxlzwov1z&__stmp=t00lvg&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t00lvg&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1ra0vug6gtajijxg2xpiz0p5o9nxxy0sesdh2dnl43lgtrcdsdn50eqpunyyfcgq7t0e163hcexaj6esxa25xbhvtuelt0c6vj09vby6dizj4nln4czflnnrzwf0594qfmllc2dg57&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t00lvg&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t00lvg&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t00lvg&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t00lvg&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1ra0vug6gtajijxg2xpiz0p5o9nxxy0sesdh2dnl43lgtrcdsdn50eqpunyyfcgq7t0e163hcexaj6esxa25xbhvtuelt0c6vj09vby6dizj4nln4czflnnrzwf0594qfmllc2dg57&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t00lvg&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t00lvg&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Dan Carr
subject: Psalm 23 - Devotional
body:
God's Leadership in Uncertain Times

| |
---|---|---
|
# Psalm 23 - Devotional
### God's Leadership in Uncertain Times
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
| Jul 26
---
| [](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
In a time when America faces deep moral confusion, economic turmoil, and cultural division, the words of **Psalm 23** remind us of something eternal: **God is still in control.** David's Psalm is not just a poetic comfort--it is a call to trust the Good Shepherd in all seasons, even in times of national crisis.
"The LORD is my shepherd; I shall not want." -- _Psalm 23:1_
**1\. The Lord Is My Shepherd - A Declaration of Allegiance**
David opens with a statement that every Christian should echo: _" The LORD is my shepherd."_ It is a personal, bold declaration of allegiance. In an age of misplaced loyalties--to political parties, media pundits, and personalities--Psalm 23 brings us back to the One worthy of our ultimate trust: the Lord.
In Hebrew culture, a shepherd wasn't just a caretaker--he was a warrior, a guide, and a protector. By declaring the Lord as our Shepherd, we're choosing to be led by **His voice** above all others.
[Click This Link To Finish Reading Article:](https://substack.com/redirect/01616d57-6b79-4f84-b237-166cbd430950?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Here's who's paying the price for Trump's billionaire tax breaks:
* More than 70 million Americans who rely on Medicaid
* The 2.1 million patients who depend on Planned Parenthood for reproductive health care
* Rural communities who count on public broadcasting for news and safety alerts

Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies promised to put America first. But this budget is _an all-out attack on women, families, and vulnerable communities._

We can't change what they've done, but we can make them regret it at the ballot box.

Democratic pro-choice women, up and down the ballot, will continue to expose Republicans' cruelty towards the American people, and send an unmistakable message to the GOP that their days in power are numbered.

name: Georgia Democrats
subject: Jon Ossoff’s seat is the GOP’s #1 target
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia

| | Hey Reader, I got you a gift for you... Something to help protect you and your family while you’re on the road. And you’re going to want this, especially if you travel with your CCW. Because you don’t want to go to court with nothing but a story... you need solid, indisputable evidence...
**[Which is why I’m giving away 500 of my new Dash Eagle cameras at below wholesale cost](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21681/6374453/3667af5e787300c9d3d2aa093f0bbeee2aa75c32/0b67c4f8c91ae1e551958ea4cf126ed28fc075a6)** Every time you hit the road, you’ll have an HD dashboard camera to record everything that happens on the road, and inside your vehicle... So if you get in an accident, an altercation, or if you get pulled over by the police... You’ll be able to **record every second** with crystal clear video and audio... And you’ll never have to worry about not having any proof to back your case in court. It installs in just seconds and you can charge it in your car while simultaneously recording... But like I said... [We’re only giving away 500 Dash Eagles for 80% OFF...](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21681/6374453/3667af5e787300c9d3d2aa093f0bbeee2aa75c32/0b67c4f8c91ae1e551958ea4cf126ed28fc075a6) And it’s first come, first served... Oh yeah, did I mention that I’m giving you free shipping? I’m positive these won’t last long, so claim yours before they run out...

name: Chris Ahuja
subject: Honoring 34 Years of the ADA: A Legacy of Action and Progress
body:
We honor the ADA by continuing its mission

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=65e33d1894&e=5a6ee82cdb)
| | | | | [Donate](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=0aee19b0f0&e=5a6ee82cdb)
---
| **Dear Peter,****Today marks the 34th anniversary of the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA)**. On July 26, 1990, disabled activists literally **crawled up the steps of the U.S. Capitol** —the “**Capitol Crawl”** —in a powerful moment that forever changed equity and access in America..**The ADA reshaped our public spaces. Because of it, we have:**
* **Curb cuts and ramps** that make sidewalks and streets usable for everyone
* **Accessible public transit**
* **Workplace accommodations** that recognize dignity
* **Accessible voting and public buildings**

**The ADA’s legacy is monumental but unfinished.** People with disabilities are still blocked by costs, bureaucracy, and neglect. We still need:
* **Fully funded Home and Community-Based Services (HCBS)** so people can live with independence and dignity—not be on years-long waitlists.
* **Investments in truly inclusive, affordable, and reliable transit** so mobility isn’t rationed by zip code or income.
* **Guaranteed digital accessibility** across government and public services so no one is locked out of essential information, benefits, or participation.

**I’m running for Congress because I believe in an America that understands disability as part of our human fabric.** We must design our systems accordingly so that equity, inclusion, and care are not afterthoughts, but the plan.**The ADA was a milestone of courage and collective power**. **Our job is to carry that power forward** —to continue what was started on those Capitol steps and build a country where everyone participates fully and thrives.**That’s the leadership I’m committed to bringing to Washington.****Let’s Go!****Chris Ahuja** **Democratic Candidate for Congress, CD-32**

---

name: Schrier HQ
subject: No one asked for this, but Republicans did it anyway.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112185286/559678450/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjAwZTNmOS00MTZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ykO2dxAkxRyCASlqI7TVp8IcDI7eVGpqTjwb5UiuRKY=&emci=c153e88f-7469-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=4600e3f9-416a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

House Republicans just passed a rescissions package that includes devastating cuts to public broadcasting. But here’s what that _really_ means for our local community:
* **Stations like KUOW and Northwest Public Broadcasting could lose millions**
* **Local stations in places like Port Townsend and Spokane might have to cut staff or even shut down news coverage**
* **People could lose access to emergency alerts, weather info, and trusted reporting**
* **Classrooms might lose educational programming teachers use every day**

Republicans are portraying this as a tidy little cut to help _“keep dollars in your pockets.”_

But what they’re really doing is gutting something that so many of us rely on. These stations aren’t just “nice to have.” They’re part of the backbone of our communities, and they help people stay informed, connected, and prepared.

If that’s “wasted dollars,” then Republicans really do have it all backwards. No one asked for this. But once again, Republicans are showing us just how out of touch they are with the American people. This is yet another reminder that this GOP-controlled House isn’t working for the people. **That's why we need to do everything we can to flip it and take back our Democratic majority in 2026.**

[**Can you pitch in to help us fight back and elect Democrats who actually listen? subject: A right-wing Super PAC just launched a massive $5 million ad buy attacking me

Hey folks, it’s Jon. This just in: A right-wing Super PAC just launched a massive **__$5 million__** ad buy attacking me. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112185635/559679482/638162750?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.07.26_Ossoff-Ads_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWE4YTY0Mi00MjZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ADFbrySO8x3MT_3JKIPS8f-M1vRDTM0ETDJUYHnXIRw=) If you already know the stakes of this race — and you’re ready to fight — please use this link to split a contribution between my re-election campaign and Lisa Blunt Rochester today: **_[https://lbr4senate.com/ossoff-2025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112185636/559679510/638162750?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.07.26_Ossoff-Ads_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWE4YTY0Mi00MjZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ADFbrySO8x3MT_3JKIPS8f-M1vRDTM0ETDJUYHnXIRw=)_** Otherwise, here’s why your support is so important to my campaign, especially today. This new wave of attack ads is only just the beginning. In the months ahead, Republicans are going to spare no expense and try every dirty trick in the book to defeat me. Because if they win here in Georgia, they don’t just expand their Senate majority — _they lock it in for the long-term._ With that power, Trump’s last constraints in the Senate vanish. What’s left is total submission. No oversight. No brakes on extremist nominees. No guardrails when he comes for the rule of law. So all eyes are on our race here in Georgia — and the entire country is counting on us, not only to hold the line, but also to send a clear message: Americans won’t stand by while this administration dismantles Medicaid and defunds hospitals and nursing homes. We won’t stand down while they violate fundamental human and civil rights. And we won’t be silent as Trump launches a power grab unprecedented in our history. I will fight, and I will win. But I can’t do it alone. name: Eli
subject: I am asking, with all humility
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Crane for Congress
body:
I get it - you’re tired of politicians...
I understand, Patriot.
I know you're tired of politicians emailing you asking for money, and I don't blame you. With inflation still being reeled in, every dollar counts.
But let me tell you, **this is different.**
My name is Eli Crane, and I'm a pro-Trump Navy SEAL Conservative warrior from Arizona. I've been on the front lines, fighting for our country in 5 war-time deployments.
I'm not afraid to take a stand: _I've always proudly championed Trump's America First agenda, I'm for a secure border, I'm for election integrity, and I'm for protecting our kids from woke indoctrination._
Democrats hate me, and the Establishment Republicans aren't too fond of me either. That's why they're throwing everything they've got at me - **a whopping $50 MILLION war chest** to take me down in 2026.
But I'm not backing down. I'm a Navy SEAL, and we don't give up. **_[That's why I'm asking you, with all humility, to chip in a few bucks before my critical fundraising deadline.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b678bdf6d7f24095a197d6b349f92ce0&_e=OvnE5stKO83K6YTNNKuy-TDmKoKL4_M2Wbf3LfTALXEB1qu64UXs1NDBfdblIgVo-6bc-nM0hbiF77S0qJh7qdKUJPHDOfZUWVpVIz0_QG6lUlPC6BotgvSUmkHrt8zMSElE-e9_xg-jr-QJ575pLrldoYtdbhYYvA5_e4dU6NIcLSEuzQVF0HQMIAsPuUtC9NSLpG2DgdJJ-DexDmc_N6qlGrs8x42Ho7umR0RU1pZqJF87CwUDgnddr4-WVvjh24KfVkqtbeCv_R5QC_uZf9yfNmdPRgkaFEzJWMZarO-uGYLJTFltMHx1pi_fUMNKOiAnukAtiu4bdMOAFnXQRQpS77cuuYv0G5C7gl8757oO4tDu-c9czB99W7jzlRFWa4YeFYaXwS6MlEK6IH2Ab8nWiwHO_k80Po4i9b7-aCqQTz0pJwsZNyP0zyqcWsegMesGnjDIMfvuAazEI_UsRPqqfJqLYoDU6FbXDWewho_dOy4FyT8aYJLEBN4qq9rSJYH_sJcZpYk_wSixu8thCTtoG9fktxvpTBm2vQvQJPzeNjPKqFNcv4Srr09WfgmzNKRtCZlIUPgefXg_TJgN_5rc6wRfrAVUEtSo2twqAcgBBgFIH_BWN2bE9EcRJ2SdIO5JwBo7Ah1f2HQX5wyX8ows-Jrt7Em3bZQL65Z9EYZ3QBGfq2sShtOjj4zIrQyBdbGlbTeb2NEn7tBz2JIP396M95_gytpdKWmkTyOiKkc9lREtMMgPG8LgYvZCGIB8tpSOARcC7FcFuLbNpALylZSNkIlAABQkUatIq0LOCmo%3D)_**
I know times are still tough, and if you can't afford to give, I understand. But I'm counting on patriots like you to help me take on the Establishment and the radical Left. My candidacy is in your hands.
**__**[DONATE NOW >>](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b678bdf6d7f24095a197d6b349f92ce0&_e=OvnE5stKO83K6YTNNKuy-TDmKoKL4_M2Wbf3LfTALXEB1qu64UXs1NDBfdblIgVo-6bc-nM0hbiF77S0qJh7qdKUJPHDOfZUWVpVIz0_QG6lUlPC6BotgvSUmkHrt8zMSElE-e9_xg-jr-QJ575pLrldoYtdbhYYvA5_e4dU6NIcLSEuzQVF0HQMIAsPuUtC9NSLpG2DgdJJ-DexDmc_N6qlGrs8x42Ho7umR0RU1pZqJF87CwUDgnddr4-WVvjh24KfVkqtbeCv_R5QC_uZf9yfNmdPRgkaFEzJWMZarO97CZwEzcu3FAtxUMRylUFRQ0zgLmTiykA1kZhOr9Ui6epu6TN8Gg_HYnlf3-u2U4NEPFBpFclsplQl7UN2CLpJe8bk1838JU_hzDTaw8cKYTAjWjUthFTBHtxRF0jYlCbVWmUYA3Gy-BlJPRd7CT0CKK0gCqAfWP1u-YcaQ7nN2-S9hKuvoJ7yP8MYhQB7ws0SvtqxMjyX6CxuCbXrP5t62Ng3-MnmHuP6e6Kr8JEU5F7TlGDJm9W9D1XayLOfSZ2RcN-5KMHWWSFdomV-EvW2KsSPlJPjeDQ_EdCwBQUbu1G97sO5KatnBG26oglhRBP8cmEBdT2W9SLcU7MtN_FPxBwVBeHmCuBUNHeAhqzYu_CS67-9kQlhnLDOmn_tk02MwgTZUjyTx7VlBtPdadNWia0EEYgI9OebUfUERErQdb7rdG9x7Jaz_lmkfmQoB1QCzhBf0UxzIEa363Y16GI_8yTYuKgSVO2gc9F6xnaE0B5DH_v0lViLTBEmC4T9eyY%3D)

clean_body: I get it - you’re tired of politicians... I understand, Patriot. I know you're tired of politicians emailing you asking for money, and I don't blame you. With inflation still being reeled in, every dollar counts. But let me tell you, this is different. My name is Eli Crane, and I'm a pro-Trump Navy SEAL Conservative warrior from Arizona. I've been on the front lines, fighting for our country in 5 war-time deployments. I'm not afraid to take a stand: I've always proudly championed Trump's America First agenda, I'm for a secure border, I'm for election integrity, and I'm for protecting our kids from woke indoctrination. Democrats hate me, and the Establishment Republicans aren't too fond of me either. That's why they're throwing everything they've got at me - a whopping $50 MILLION war chest to take me down in 2026. But I'm not backing down. I'm a Navy SEAL, and we don't give up. I know times are still tough, and if you can't afford to give, I understand. But I'm counting on patriots like you to help me take on the Establishment and the radical Left. My candidacy is in your hands. God bless you.\- Eli Crane | | To ensure that you don't miss out on important messages, please add info@email.craneforaz.com to your address book. Not Sure How? | | Hi Friend, Today marks 35 years since the Americans with Disabilities Act was signed into law — a landmark civil rights victory that finally recognized the rights and dignity of millions of disabled people across this country. I was born visually impaired, and that’s a huge part of why I ran and served as an elected member of the Bay Area Rapid Transit (BART) Board of Directors for eight years. I am unable to drive and have never driven a car, and am public transportation dependent. When people with disabilities are pushed to the margins, we allow entire systems and infrastructures to be built without them in mind, creating a world that is fundamentally inaccessible. **The ADA was a landmark victory, but it was never the finish line. We still have so far to go to ensure that disabled and elderly members of our communities have full access to the services, spaces, and dignity they deserve.** That’s why I use my voice in Congress to fight for a future where disability justice isn’t an afterthought — it’s foundational. Because true equality means no one is left behind. That means pushing for:
* **Fully funded public transit** that’s accessible to everyone
* **Health care** that includes comprehensive vision, hearing, mental health care, and treatment for rare diseases
* **Housing policies** that prioritize accessibility and independence
* **Workforce protections and inclusive hiring** — not just for compliance, but for justice

But I can’t do this alone. It will take a lot of grassroots support and people power to break down the barriers that stand in the way. [**Will you chip in today to help power this movement for disability rights and justice?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112186082/559681282/1626305413?&refcode=E14286-20250726-ADA-SL-Holiday&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjE0MmMwNWUtNDM2YS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Qdwpe3iGt1CS3gUA0-ZiT5-jWKfh550Ld6Ch9HcTa5E=) | [**Donate to support this work →** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112186083/559681283/1626305413?&refcode=E14286-20250726-ADA-SL-Holiday&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjE0MmMwNWUtNDM2YS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Qdwpe3iGt1CS3gUA0-ZiT5-jWKfh550Ld6Ch9HcTa5E=)
---
Thank you for being part of this journey — for believing that every person deserves dignity, opportunity, and freedom.
In solidarity,
Lateefah Simon
|

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: I’m so proud to have these endorsements
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=551%2E181023%2Ef2g-r0)
Team,
I’ve always believed that public service starts with listening and doing the hard, everyday work to improve people’s lives.
**That’s why I’m incredibly proud to share that dozens of local leaders across Michigan are endorsing our campaign for Governor.**
Michigan’s strength begins in city halls and county chambers, where mayors, commissioners, and city council members roll up their sleeves to solve problems and serve their neighbors.
Their work is the backbone of our democracy, and I’m honored to have earned the trust of these local leaders — leaders who understand that real progress begins by listening first and leading with purpose to create communities where everyone has the opportunity to thrive.
That these leaders, who represent our biggest cities and smallest towns, support our campaign means so much to me. This is a coalition of people who want to build a Michigan where every kid can grow up with opportunities, where families can thrive, and where our democracy works for _all of us._
[**If you want to be part of the team building that future, I hope you’ll consider chipping in today to help us keep growing this coalition and reaching more voters in every corner of the state.**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250726_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=551%2E181023%2Ef2g-r0)

This is one of the most dangerous attacks we’ve seen yet.
House Republicans just subpoenaed ActBlue — the backbone of our movement — and they’re trying to criminalize grassroots donations like yours.
This is a blatant attempt to silence Democratic donors ahead of 2026. And we can’t afford to let it work. Rush a donation now to defend our movement and prove we won’t be intimidated >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=072625_1]
Peter, this is it. It's happening.
House Republicans just subpoenaed ActBlue.
They’re accusing grassroots Democrats of fraud. They’re trying to paint your $5 donations as criminal. And they’re weaponizing Congress to launch an intimidation campaign against the most powerful tool we have to fight back.
This isn’t oversight. It’s a political hit job.
Republicans want to silence us before 2026. They want to scare donors, smear Democratic campaigns, and cast doubt on the infrastructure that powers our victories.
We won’t let them.
We’re launching an emergency response to show the GOP we’re not backing down. We need 5,000 donations in the next 48 hours to prove grassroots power is alive and well. **FIRST:** Deb was one of the first Native American women ever elected to Congress.
**THEN:** She became the first Native American to serve as Secretary of the Interior.
**NOW: Deb is running for Governor of New Mexico. And with your help, she could become the first Native American woman ever elected governor in the history of this country.**
**But this won’t be easy.** National Republicans are targeting New Mexico. They’re hoping to flip this open seat, flood the airwaves with attack ads, and take us backward — but with your grassroots support, we can stop them and make history again.
**[No state in America has ever elected a Native American woman as governor. If you’re with us, will you chip in $5 right now to help elect Deb and keep New Mexico blue?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250726_1_history?amount=5&refcode=em20250726-3415&refcode2=3415_400544_UCcezD&akid=3415%2E400544%2EUCcezD)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250726_1_history?amount=5&refcode=em20250726-3415&refcode2=3415_400544_UCcezD&akid=3415%2E400544%2EUCcezD)**
Deb has continued to defy the odds, but she’s never done it alone.
Thank you,
\- Team Haaland 💛
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250726-1&t=2&refcode2=3415_400544_UCcezD&akid=3415%2E400544%2EUCcezD)**

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=3415%2E400544%2EUCcezD)

name: Tristan Rader
subject: I'm running for re-election! Join us for kickoff!
body:
Fighting for universal healthcare, workers rights, and fairer taxes!

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/tristanrader/im-running-for-re-election-join-us-for-kickoff?e=869bcf0641)
---
[|
---](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=cf4fdf0c4c&e=869bcf0641)
| | | | |
# I’m running for re-election!

Join us in the fight against billionaire-backed politics and corporate super PACs trying to buy our democracy. We’re building a **grassroots movement** for working families, strong public schools, clean energy, and real democracy. [**📅 Thursday, August 21 | 5:30–7:30 PM**
**📍 One Star Bar, Lakewood**](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=22386b2c15&e=869bcf0641)
---
[|
---](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=e0028834fc&e=869bcf0641)
| [Give & Join Us!! ](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=f327181bb3&e=869bcf0641)
---
|

## Here’s why I’m running...

I have only been in office seven months, but we’re already shaping Ohio’s future. And I have learned so much.
I helped shape and pass **HB15** , finally rolling back the corrupt HB 6 energy bailout and getting Ohio closer to a path to clean, affordable energy. It’s only the beginning, but an important step in the right direction... for once!
Together with transit activist, and my statehouse colleagues, we passed a **transportation budget that funds public transit at the highest level in decades** , investing in mobility and opportunity for all.
I’ve already introduced (or will introduce in the coming days) **a dozen bills** that reflect our values including:
* **Ohio Fairness Act** – protects LGBTQ+ Ohioans from discrimination.
* **Brine Ban –** prohibits radioactive oil and gas brine from being spread on our roads.
* **Universal Healthcare Plan for Ohio** – ensuring every Ohioan can see a doctor without going broke.
* **No Hungry Families Act** – ending child hunger and improving food access.
* **Protect Lake Erie & State Parks Act** – banning oil and gas drilling under Lake Erie and in state parks.
* **Permanent Absent Voter List** – making it easier to vote by mail.
* **Property Tax Deferral Act** – allowing eligible homeowners to defer property tax payments.
* _Plus other bills advancing fairness, access, environmental protection, and fighting corporate control of our state legislature._

**We are doing more than legislating, here are some things we’ve done:**
* **I voted NO** **on the worst state budget** **in my lifetime** , and we managed to stop the worst of the veto overrides.
* **Backed fired University Hospital doctors** I believe were targeted by union-busting tactics.
* **Joined REI workers** fighting to form a union.
* **Pushed back against Governor DeWine’s** cruel work requirements for Medicaid and food assistance.
* **Opposed JobsOhio’s** 53-year contract extension that lacked oversight.
* **Fought for Ohioans** whose food stamp benefits were stolen.
* **Defended reproductive rights** , earning national attention for protecting Ohioans’ freedom.
* **Championed public education and library funding** , fighting tooth and nail for every dollar.
* **Called out billionaires like Jimmy Haslam** , who bribed his way to a $600 million payday to move the Browns out of Cleveland.
* **Took on the oil and gas industry** , opposing injection wells that pump radioactive wastewater into our communities.
* **Held a dozen public meet-and-greets and town halls** , connecting directly with residents of our district.
* **Responded to thousands of constituents’ concerns** , making sure their voices are heard in Columbus.

None of these are easy fights. **None of these fights are over.** But we are making progress, and we are just getting started.
Why do we do this? **Because Ohio needs leaders willing to stand on values and put forward a bold, hopeful vision—not just for our state, but for our country.**
For years, I’ve fought for these changes. Now, in just a few months, we’re charting a course toward a brighter future. That road will be long and difficult, and **elections matter.**
That’s why I’m running for re-election: to keep building the Ohio we all deserve.
_\- Rep. Tristan Rader_

---

name: Chris Schandevel
subject: WIN at Supreme Court for pro-life states
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj206q1hw4c8ja9mwojf9egbhoa2nqa9e9t1cjlilg5dyapkslcmqpiu5kwkjayiv1zir6aiwmeo3krtp08p6&__stmp=t00onh&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t00onh&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1ra0hf65xfwelr3ygack3y57ea8v3wc4mubvhp7k5jbxin0d1f0p1g6wzyt0z16hhjmhki3i5acobrlkfolehl79nsnjm33hkjb2w7uf9ym7g4w2rt0s1az8eg15zds4s8gvnldlti&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t00onh&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t00onh&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t00onh&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t00onh&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1ra0hf65xfwelr3ygack3y57ea8v3wc4mubvhp7k5jbxin0d1f0p1g6wzyt0z16hhjmhki3i5acobrlkfolehl79nsnjm33hkjb2w7uf9ym7g4w2rt0s1az8eg15zds4s8gvnldlti&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t00onh&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t00onh&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Saludos, it's Gabe — and right now, I’m really worried. Republican groups raised a record-breaking $60 million in just the first half of this year. That’s not a typo. **$60 million.** And because southern New Mexico is one of their top targets, you can bet a big chunk of that money is headed straight here. On top of that, we’re behind on our projection for July by over $10,000. Now’s the time when our fundraising tends to hit the “summer slump” — and if we don’t catch up before the end of the month, Republicans will get the opening they need to flip this seat red. [Will you rush $10 before Thursday at midnight to help us close the gap and stay in the game?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112186776/559684169/1449064918?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_072625_EOM1_60DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGUzMGU1OS00NjZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Abwbqko6Pk92dq5fNArp3_2F4ZlGV5jBl_JxO7UUgC8=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

We’re already seeing it start. Digital attack ads are popping up all over — twisting my words, spreading misinformation, and trying to weaken our campaign before we’ve even reached 2026.
**They’re laying the groundwork now because they know how critical this seat is to controlling the House.**
We’ve set a $10,000 end-of-month fundraising goal to stay competitive — and we have to hit it by Thursday night. If we fall short, we risk giving them a head start we won’t be able to catch up to.
We’ve always known they’d come after us. But what’s different now is the sheer scale of their war chest — and the fact that they’re already spending it. **That’s why this deadline matters so much.**
[So, will you chip in $10 before midnight on Thursday so we can meet this goal and push back against whatever they’ve got planned?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112186790/559684183/1449064918?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_072625_EOM1_60DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGUzMGU1OS00NjZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Abwbqko6Pk92dq5fNArp3_2F4ZlGV5jBl_JxO7UUgC8=)

If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Saludos, it's Gabe — and right now, I’m really worried. Republican groups raised a record-breaking $60 million in just the first half of this year. That’s not a typo. $60 million. And because southern New Mexico is one of their top targets, you can bet a big chunk of that money is headed straight here. On top of that, we’re behind on our projection for July by over $10,000. Now’s the time when our fundraising tends to hit the “summer slump” — and if we don’t catch up before the end of the month, Republicans will get the opening they need to flip this seat red. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = We’re already seeing it start. Digital attack ads are popping up all over — twisting my words, spreading misinformation, and trying to weaken our campaign before we’ve even reached 2026. They’re laying the groundwork now because they know how critical this seat is to controlling the House. We’ve set a $10,000 end-of-month fundraising goal to stay competitive — and we have to hit it by Thursday night. If we fall short, we risk giving them a head start we won’t be able to catch up to. We’ve always known they’d come after us. But what’s different now is the sheer scale of their war chest — and the fact that they’re already spending it. body:
| Peter, My opponent, Eli Crane, is terrified of our campaign's momentum. Fresh on the heels of shamefully voting against releasing the Epstein files, Crane is spiraling and can't keep my name or lies about my record out of his mouth. One of us is radical, and it's certainly not me. If I were in Congress, I would've voted for the release of the Epstein files and I would never vote to close rural hospitals to give billionaires a tax break. Crane can call me every name in the book,**_but he can 't erase the fact that he's failed to deliver on his promises time and time again. _** [**Will you support my campaign to be the first Native American representative in Congress from Arizona by chipping in whatever feels right today?**](https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/BNqFaXWp5PiSVmM6KIXG6w~~/AAPPABA~/Yzsx2c8DuTuo5rDLqQ3jULEgNg-_raU56P1Rj1eeA5vAWqVNfAmiNsRE-HjXjvTaoMzNaz5UuhdDK8Xl3bEbc19crljyNUSI72S7ndMmKsAm3ZrAO2Cv-hlWwd0AeRnExRp49GPNQQRRhPGVnt6GsJNvDoS3v16wB9vC4kV6IFDniA29xBsNh-5cP4MjjYnAeK7NM-I526C9VHadv9SrcYM8xIXtBKvcsnDcW3EldexFmpvzmVw8L2S-uQwvQvXoHM0Sj7YBORx1uO3zDLmDrhAGvCtFhf-cu2gqhY8IgmdHUP81m38WT4v7s26SPO-8BBbZXxg939ECXyG8_KANYCbGNmpNivmvkeq7mPGWrb70HPhdhLb8DsY_L1sT4ZorNnc4FvXi3SXvZLjNGrGlhQ~~)

Eli Crane also called me "out-of-touch." What's out of touch to me, is voting for a budget bill that will strip Medicaid for over 1⁄3 of our district. That's why despite his name-calling and intimidation tactics, I'm not backing down. Because I've spent my life fighting for rural Arizona, and I'm not going to stop now. And unlike Crane, I don't answer to Donald Trump -- I answer to the people. Crane may think his corporate donors will protect him, but I know that with this team on my side, we can hand him the pink slip. ** ** **[Will you donate whatever feels right today to support my campaign as work to reach every corner of this district?](https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/YYpV3QQBCmirxv6M3DEGvg~~/AAPPABA~/52xJvj3jTLrFxv9YUlyMaeO4OuFteFMMWUGJsONEmcm9QWld7IEHHfGGy0ygSOLwipuVKTiY0gkI_-O_fDZUGbF7RvN7hUnWneFnzjWywJ0h7Tig9MSr6LP5go11txv501ICjiCLKc1i6RfSiuENdJ2Gw8thWTgjkbYd8iWhY4PCLBzPzV2o5UETYtYv1IkVN0RNST0_hjktU9Byi1GqK6Ty14D38d3yBdgKFeiDQHlekRqa6sDxJFogyRb2IFY7vngaHq62BdBGR4xMJnDGyZ98ZCok8oHT3FzKgNbPVy3I0mtmEWCaXdmip4NmgMOCK7tEJiRq0-hCC75Yrzk4eigDIejxcrruvSlHtvi9jyQsmhld9GJihqgKxOhvxSMiVU8eL5_uhFvtiKvAng1JQrNlzbJnlUe09KhIns4stgP0dbbRVJOLIXt1xGiObxO1nWFYGxfiXuE6KgaYHm5Hng~~)** ** **[](https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/kmC_uHLJkRxILYFKjEc7nA~~/AAPPABA~/QVTPW4HOFw7TW7-v8TPso2J8pf7Xr89H_BufhY5VPAvOsjekZvxEisoxjTb3SR3i3OW7NeZXkoHNd_L543WWxh_IL12DYfl27dT8AATKxnwTrhNWQjJgvotf8opRM7QVbmH8wsuIOHJbfyWUt1bViuHNe42E6kBy_zxTLr31-YZdP4PUBeBV19zNZgavomZR_Jh-2CELsfB8AiVp9ruJ1jp0ZzaGBuV3Cx9PQORyEJNL9yHYxEkgZUIYKlFCpHTydzLb6lG9WXI4Mv_rh9qff_FPGGp7XfycDqUJxl3h5ZSi5HUp0_Hdsygm6jx7CyAlVSvSBMXrl2HET-3vlqXXKf9WMhdNQP5aS67Nn191VTwHzmVntgZHaO-imMfWVnAU)

clean_body: | Peter, My opponent, Eli Crane, is terrified of our campaign's momentum. Fresh on the heels of shamefully voting against releasing the Epstein files, Crane is spiraling and can't keep my name or lies about my record out of his mouth. One of us is radical, and it's certainly not me. If I were in Congress, I would've voted for the release of the Epstein files and I would never vote to close rural hospitals to give billionaires a tax break. Crane can call me every name in the book,but he can 't erase the fact that he's failed to deliver on his promises time and time again. ~~ | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | ~ | ~ | ~ | ~ | ~ | ~ Eli Crane also called me "out-of-touch." What's out of touch to me, is voting for a budget bill that will strip Medicaid for over 1⁄3 of our district. That's why despite his name-calling and intimidation tactics, I'm not backing down. Because I've spent my life fighting for rural Arizona, and I'm not going to stop now. And unlike Crane, I don't answer to Donald Trump -- I answer to the people. Crane may think his corporate donors will protect him, but I know that with this team on my side, we can hand him the pink slip. ~~ Thank you for your support, Jonathan Nez | ~~ | ~ "Facebook" ~ "X" ~ "Instagram" www.tiktok.com/@nezforaz "TikTok" Jonathan Nez for Congress PO Box 1854 Flagstaff, AZ 86002 United States Contributions or gifts to Jonathan Nez for Congress are not tax deductible. **Our message is simple:_We paid in. We earned it. We’re not giving it up._**

**– FORWARDED MESSAGE –**
We couldn’t be more excited to announce the first endorsement slate of candidates for the 2026 midterm elections:

📍 **Christina Bohannan, IA 1st District** \- _Lost by fewer than 800 votes in 2024._

📍 **Rebecca Cooke, WI’s 3rd District** – _Came within just 3 points of winning last cycle._

subject: Bringing space to Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112188169/559689252/-1384072709?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjJlMTBhNC00YTZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vg6FQzK28iR8HLmjfppsoWpxXhb_ecaiW_dn7Rratwo=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112188170/559689253/-1384072709?refcode=em-7.26.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjJlMTBhNC00YTZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vg6FQzK28iR8HLmjfppsoWpxXhb_ecaiW_dn7Rratwo=)

Peter,

From my time leading the space industry in the Antelope Valley and as the NASA Chief of Staff under Obama, I have a unique perspective on bringing space to Congress.

**And right now, I’m sounding the alarm on the MAGA assault on science, and in particular, our position in space.**

The Trump Administration has proposed a _25% cut to NASA_ – making it the largest proposed cut to NASA in history. Make no mistake: This would gut the agency and directly harm our economy, national security, and international leadership.

Not only is NASA on the chopping block, this administration is looking to cut nearly half of the science budget. The enormity of these attacks cannot be overstated, and the impact would be catastrophic.

I’m fighting back as best as I can in my committees in Congress – on the Armed Services Committee, and on the Science, Space, and Technology Committee – but it’s clear after the fallout from Trump’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill”, we need control of the House to put an end to the chaos.

**[If you can, chipping in $3 would not only help me keep fighting in Congress on everything from space to protecting health care, but it would help me keep this seat for control of the House majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112188171/559689254/-1384072709?refcode=em-7.26.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjJlMTBhNC00YTZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vg6FQzK28iR8HLmjfppsoWpxXhb_ecaiW_dn7Rratwo=)**

clean_body: | = = Peter, From my time leading the space industry in the Antelope Valley and as the NASA Chief of Staff under Obama, I have a unique perspective on bringing space to Congress. And right now, I’m sounding the alarm on the MAGA assault on science, and in particular, our position in space. The Trump Administration has proposed a 25% cut to NASA – making it the largest proposed cut to NASA in history. Make no mistake: This would gut the agency and directly harm our economy, national security, and international leadership. Not only is NASA on the chopping block, this administration is looking to cut nearly half of the science budget. The enormity of these attacks cannot be overstated, and the impact would be catastrophic. I’m fighting back as best as I can in my committees in Congress – on the Armed Services Committee, and on the Science, Space, and Technology Committee – but it’s clear after the fallout from Trump’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill”, we need control of the House to put an end to the chaos. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, George P.S. I spoke with SpaceNews about the importance of our country’s leadership in space. Washington may be embroiled in Republican chaos and dysfunction, but there’s still plenty of work to get done in Congress.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112188296/559689841/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDdiMGExMC00YjZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jG2z1QpkBEkzY3l_N1rDk_pJwZVciR2dcCoqZVJ6tC0=) Team, though Washington may be embroiled in Republican chaos and dysfunction, there’s still plenty of work to get done in Congress. **I wanted to reach out and give you an update on what I’ve been doing to tackle the real challenges facing our community,[but if you don’t have time, please, take a second to chip in to my campaign so I can keep fighting to deliver bold change for you and your family in the House. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112188297/559689842/-480163815?refcode=email_072525_legislation&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDdiMGExMC00YjZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jG2z1QpkBEkzY3l_N1rDk_pJwZVciR2dcCoqZVJ6tC0=)** | | **[DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112188298/559689843/-480163815?refcode=email_072525_legislation&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDdiMGExMC00YjZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jG2z1QpkBEkzY3l_N1rDk_pJwZVciR2dcCoqZVJ6tC0=)**
---
**Mental Health:**
As co-chair of the Congressional Mental Health Caucus, I led 100 of my colleagues demanding the Trump administration reverse their cruel attacks on the LGBTQ+ community, and restore the federally-funded 988 crisis hotline for LGBTQ+ youth. **I’m sounding the alarm everywhere I can, because the crisis hotline for LGBTQ+ youth has saved countless lives, and I’m not willing to sit by while Donald Trump puts children's lives at risk.**
**Agriculture:**
On the House Agriculture committee, I’m committed to passing a Farm Bill that not only supports our farmers and producers, but also strengthens our sustainability to fight climate change. **I’m fighting to secure the best deal for the people of OR-06 — and the rural communities who contribute so much to our district.**
**Food Assistance:**
I’m doing everything I can to support families in need after Republicans voted to rip away food assistance from millions of Americans — including thousands of families here in my district. I introduced the _SNAP E &T Data and Technical Assistance Act_ to improve training and job opportunities for SNAP recipients, helping them to better support their families.
**[I’m running for reelection because I’m committed to delivering for YOU, not shady billionaires or corporate interests. Please, if you support the work I’ve been doing, pitch in a donation today and help me keep up the fight for hardworking Oregonians in the halls of Congress →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112188299/559689844/-480163815?refcode=email_072525_legislation&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDdiMGExMC00YjZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jG2z1QpkBEkzY3l_N1rDk_pJwZVciR2dcCoqZVJ6tC0=)**

A Cup of Coffee Can Be the Spark That Ignites Change!

name: Sarah McBride
subject: My hot takes (and one big truth)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I have strong opinions.
#
I’ll admit it. I have strong opinions.
Some are personal, some are political, and a few might start a friendly fight in the group chat.
So while I take a quick coffee break, I figured I’d share a few of my hot takes in the spirit of truth-telling and a little mischief:
1️⃣ Delaware has the best beaches in America. (Obviously.)
2️⃣ Wawa has the best coffee on Earth.
3️⃣ If we want a big-tent Democratic Party, that has to go both ways. We have to reject the false choice that we must sacrifice the left to win the center.
4️⃣ “Pro-life” Republicans who vote to gut funding so hungry kids can’t eat lunch aren’t at all pro-life.
5️⃣ No one is coming to save us from this administration’s authoritarian impulses. That’s the work we’ve got to do together.
Okay, maybe that last one’s not a hot take — it’s just the truth.
The stakes are sky-high, and the path forward won’t come from wishful thinking. It’ll come from organizing, showing up, and building grassroots power right now.
**As we work toward wrestling back control of the House in the midterms, I could use your help.** [**Will you pitch in $5 or whatever you can today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250726-1?refcode=em20250726-2216&amount=5&refcode2=2216_21716_juSibA&akid=2216%2E21716%2EjuSibA)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250726-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250726-2216&refcode2=2216_21716_juSibA&akid=2216%2E21716%2EjuSibA)**
Thank you for stepping up today. Even in hard moments, I’m lucky to be in this fight with you.
— Sarah
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250726-1&t=1&refcode2=2216_21716_juSibA&akid=2216%2E21716%2EjuSibA)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2216%2E21716%2EjuSibA)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2216%2E21716%2EjuSibA)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2216%2E21716%2EjuSibA)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

Dear Freedom Loving Survivalist: Here's a whistle that's **150 decibels.** In case you're not familiar, that's **louder than a jet engine** (135db) **... a canned air horn**(130db)**..._or a rifle shot_**(140db).

And today... it's **Yours FREE!** [**> > Okay, I Want One! <<**](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/21678/6374453/afc748a9646a9d69e0ffd1849e18efac5a766681/f86a5d094bba3217a7691f23a9e99c5f93baf95b) It's yet another **new product** that I want YOU and other hotlist guys to test out. I'll admit, it doesn't look like any whistle you've ever seen before. We call it the **TRS Sonic Whistle.** And man, is it LOUD. **Freakishly loud.** This will blow the eardrums off a burglar or home invader and have him _running for his life._ It's also very practical for hunting, camping, fishing, hiking or **any situation where you could find yourself lost** and in need of help. Right now this is the "go-to" whistle for **cops, security guards, coaches, lifeguards, survivalists, and search-and-rescue teams** \-- just to name a few. **Best Part:** Right here, right now, by special invitation only, (you had to receive an email from me), I will rush you one of these TRS Sonic Whistles... **For FREE!** [**> > Claim Yours HERE! <<**](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/21678/6374453/afc748a9646a9d69e0ffd1849e18efac5a766681/f86a5d094bba3217a7691f23a9e99c5f93baf95b) **No strings attached.** But there are **just 200 free samples** to go around. I expect these to be gone fast. If you reach a **"SOLD OUT"** page then sorry, you're too late. So get there now, while you can. For a safe life... Jimbo
FightFast/TRS Survival **P.S.** Please, **act now** if you want in on this hotlist product test. Thanks, I'll see you there.

body:

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3b3689a37f464789a0701c97ab9c9743&_e=pNZTrURtL4y4bTWm9GN2jcvsHY_maMabVyjPEsK5DpeGp48LqXMgbvgRe_fShnKTUB8OcVTOcRu_IcEqkDltNlqvIuJcRSxFM57qKh9dAUq9cb8R1Nr270B2F35NxiAupfJ72h-xEAqCIr67_us4b-P8g_XdPj2vFc_mWIjle1WIKl6uFAEEwpwPBCeYlwceV-BPnQhnyrbEtRc8a1JkMxgqJHz1XmyUPuoVWocWG0lPhraThtCBBFxWS5F_Xu7CxpiiFGHvRLrOZEkkwG8zgnCJWSYQz_u-xSU84zepW_gjcwdfuIG47y18AmUwp_bDMEhunqPwkBbsHYjJJ2xa0cpJnxhePtMQ8g3BdoObI0lSwhLKeSx4kZY37Z_qOge15WshonA3Gv5Sy_ZlMXJEXO4gwkfoAYmT7d-EMgbgTgCTpouah-COZDXYJbAAq52-6mmKoT1hYaFIc6HFx1jU_rQ5H-saT8VM_G73hSBQs2OxUrak5PxXLoaCY-CzUe05WBR8hFOarVS5Lfb-PotknbbHeLIWhJVMIh9UBnzubpPn0dKhj4KsbiVoQL46B1C6jm8uBh_4N7FHYvQMGwaqaZIaSAEuIC6pPOMa1ET_r0fZoXhu7LTMTJiedSKHeFAmaZFM7mm1PDXnI6zeOznNO9IqDB8l9H-ZdxHuHYxBkjtL-yN0Tohia3M-ALfOL3S8Gchmnpm09ywvDQCOxhLRgd35rQuDx5J8g9rseEY2t8Q%3D)Hey, Patriot! It's Vivek Ramaswamy.
I set a big goal this week:
[_10,000 GRASSROOTS ENDORSEMENTS._](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3b3689a37f464789a0701c97ab9c9743&_e=pNZTrURtL4y4bTWm9GN2jcvsHY_maMabVyjPEsK5DpeGp48LqXMgbvgRe_fShnKTUB8OcVTOcRu_IcEqkDltNlqvIuJcRSxFM57qKh9dAUq9cb8R1Nr270B2F35NxiAupfJ72h-xEAqCIr67_us4b-P8g_XdPj2vFc_mWIjle1WIKl6uFAEEwpwPBCeYlwceV-BPnQhnyrbEtRc8a1JkMxgqJHz1XmyUPuoVWocWG0lPhraThtCBBFxWS5F_Xu7CSQfxQ1hEsOrgcwuctqsEi3ugA78ZdTcXpuDUUmDKIxYINXKLlLUmh5UXFnbu0XUThylTUfPxQZGDFsY12WdsJFms_ntWhkUWSwv2QJnrldumRj8ZNVIFe2s_0I4qBhz96Yb-1gTSYvbMCcjxlD5ZyRxbpV8qdecrh-NvRsQuqVDLVrBzZqjNO1tNlIlE05LoJMCMhYGOr5nHYWJmMmPeZZWq8REQo82POHRXALRZbfJEWGgo4y4UWgij8nljh_W0pSBRjxANUDl0HGSIIMRTf7N6wcaj1eFF06UcoHUpQx1EBPBM9Qlf_BwO6ChtuxHDbVo8CS6HI-1F1QImEplYRyN8BzHLXT14isQKbMcSRUhCzGV1zH88Qs0BOvf1jvX3an8F8Twrjb2eTP7F0HUUPx325igmnTQ8OytmD-SCdE0ZlYpkbPDueOoCaCaLdgOfOw2OmQOf-kjSK2J9LJuAD6E8Ih70iRQLTIC5mkP5nyQ%3D)
My team told me it's crazy. That it can't be done.
_I think we can prove them wrong._
This movement is about real people who want real change.
[If that’s you, I’d be honored to have your name on our list.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3b3689a37f464789a0701c97ab9c9743&_e=pNZTrURtL4y4bTWm9GN2jcvsHY_maMabVyjPEsK5DpeGp48LqXMgbvgRe_fShnKTUB8OcVTOcRu_IcEqkDltNlqvIuJcRSxFM57qKh9dAUq9cb8R1Nr270B2F35NxiAupfJ72h-xEAqCIr67_us4b-P8g_XdPj2vFc_mWIjle1WIKl6uFAEEwpwPBCeYlwceV-BPnQhnyrbEtRc8a1JkMxgqJHz1XmyUPuoVWocWG0lPhraThtCBBFxWS5F_Xu7CY2kcadT5Ma6D1Pd136FcXnV1MDxU9xzCmSVxBFyg4meiaUkgMBpF_m0oUqMYTW8jxXafV0A4AJr7vF6jzDeKC-xmE3ls0EUh4eg2nBWCT6INUq5jdZcayOEhuf7vDlFve0iD-mdgEqxQc5AxVfn-Iyh2vSyy1gP4TutTj3_KVcR4A9YvUFF2tyqBhLyQq3Ru6UDZfYABdPp-qEuAdGYxhLobv_5XfirsWLIw0w9XeFFYYjQ0ZXmqBmdwlIGD7__bGUWxMZxWBtmXoFFIpRXEBbm_UY2R1fMvdCLYzcgoyDQMz8Ocv2eTeF-e0jQAXrjs5Fd_lhFjFTPF7tbDW8KqagQ9WhHxzlnR8dxGcNkFYT2gTARzMtG0gGLn90WBhd-xtJ4KhAQ0fSaEAFCe0yVT0-j3rAk7AQveZsS2qrksNAknvgSkA7yUZ4YYuOxV9p1vTFz89GJBqQK3CSWFSuwKM97MBTtvKGJfaMlBFzR8_L8%3D)[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3b3689a37f464789a0701c97ab9c9743&_e=pNZTrURtL4y4bTWm9GN2jcvsHY_maMabVyjPEsK5DpeGp48LqXMgbvgRe_fShnKTUB8OcVTOcRu_IcEqkDltNlqvIuJcRSxFM57qKh9dAUq9cb8R1Nr270B2F35NxiAupfJ72h-xEAqCIr67_us4b-P8g_XdPj2vFc_mWIjle1WIKl6uFAEEwpwPBCeYlwceV-BPnQhnyrbEtRc8a1JkMxgqJHz1XmyUPuoVWocWG0lPhraThtCBBFxWS5F_Xu7CDmewOQcMkhvZIKaH-tglfb24MQqNRoG7oDqtmc6J6CbNiT4jtrPCKSx4rdNUQmZTlWaa2evfOleebQ6C4NPwIDoTQcE39ZVok7L8KxDUdjOSXUEW7UnYUL2wWGqsxq9EE_rEBPNvIjqkvW0ERbkasO1uuaRhVgWxxZoiNTaixNbb3UKVJVcuwafurX1kL779hee4ySg_xgnkoOvzLUySNSVv0uIXJ9j78fX3AgAC_BK4c9casPwQ-_NkeMBN2oYbehfoVZcTXMdNZMgIfT-hOfN0qFOZVKrNoCFsw3WTwj-M-0gNIF791985NX4ITi-DIWMGzXgNw3allq69iF5Rl7SQnruXfzrcyXbFog4v-iS-LChER8VdePK_LoHOKxe2iwi2J2U68DgPq9acMa6IHfBpEvDio3eLMSkBxZO6_-ZtLdNRDtNbnPJQ17EhI6gJAXEuO5mdLzANgkWOUGqj3wqyDLNypuHJNkRVceMgd3E%3D)Help me show everyone what a real grassroots movement looks like.

Dear Peter,
---
Stop me if you’ve heard this before—we encountered resistance trying to minister in Canada. Last night in Montreal, we worshiped despite threats of arrest and fines.

This didn’t sit well with the local Antifa protesters, who tried to shut us down. When that failed, they attempted to derail the praise by throwing smoke bombs into the building. **_WATCH MOMENT THE ANTIFA SMOKE-BOMBED OUR REVIVAL ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎_**

| | It’s going to take a whole lot more than that to keep us from worshiping! Satan doesn’t want us to minister to Canada, and the attacks are becoming more and more obvious. But we are not giving up or slowing down. The greater the resistance, the greater the breakthrough! Tomorrow, we’ll be livestreaming our final revival of the week. Join us on our YouTube channel at 6:30 PM Eastern, live from Catch the Fire Church in Toronto!
---

clean_body: But the worship kept going!! | | | | | 🚨Antifa stormed into the church threw smoke bombs during worship - yet the worship kept going!!🚨 Dear Peter, Stop me if you’ve heard this before—we encountered resistance trying to minister in Canada. Last night in Montreal, we worshiped despite threats of arrest and fines. This didn’t sit well with the local Antifa protesters, who tried to shut us down. When that failed, they attempted to derail the praise by throwing smoke bombs into the building. WATCH MOMENT THE ANTIFA SMOKE-BOMBED OUR REVIVAL ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎ | | | | It’s going to take a whole lot more than that to keep us from worshiping! Satan doesn’t want us to minister to Canada, and the attacks are becoming more and more obvious. But we are not giving up or slowing down. The greater the resistance, the greater the breakthrough! Tomorrow, we’ll be livestreaming our final revival of the week. Join us on our YouTube channel at 6:30 PM Eastern, live from Catch the Fire Church in Toronto! Peter, The final Congressional Budget Office (CBO) released a score of Republicans’ so-called “big beautiful bill,” and it confirms what we feared — **this bill is devastating for millions of Americans.** Reporting from the CBO — a nonpartisan agency that provides essential cost estimates for nearly every bill approved by a full committee of the House or Senate — shows what Republicans’ plan means for us: → Nearly **$1 trillion** cut from Medicaid — the biggest cuts in history, putting care for millions at risk. → **10 million** Americans will lose their health insurance, leaving families vulnerable. → **$187 billion** slashed from food assistance programs that help families survive. Despite all these cruel cuts, the bill adds _**$3.4 trillion**_ to the deficit due to tax breaks for the wealthy. This is a direct attack on working families. We’re dedicated to electing Democrats who stand up for Medicaid, protect SNAP, and ensure every American family has a fair shot at success — no matter their income level. ****[With this fight heating up, your support is crucial. ---
Trump has fired dozens of Inspectors General–you know, those independent watchdogs who keep us safe REGARDLESS of who is in power. And the ones who remain are watching their backs.

This month, I proudly introduced the BEACON Act along with my Democratic colleagues in the House and Senate. This crucial bill would create a nonpartisan Inspector General tasked with overseeing the Executive Branch – because no administration should be above the law or immune from scrutiny.

The BEACON Act is about transparency, oversight, and protecting our democracy. At a time when trust in our institutions is under threat, this legislation is an important step forward.

[_**If you’re with me, I hope you’ll join me in showing your support by adding your name below**_**.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112189897/559695516/-1347870711?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDU2ZjIwYi01MTZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pnik32s3K5VrsxGRlkKrvUudiYs9SQhLPmeZkwrxJBw=&emci=650bebb3-8169-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e456f20b-516a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=750857)

clean_body: The BEACON Act is about transparency, oversight, and protecting our democracy. At a time when trust in our institutions is under threat, this legislation is an important step forward. | = | = Trump has fired dozens of Inspectors General–you know, those independent watchdogs who keep us safe REGARDLESS of who is in power. And the ones who remain are watching their backs. This month, I proudly introduced the BEACON Act along with my Democratic colleagues in the House and Senate. This crucial bill would create a nonpartisan Inspector General tasked with overseeing the Executive Branch – because no administration should be above the law or immune from scrutiny. The BEACON Act is about transparency, oversight, and protecting our democracy. At a time when trust in our institutions is under threat, this legislation is an important step forward. | Thanks for showing your support, Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49516 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . name: Christina Gagnier
subject: I haven’t had anything handed to me
body:
|
#
Peter,

Unlike a lot of candidates for Congress, I have not had anything in my life handed to me.

After my dad died from cancer, I grew up in a single parent household, with my mom being the sole breadwinner.

**I worked my way through high school, college, and law school doing anything I could to get by – from cleaning tanning beds to working night shifts at hotels. I started my successful small business with $60 in the bank during the Great Recession and found my first client off of Craigslist.**

My story is far from unique. The cost of living has skyrocketed, especially in Southern California, and young people and working families are being set up to fail. At a recent event, I spoke with someone who is a mother, veteran, and a public school employee, and is still unable to keep her head above water in our area.

People who have done everything right are struggling and scared. That is not right.

That is why we need folks like me in Congress. I don’t come from a wealthy family or have lots of millionaire friends. I know what it is like to have crushing student loan debt – I still have it! -- and come of age during a time of economic instability.

Meanwhile, my opponent Young Kim is in Congress for herself. She would rather turn her back on our communities than stand up to the MAGA agenda, all for a corporate PAC check. It is wrong, and I am running to fire her and be a real voice for CA-40.

**[I cannot afford to self-fund my campaign – this movement is built by folks like you chipping in a few dollars at a time. If you’re with me, will you chip in $3 ahead of our end-of-month deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112190084/559696413/1631137775?refcode=em-7.26.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGZlZjViOC01MjZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4F7r3YMAKnDNYtYj8bc5M78WBbMXrLl8zsKBepF0558=)**

name: Swalwell HQ
subject: Just a few days away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
|
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112190062/559696297/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjNhOTk5NS01MjZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F4kt6_zAaispJhK7pyGNrLgKOzwQCxUu0MY8Cx-5Tjg=&emci=6151c983-c468-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=c23a9995-526a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7878003)
Friend \- we’re just a few days away from the end of the month, and that means over here at Swalwell HQ, we are looking at our numbers and finalizing our end-of-month goals. **But we’re also grateful - despite Trump’s BS and the GOP’s constant attacks on our basic rights, more and more people like you are joining our team and taking a stand to fight back. ** Look, we get it, 2026 feels a long way away. But the truth? It isn’t. And our number one focus is making sure that Eric and our team can do every single thing to make sure we get rid of the GOP majority in Congress and put Democrats back in charge of the House. [**That’s why the next week is so critical - we need every cent possible to hold Trump Accountable.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112190063/559696324/444482356?&refcode=E14298-20250726-EOM1-SL-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjNhOTk5NS01MjZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F4kt6_zAaispJhK7pyGNrLgKOzwQCxUu0MY8Cx-5Tjg=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112190064/559696326/444482356?&refcode=E14298-20250726-EOM1-SB-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjNhOTk5NS01MjZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F4kt6_zAaispJhK7pyGNrLgKOzwQCxUu0MY8Cx-5Tjg=)

There is a constitutional crisis, but it's not what CNN thinks it is.

**The far-Left wants the current administration to obey the dictates of federal district court judges rather than the will of a majority of the American people.**

But do federal judges control the executive branch? Does the judicial branch have the final say in determining what is or is not constitutional?

Because the far-Left has undermined informed patriotism by promoting a distorted view of our nation's history and Constitution--including the judicial branch--many Americans do not know the answers to these questions.

That's why your participation in Hillsdale College's [**National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/n3ezVh3JQ4SAzcEZMEEyfPKyHLSJe2wcyTr4hKfOjAh-rfZx2djB5wq6q-uQSEs9DxFPALWSr_-_bmXzHbs12KItq7uW_-UoRjWK1cmg24De-gdmHCl3EQQ5T7tlWbiVZ1Bzrwr-PWd_4IY9Z14Sot5Mi8I8I3xQY8kTCJCjE6FUybqMpwA0vU_INi3QsRYq7j4sEsx35bqMtV5xUrTcRqcwBCuy1esAojhsSBEz8DmtuSwsei65onbDts_GvfMSxH0hZGrFOHW6WEONerrIAUpFdLHqQwSUE5HWbMbnaIV7RLFEuHpsxQlAoS9bwP_V_95j_B7_DlwAWpsDT4byzcxWmkWVnpltb4W7TmsxDQD_6OfDkbAx6g-XT7sz4ZuiJ6FdGgR8uliNZDE8J5b5SaJhdjHbAWaxfaZzXKnpoUSbziwowHeqSAquLboP0RTP2zdIAh94gsp2og1hwHFdt0rl5-G-sCzQtZ2i9TG0QGrFJ7Cv_ttFe8OSLrWtuelV1vNPKVKqkCcU-s70LN161WkxD_OgsOEGToXwOBTCrAfmOfFQWwwSZVsHiwMmGqEVotwDllSaFS7GN7reHF_VgrTddRDk82Q9M4X5FExBHfYpRlB9xP-tPuSFotRMPWNEoOKPJJ32CUvr628MXOvnpGubHD2xcLGCzLhdgyS3Jyx3cCNP9bId4-86-zPAhJuv0H7JahskAGNw7JYWbBebWE7p4jWzj--68NwzkqjCdvAmXRRpUy5EWkBPc_ZVxnsFLbJWzxBIsXu2Um6TPOY3/F8Jr71IaiI715OCei8mLPEeznUsypwHc/11) is urgently requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, and the survey topic is crucial to the future of liberty and separation of powers in America.

Millions of Americans rely on public broadcasting for news and critical emergency alerts, Peter. **But Republicans in Congress were dead set on canceling funding for these programs even though the funding was already approved. ** Their cuts _will_ be devastating, especially to many rural communities that solely rely on public broadcasting for important updates and alerts. | Hi there — I have some exciting news! **The first event in our organizing training series is only days away!** These training sessions will prepare Democrats across the state for phonebanking, canvassing, town hall meetings, hosting house parties, and so much more. They are tactical seminars that will empower and engage Democrats on the ground to mobilize in the swing districts that’ll decide control of the U.S. House. And we know that having trained volunteers is a _CRITICAL_ part of our grassroots plan to take back control of the U.S. House. **But running these events isn't cheap**. **[With sky-high technology costs and staff time, our budget is stretched thin. That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you rush a donation of $35 or more to help fund volunteer training across our state?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112190838/559699067/-990252221?&refcode=20250726_FR_45DO_OrganizingTraining&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWM3NDViMy01MzZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LG4--UV23Gke1dcbxDcaDtOlQOe7_ZNrkZcr3JfD1uE=)** [CHIP IN $5 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112190839/559699068/-990252221?&refcode=20250726_FR_45DO_OrganizingTraining&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWM3NDViMy01MzZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LG4--UV23Gke1dcbxDcaDtOlQOe7_ZNrkZcr3JfD1uE=)

[CHIP IN $105 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112190843/559699072/-990252221?&refcode=20250726_FR_45DO_OrganizingTraining&amount=105&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWM3NDViMy01MzZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LG4--UV23Gke1dcbxDcaDtOlQOe7_ZNrkZcr3JfD1uE=) Back in 2023, we had this wild idea about “Forever Organizing.” Forever Organizing meant that we weren’t just going to wait until a few months before an election to build our ground game. We were going to connect with voters all year round. We hired organizers and opened regional offices — over a year before the next election. **Some people questioned this strategy, but we flipped THREE seats from red to blue in 2024.** That’s why we are holding our organizing training RIGHT NOW. We can’t afford to wait until the last minute to train volunteers.
