clean_body: Help expand our training efforts? | = | Hi there — I have some exciting news! The first event in our organizing training series is only days away! These training sessions will prepare Democrats across the state for phonebanking, canvassing, town hall meetings, hosting house parties, and so much more. They are tactical seminars that will empower and engage Democrats on the ground to mobilize in the swing districts that’ll decide control of the U.S. House. And we know that having trained volunteers is a CRITICAL part of our grassroots plan to take back control of the U.S. House. But running these events isn't cheap. = = = = = = Back in 2023, we had this wild idea about “Forever Organizing.” Forever Organizing meant that we weren’t just going to wait until a few months before an election to build our ground game. We were going to connect with voters all year round. We hired organizers and opened regional offices — over a year before the next election. Some people questioned this strategy, but we flipped THREE seats from red to blue in 2024. That’s why we are holding our organizing training RIGHT NOW. We can’t afford to wait until the last minute to train volunteers. We want them fully engaged and empowered to begin phone-banking and door-knocking as soon as possible. = = Gracias, Andrea P.S. Sign up if you're interested in the training! | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. If this email was forwarded to you, We rely on email to communicate with supporters like you and conduct the business of the California Democratic Party, but if you wish to receive only our most important emails, And if you no longer wish to receive emails from the California Democratic Party, click here to . | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www.cadem.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. # **[Behar Comments On Trump and News Network](http://trk.libertyledger.-D49MdJuRumKSSpzA)**
---
A White House spokesperson issued a sharp warning to The View co-host Joy Behar on Wednesday after her latest on-air tirade against President Donald Trump, suggesting that her show could be “next to be pulled off-air.” During the episode, Behar and her fellow panelists reacted to Trump’s call for former President Barack Obama to be [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.-D49MdJuRumKSSpzA)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._i5U6Vg)
# **[Bondi Skips CPAC Summit](http://trk.libertyledger._i5U6Vg)**
---
U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi suffered a medical emergency just hours after reports surfaced that she had warned President Donald Trump his name appeared multiple times in government files tied to the Jeffrey Epstein investigation. Bondi was scheduled to appear at CPAC’s Summit Against Human Trafficking on Thursday to discuss the Justice Department’s work on [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._i5U6Vg)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2VnbWVudD01MDU5OTcifQ/ZP2Fjx5WA-TRsS3C8TPVgA)

# **[Columbia University Reaches Settlement With The Trump Administration](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/_Pt3uBLTtiWp_WVbt6IyEA)**
---
Columbia University has agreed to a massive settlement with the Trump administration after failing to protect Jewish students from harassment and violent pro-Hamas demonstrations, according to a report from the New York Post.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/_Pt3uBLTtiWp_WVbt6IyEA)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
# **[Ron Klain Sits Down With House Committee](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Former Biden White House Chief of Staff Ronald Klain appeared on Capitol Hill Thursday for a closed-door interview with the House Oversight Committee as part of an expanding probe into whether senior aides concealed signs of President Joe Biden’s mental decline during his final months in office. Klain, who served as Biden’s chief of staff [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._bu3CksQ)
# **[DOJ Issues Announcement Following White House Press Briefing](http://trk.libertyledger._bu3CksQ)**
---
Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard made it clear Wednesday that she is not treating her disclosures about the Russia collusion hoax as a mere political spectacle — and now the Department of Justice is following her lead.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._bu3CksQ)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/CZMNCvaj1f8MMMhZkk2wSQ)
# **[Law Enforcement Officials Arrest Man For Allegedly Planting Explosive Devices In NYC](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/CZMNCvaj1f8MMMhZkk2wSQ)**
---
Federal prosecutors have charged 55-year-old Michael Gann of New York City with constructing and placing multiple improvised explosive devices (IEDs) across Manhattan, including one thrown onto the subway tracks of the Williamsburg Bridge, officials announced Monday. According to the indictment, Gann allegedly built at least seven devices using precursor chemicals such as potassium perchlorate and [...]

Fellow Conservative,

**I need to ask you something that might feel small — but matters a lot.**

**Will you[chip in just $1](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=71492d174bbd4168ac367bcd9c2b05f4&_e=rLkOnco5h1LdplPqD8PgcxNTNYd8952TCMuQBtFZkbwJKQM2N3HZcAJTd2EEzgbIMLncKHsfe75ljW6uyVn7798aYPcxHHvVSKZiFohdLJgWd77WDccQ5LiV2So2mG3eg6hJQcEOAYi7pWtm9qmaNG6XRR_iItyzfbCvqg3VEN4SFd0pGD50Q9fgpCmwmj8hRPjNJRvKMjXO__7DE88hAn6LbrUMZzeqGP6AhI4ebmObXIkVrp5SWznARVmrSwN4K9Z4puL6CNCYzRiMOi8K70p0UBVqfhtfmwwfARkV_e_lfPWE_MSJmNYcppVzDCXt1pOVQbxWFA9cLdxZJy0jUZu_ulbq2_WKwaDao1Oqsr0tvOWKRnfsV3sMG7HhFlEQk3lwl4wxJubN7Cy3Dh9Gf-U_yPWU2IFxHWak80NrTY9d2Nsvlkxq48oPO7A-3vGE0uy0AXmsbuJdElCufOISxb8Olqua9G4XhyQwLszLeuFD8zudQXYMcT5rOagT0sads7iabwHveOM6L3Z9IFCZiAe4VNEWC3Jrau2JDcYuP6JzwQ0XkdYwHJJPNGAEZxxLKLo4SMruvcJJE3FYWxUeV5eoLDqQvzCD4pbXT52LpULqI-QoPTrhbpCBlsG8Dyv4ZN2F-YFTwwvM0xfGrFPTYqoHMa8Ghmji_uS0SsHPE17l-TQ040OTOTJKX0c7BUkC7Z7xzcJX8ynHMqlCxbtcNXMm8pbuv4GHHj0W9frPhWiFaysD9BWuQahgGFk_mI0MtI7K2qvmmiOxJF0z6OPI4zu99-m91WryLQxKxMcp8isDzWlGLV6pdesBIEvm1IaKscLYvddOJUOkk-07IOj7Yty2StZTC1nhtfGzMQ-9zjVl14e520zIeCZY3B_bQdaCcV1Z7a-vCrVcGWDhs2yE-g%3D%3D) today to help us stop the Democrats from taking the Senate?
**
You may not have donated in a while. I get it. Because just a couple weeks ago, while you were going about your life, the Senate passed President Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” and it was signed into law just days later. We pulled an all-nighter to get it done. Why?

Because i**t locks in permanent tax relief, imposes work requirements for welfare, and invests over $170 BILLION into border security, including:**
1. $46.5 billion for the wall
2. $45 billion to expand detention facilities
3. $29.9 billion to hire 10,000 new ICE agents

This is real progress — the kind we dreamed about just a few years ago. But now the Democrats smell blood. They’re outraising us, outspending us, and targeting our Senate seats — even in red states.

**They want revenge.**

If we lose this next election, everything we just won could vanish. They’ll tear it all down.

That’s why I’m writing you — not for $10, not for $100 — just for $1. Not because $1 will flip the Senate, but because it’s a signal that you haven’t given up.

clean_body: Promises made, promises kept | Fellow Conservative, I need to ask you something that might feel small — but matters a lot. Will you today to help us stop the Democrats from taking the Senate? You may not have donated in a while. I get it. But if you ever believed in what we’ve done together — the tax cuts, the conservative judges, the border wall — Because just a couple weeks ago, while you were going about your life, the Senate passed President Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” and it was signed into law just days later. We pulled an all-nighter to get it done. Why? Because it locks in permanent tax relief, imposes work requirements for welfare, and invests over $170 BILLION into border security, including: 1. $46.5 billion for the wall 2. $45 billion to expand detention facilities 3. $29.9 billion to hire 10,000 new ICE agents This is real progress — the kind we dreamed about just a few years ago. But now the Democrats smell blood. They’re outraising us, outspending us, and targeting our Senate seats — even in red states. They want revenge. If we lose this next election, everything we just won could vanish. They’ll tear it all down. That’s why I’m writing you — not for $10, not for $100 — just for $1. Not because $1 will flip the Senate, but because it’s a signal that you haven’t given up. Your name on our donor list tells me we’re not alone — that this still matters to you. When Republicans see 10,000 patriots step up with just one dollar, it tells our entire movement: we’re still in this fight. You stood with us once. I hope you’ll stand with us again — For America, Ted Cruz U.S. Senator - Texas | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265

name: Team Jon Ossoff
subject: Sorry to put this thought in your head
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter —
Georgia’s Senate race is going to be one of the closest in the entire country. It will be close enough to start thinking about what it’d be like if MAGA won this seat. Sorry to put the thought in your head, but it’s true.
**[That’s why we’re asking for $5 today.** ](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-july25.vLE_dc&refcode=em250726-1-f&t=1&akid=582%2E5691347%2E8CIRQX)
Now, we know what you’re probably thinking — $5 is a drop in the bucket compared to the huge sums of money spent by the Super PACs, Trump donors, and GOP.
But, by the time you’ve gotten this far into the email, someone has already chipped in their $5. Now they’re hoping you’ll do the same. It all adds up. That’s how we’re going to win Georgia and take back the Senate majority.
So we’re asking:
**[Can you please make a $5 contribution to re-elect Jon Ossoff and ensure Georgia has a Senator who fights for US, not Donald Trump?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-july25.vLE_dc&refcode=em250726-1-f&t=2&akid=582%2E5691347%2E8CIRQX)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $5](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-july25.o6csNP&amount=5&refcode=em250726-1-f&t=3&akid=582%2E5691347%2E8CIRQX)**
---
****
| **[DONATE OTHER](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-july25.o6csNP&refcode=em250726-1-f&t=4&akid=582%2E5691347%2E8CIRQX)**
---
****
Think about it:
What would a far-right extremist do to hold Donald Trump accountable for all his fraud, grift, and corruption?
Would a MAGA Senator get to work fighting for the hundreds of thousands of Georgians who are going to get kicked off their Medicare?
Would they put Georgia first, and do everything possible to fight for working people? Or would they choose loyalty to Donald Trump over loyalty to the people they represent?
_You know the answers to these questions, Peter._
**Those are the stakes, and it’s why we’re asking:**
**[Can you please make a $5 contribution to support Jon Ossoff’s re-election campaign today?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-july25.vLE_dc&refcode=em250726-1-f&t=5&akid=582%2E5691347%2E8CIRQX)
Thanks,
Team Jon Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=6&akid=582%2E5691347%2E8CIRQX) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=582%2E5691347%2E8CIRQX) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

clean_body: | | | | | | | Peter, There are fights happening all across the country. Social media giants are fighting to acquire your personal data. AI companies are fighting to remove American workers from the economy. Establishment politicians are fighting to keep fighting—engaged in forever wars in far-flung corners of the world. But I’m fighting for something different... | | America is worth fighting for. And while other politicians keep fighting for every special interest, I’ll keep fighting for YOU! In Liberty, Josh Hawley | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | | |

name: David Hogg
subject: We’re not slowing down this summer
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Help elect the next generation of progressive leaders, all year long.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250726-1&t=1&akid=2438%2E587540%2E1I2Fbm)
Hi Peter, it’s David from Leaders We Deserve.
I want to talk to you about something I’ve seen every summer since I got involved in this work. It’s something we’re facing again this year: **the summer slowdown.**
When school’s out, vacations start, and people step away from the day-to-day grind, fundraising tends to dip. And I get it. Life gets busy. Between work, family, and travel, politics can take a back seat.
**But the truth is,_our work doesn’t stop._**
Right now, we’re recruiting, training, and supporting young progressives to run for office and win. That means getting resources to candidates who are fighting for gun safety, climate action, abortion rights, and a future we can believe in. Our team is working hard to support our next slate of candidates and make sure they’re ready to compete in November.
**That work doesn’t pause. And that’s exactly why I’m reaching out to you.**
**[Will you set up a monthly donation of $5 to help us power this movement through the summer and all the way to Election Day?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250726_1_summerslumpra?recurring=1&refcode=em20250726-2438&amount=5&refcode2=2438_587540_1I2Fbm&akid=2438%2E587540%2E1I2Fbm)**
Recurring grassroots donations help us plan, hire, and commit to long-term support. When we know we can count on your monthly gift, we can go even further because we know you’ve got our back, even when things get quiet.
**We can’t do this without you, Peter. Let’s build a future led by the leaders we deserve, together.**
Thank you,
David Hogg
Co-Founder, Leaders We Deserve
P.S. Can’t commit to a monthly donation? **[Your one-time donation of $5 or any amount you can contribute today will help power this movement.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250726_1_summerslumpra?refcode=em20250726-2438&amount=5&refcode2=2438_587540_1I2Fbm&akid=2438%2E587540%2E1I2Fbm)**
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250726-1&t=2&refcode2=2438_587540_1I2Fbm&akid=2438%2E587540%2E1I2Fbm)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2438%2E587540%2E1I2Fbm)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2438%2E587540%2E1I2Fbm)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: We can’t afford hesitation. Every grassroots Democrat in your area must take a stand.
body:
Peter, our democracy is in freefall - and we need every committed Democrat on record.
The GOP's plan is TERRIFYING in its ambition: Ramp up the ICE budget by BILLIONS, send MASKED agents out into the streets to kidnap whoever they feel like, and either DEPORT them or HIDE THEM AWAY in a Florida concentration camp with a cutesy name.
It's DISGUSTING. It's terrifying. We need to take action NOW.
That’s why we’re urgently checking the records of every member of this grassroots movement to see if they're still STANDING STRONG against Trump's fascist actions.
Right now, your 2025 Democratic Membership is still pending:

name: Derek Tran
subject: This fight is hard

Hi Peter, Wiley has always believed that good public service starts with listening. That’s why we’re reaching out to hear directly from you. Across North Carolina, families are working hard to navigate rising costs, plan for the future, and care for their loved ones. But everyone’s experience is different — and your voice helps us better understand what’s really happening in our communities. Will you take 30 seconds to answer this one-question survey? disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend, I just wrapped up a crucial meeting with Tim Scott, Chairman
of the NRSC, and our fellow Vice Chairs.

One important thing came out of our discussion: you’ve yet to
complete your 2025 VOTER VERIFICATION AUDIT.

name: Tina Kotek
subject: Peter, what was your favorite children’s book?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
This might be a question you don’t get often: What was your favorite book growing up? I fondly remember “Loveable Lyle (the Crocodile)” and “Little Toot” when I was a new reader — and then ALL the Nancy Drew books when I was a bit older. Every kid deserves the opportunity to fall in love with reading like I did and find their favorite book — that’s why Aimee and I are so excited to be partnering with the queen herself, Dolly Parton. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112192229/559703538/1487064069?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250726_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWQ1MTY3Ny01YjZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q1PWyK2epxNBk1z2MRrGrqNtjT7t0cpxfc60IoB6uiA=&emci=df071571-5b6a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=c9d51677-5b6a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=15353729) **[Last year, we expanded Dolly Parton’s Imagination Library to ALL 36 counties so that every kid can discover their favorite book. Dolly Parton’s Imagination Library has been successful nationwide in delivering books to kids (mailed to their homes regularly) from the time they’re born until they’re 5 years old.
This innovative program supports our efforts to improve early childhood literacy, prepares kids for kindergarten, and builds foundational, positive connections with reading to ensure our kids are life-long learners.
**[Add your name right now to stand with me (and Dolly!) to help us invest in Oregon’s kids.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112192232/559703541/1487064069?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250726_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWQ1MTY3Ny01YjZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q1PWyK2epxNBk1z2MRrGrqNtjT7t0cpxfc60IoB6uiA=&emci=df071571-5b6a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=c9d51677-5b6a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=15353729)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112192233/559703542/1487064069?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250726_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWQ1MTY3Ny01YjZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q1PWyK2epxNBk1z2MRrGrqNtjT7t0cpxfc60IoB6uiA=&emci=df071571-5b6a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=c9d51677-5b6a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=15353729)

Tina

name: Signature Required
subject: Florida Survival Guide
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.41.25%E2%80%AFAM.png]
How to survive in Florida (per the GOP):
✅ Get 3 jobs to afford rent
✅ Avoid hurricanes without FEMA
✅ Pretend veterans are doing just fine
✅ Don’t ask about “Alligator Alcatraz”
Brings a smile to their faces, Friend :
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/326E4A3932756F466A467A69484658642F575A4E4D6363534734626E716D7242574530457464544D625676393866724B373653755263756D6A664D342F583163/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-07-26%20at%204.00.57%E2%80%AFPM.png]
Is that something you are willing to sign on to? Willing to vote for?
OR... will you help elect leaders who believe in solutions , not soundbites.
I’m Josh Weil, and I’m running for Senate because I’ve lived the struggle and I know this isn’t sustainable. I am a public school teacher of 13 years, and have seen first hand how horrible policy has affected our youth and Florida communities. I ran a special election earlier this year, and pushed the needle farther than our November ticket in 4 short months. We have 15 months to replicate half of that success across Florida in order to win this seat.
Let’s ditch the survival guide and start thriving instead. Sign on to OUR campaign:
💡 Donate today and help build a Florida that works for all of us. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?refcode=NTLJUL23]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
We are starting early so we can reach everyone , and this campaign can’t run the whole time without the most important part: you.
Grateful,
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.05.04%E2%80%AFAM.png]

**_Peter — This isn’t how public service is supposed to work._**

In 2023, more than 100 members of Congress made over 11,000 stock trades, totaling more than $1 billion.

While working people are struggling to afford groceries, medicine, and rent, members of Congress are trading like hedge fund managers. That’s wrong. And it has to end.

**_[Will you chip in $10 right now to help us pass a ban on congressional stock trading and build a government that puts people first?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112192367/559704121/1420690541?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20250726_FR_CongressionalTrading_0_6MO_Seth_NA_NA_Ban&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWI1NjZmNi01YjZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lm9sBlVWkhf55_0BBniHnbomjcsbH_IkY_WEHn7BnMU=)_** | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112192368/559704125/1420690541?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20250726_FR_CongressionalTrading_0_6MO_Seth_NA_NA_Ban&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWI1NjZmNi01YjZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lm9sBlVWkhf55_0BBniHnbomjcsbH_IkY_WEHn7BnMU=)

I was sent to Congress to fight for Rhode Islanders. My focus has not changed: working across party lines for the people of Rhode Island. That’s why I’m pushing to pass the TRUST in Congress Act, my bipartisan bill that will ban members of Congress and their families from trading individual stocks.

Because this job is supposed to be about serving the public, not making personal profits off inside information. Republicans in leadership are doing everything they can to block this bill from getting a vote. Why? Because _they know the public is watching._ They know the math. And they know that if we bring this to the floor, we win.

**Over 80% of Americans want this ban.** But we won’t get it without flipping seats, raising pressure, and holding corrupt politicians accountable. **_[So, Peter, will you rush a donation to help power this fight and keep the momentum going?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112192369/559704128/1420690541?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20250726_FR_CongressionalTrading_0_6MO_Seth_NA_NA_Ban&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWI1NjZmNi01YjZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lm9sBlVWkhf55_0BBniHnbomjcsbH_IkY_WEHn7BnMU=)_**

clean_body: Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter — This isn’t how public service is supposed to work. In 2023, more than 100 members of Congress made over 11,000 stock trades, totaling more than $1 billion. While working people are struggling to afford groceries, medicine, and rent, members of Congress are trading like hedge fund managers. That’s wrong. And it has to end. = | | = I was sent to Congress to fight for Rhode Islanders. My focus has not changed: working across party lines for the people of Rhode Island. That’s why I’m pushing to pass the TRUST in Congress Act, my bipartisan bill that will ban members of Congress and their families from trading individual stocks. Because this job is supposed to be about serving the public, not making personal profits off inside information. Republicans in leadership are doing everything they can to block this bill from getting a vote. Why? Because they know the public is watching. They know the math. And they know that if we bring this to the floor, we win. Over 80% of Americans want this ban. But we won’t get it without flipping seats, raising pressure, and holding corrupt politicians accountable. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = It’s time to clean up Congress. Let’s get to work. Thank you, Seth | = PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress PO BOX 40993, PROVIDENCE, RI 02940 If you’d like to unsubscribe, . You can also =**.

body:
Effective in less than two weeks, our Pro-Trump House Majority will go down to 219 seats.
- FROM THE DESK OF - Majority Leader Steve Scalise
* * *

Effective in less than two weeks, our Pro-Trump House Majority will go down to 219 seats. Don't forget: Our Majority is the FIRST LINE OF DEFENSE standing in the way of House Democrats having complete power to:

* Impeach President Trump
* Investigate Conservatives
* Stonewall the America First Agenda

There are three upcoming Special Elections THIS YEAR and one more on the horizon. Democrats are favored to win all of them. If Republicans fail to overperform here, we'll be closer than ever to surrendering control to the Democrats.
So here's what we need:
Our FIRST deadline since we missed our major FEC fundraising goal is only days away and we're pacing behind yet again. [We need to rally between 50,000 and 60,000 Conservative donors to get back on track before our House Majority shrinks. I hate to ask you like this but can you please help us out?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d8563f691b2346c891d6e64d03994ae6&_e=wqYgC9AeWUGy9fdiCK3iu38wGVeSquoDldgJZaXsViQT65PZ0cRD_A1ldT4lOCBBHHFdeNKMOx1gAaB3Eas-XQm9F8IWhtDDNJtdJXEjnWXhZPhGAWUXOstc3XaDyFO4_usBuxtdRaFNi76MtRC640GciuFd4ImUs-bz-M83CMREVPSR425ohKI69Gx6eGaa_1BQaY0HFoH6v5BBZt88fNq0gl-lZbhjtjKdPAyAYr_4S8FCpDwDVnRfPxBvib5yMQZ4QWd8U0tbc920aq0k-xh3UBu-INYSn03Q8MtFdTWAIkoT-LTIO8AJtSEmF3ghFTgi_EY1WJIuKcFXjH_nZ3fYjffQChaN1XPIS_R4EegQaNFAFBopsKVlbQo0bP5-AbtpMuIwoomOA-q7yq_BJHqK3CrYVEmFDHKIM8K3tYfXfCk1VTeLbHfWEMD0-5hXutEJ9hI9aLtw7koVWju3cwiDRAqEHVAbn5mlDsox9IGGoHe83qeUh6cIw6uMls82LWEIZKzINvdR29AzUHuNcL_MYkhKb0fM6Mey_Bc1QzYUx1RDuScPu-G207QgbluMfBQ74etc83B-jTSm3jZYx1K3eLI7wyb7Bs9_O3toCkp9k0AwyeSB6TXfg5CZ0vBCXKMwPkpUOICa7aQhWFr9769jl1AbYizPrWN_p8nh3slnjnUKUau_JNlkBK5dfOStqo3n9fy3QUs3PjB2KgFIjw%3D%3D)[SEND HELP HERE

We're about to lose one more Conservative in our corner and the Democrats are favored to win ALL THREE upcoming Special Elections.
The odds were already stacked against us but now they just jolted in favor of the Democrats. I understand if you're sick and tired of folks like me asking you for money...
But here's the bottom line:
President Trump needs us to hold the line. Without our Conservative House Majority, his entire legislative agenda will be dead on arrival in the House, his allies will be investigated to no end, and he could face impeachment on DAY ONE of Democrat control.
I've been around long enough to say this with authority: The pressure is on like never before.
If we fail to defend the House, we might as well kiss America's Golden Age goodbye and brace ourselves for a torrent of Liberal Witch Hunts.
But if we can mobilize enough Conservatives, we'll have the resources to support our Special Election candidates, defy the odds, and keep the House in GOP control for all four years of Trump's term.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I hope you know that I would not ask if it was not important
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Honestly, we’re spending down resources faster than we’re replenishing them. And to turn that around, I need supporters who understand how important this work is to chip in.
#

Folks, Mark Kelly here. And in a minute or so, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign. If you have the time, give me a chance to explain why this request is especially important today.
Here’s the truth:
In 2020, we won what was arguably the most hotly contested Senate race in the entire country.
In 2022, we had to run again. We won an incredibly competitive race — and by an even bigger margin that time.
In 2024, I hit the road. I fundraised, gave speeches, advised, and supported as many candidates as I could. In a tough year for Democrats, we pulled out some important victories.
And now, in 2026, I’ve taken a formal position as Vice Chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee, where I strategize and fundraise for the Senate candidates we’ll need to take back the chamber.
I’m a firm believer that running strong campaigns makes a difference. I wouldn’t be in the Senate if we didn’t take every campaign seriously — and if I can help other candidates do the same, I have to. Maybe it’s the decades of Navy service in me, but I’ll always jump at the chance to make an impact.
But all this work, the travel, the town halls, the media, the staffing — it’s not free, believe it or not. There’s a significant cost. And while the first half of the year was an extremely strong period for fundraising, this second half has been significantly more difficult.
Honestly, we’re spending down resources faster than we’re replenishing them. And to turn that around, I need supporters who understand how important this work is to chip in what they can, when they can.
So, I’m asking you, humbly: [**Can you make a donation to my campaign? Help us keep up this nationwide mobilization, because investments now will pay huge electoral dividends when next November comes around.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-july25.pQQVdM&refcode=em250726-1-f&t=1&akid=6132%2E6688874%2EUchbR5)

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: 5 quick reasons
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-sherrill?refcode=250726em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-sherrill?refcode=250726em]
It’s been a few weeks since I won the Democratic nomination for governor of New Jersey. But this race is already a rollercoaster — we’ve seen an outpouring of grassroots support and also faced a barrage of right-wing attacks.
Today, I need your help to stop MAGA Republicans from flipping New Jersey red, and I’m humbly asking you to split $5 between my team and Tobias Read to power our campaign to victory. to power our campaign to victory. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-sherrill?refcode=250726em] But if you’re not sure (which I understand!), here are five reasons I hope will convince you:
1) New Jersey is not a safe Democratic state anymore — far from it. The last governor’s election here? It was decided by 3%. New Jersey’s margin in the 2024 presidential election? 6%. The first polling in this race of the general election? It shows me leading my GOP opponent by only 3%.
2) Donald Trump is going to do everything he can to defeat me in this race. He’s already endorsed my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, and led a rally for him — meaning MAGA money from all over the country is going to pour into Ciattarelli’s campaign.
3) Unlike my opponent, I won’t ever hesitate to stand up to Trump when he attacks New Jersey families. I’ve sworn an oath to the Constitution, and I’ve spent my career honoring it to the best of my ability every single day — before loyalty to any other politician or political party. Ciattarelli has already made clear that his number-one priority is staying in Trump’s good graces.
4) My top priority as governor will be making life more affordable for New Jersey families. I’ve put forward detailed plans for lowering the cost of everything from housing and energy to health care, child care, and groceries — and I’m going to hit the ground running on Day 1, making them a reality.
5) The stakes of this race are high not only for New Jersey but for the country. This is our chance to show the entire nation that the people reject the Trump administration’s incompetence and authoritarianism. And it’s our chance to get started on a better path forward — one where we prioritize doing what’s best for working families over what’s best for billionaires and corrupt political allies. There is no more important bellwether ahead of 2026.
If any of these reasons speak to you, I hope you will split a $5 donation between my team and Tobias Read to help me defeat my Trump-endorsed opponent in this incredibly competitive election to determine who leads our state for the next four years. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-sherrill?refcode=250726em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-sherrill?refcode=250726em]
Thanks for reading, and have a great rest of your day.
-Mikie Sherrill
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-sherrill?refcode=250726em]
Tobias Read is Oregon's Secretary of State. To support him directly, please donate here. [https://www.tobiasread.com]
Mikie Sherrill is running for Governor of New Jersey. You can support her directly here. [https://www.mikiesherrill.com/]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/IMahE5FQZEyEjGesjn_XSA2?unsubscribedata=MzGnosb%2Bp8z5wAY%2FceiurBTXRy56UgqW0E9qMvFb9esqN5%2BEfwmSzuupiH7n42Ted%2BQQwpD%2BaqDgwJWVmzi%2Bml5w%2FKtT%2BmwwgFwJ8%2BAdAALRuPhDDW9VRtpVqLo4NAz9zsyLzjuHNKviwLO%2FCc1sn52eqiMzLIHL7131X9vzM8ZJS%2Fxrx%2B8Rz3BMwDpb9tEJaVA9GRvvMtqcgf4YhvgAAKyhKbtAJapEza9ykpUo%2FXyMk5guX0pReRa%2Bzy300UnwpTwpdnKowOiqWzdapxIJ3lcpvo%2FgTFSv7ET%2BBPTilW1YP%2F69x3Pk7fN5pY7iBVWmrD3HQ0akSIjJDhrjngP3gf6shN81D9reyeL2I%2BE4GxhoaHuNaNIsNsLDFosTg7h6g81FgyGpFwWL%2BGl7xit%2Bx6dz2mQKzfmjAYgApw9KLChI28EqW77UazOVvz1mpqIJ .

subject: Zoe Lofgren is an unsung hero

body:
| | | Dear Peter,

My friend Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is an unsung hero for defending our democracy and our Constitution.

I had not known Zoe well before our work together on the House Select Committee to investigate the January 6th attack on the United States Capitol, but I was aware of her reputation as one of the most effective and respected Members of the House of Representatives. She is a thoughtful and serious member, and she operates with zero ego — a rarity in Congress.

Zoe has been a source of wisdom and good judgment for me and many Members in Congress. Although we don’t share many views on politics or public policy, I can assure you that we need Zoe in Congress and on the frontlines as we continue to protect and secure the future of our democracy.

We all must look beyond party and support people like Zoe who will defend the Constitution, someone we know will do the right thing. _We need good, smart, honest and honorable people in elected office._

[**_With your help we can make sure Zoe has the resources needed to stay in Congress and continue the important work of defending our Constitution. Please join me in supporting her and contributing $10 today._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112192953/559706064/-1467160713?refcode=EM_GA_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-26_LIZ_J6I_ES-28345_RS&amount=%7B%7Bround_min_max\(zero_if_null\(HighestPreviousContributionAmount\)*1%2C1%2C10.00%2C100\)%7D%7D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDc1YWM4Mi02MzZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UOyN8YehxHt_3IqztRkm664RIT_o7pswmLo5_LwhAtY=)

Peter, we're asking for a $25 contribution to our campaign for Governor today, and here's why:
_We're getting absolutely clobbered with attacks online._
Every single day, Winsome Earle-Sears riles up her base with insults and distortions about Abigail Spanberger. We face these attacks on the airwaves, on social media, in interviews, from surrogates — it's nonstop and it's only going to get worse.
**To win this race, we must reach voters with the truth right now.**
Abigail has rolled out inspiring plans to move Virginia forward, but it takes a ton of resources to get the word out. That's why we've set such an ambitious fundraising goal for July, and it's why we're counting on your donation today to hit it.
If you have the ability to give $25 or more right now, it's sorely needed. _We run the risk of falling behind if these attacks go unanswered._

Every single day, Winsome Earle-Sears riles up her base with insults and distortions about Abigail Spanberger. We face these attacks on the airwaves, on social media, in interviews, from surrogates — it's nonstop and it's only going to get worse. To win this race, we must reach voters with the truth right now. Abigail has rolled out inspiring plans to move Virginia forward, but it takes a ton of resources to get the word out. That's why we've set such an ambitious fundraising goal for July, and it's why we're counting on your donation today to hit it. If you have the ability to give $25 or more right now, it's sorely needed. We run the risk of falling behind if these attacks go unanswered. = = = = = = = Thanks for all you do, Spanberger for Governor HQ By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. body:
We've hit the dreaded summer slump
#
I hate reaching out like this, Peter, but I want to be honest:
**We’ve officially hit the dreaded summer slump.**
It’s the six to eight weeks every year when online fundraising slows waaaayyyyy down. Usually, it’s something that campaigns and grassroots movements like ours are prepared for... but this year, after the slump this spring, we need an extra push to get back on track.
**So today, I’m coming to you directly to ask:[Will you chip in $10 or whatever works best for you today? name: Chris Deluzio
subject: I’m sick and tired of politicians sitting on the sidelines
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112193493/559708134/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzU3ZTJiMy02NzZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iLulEglxEQkaPO3bej8HsJnw-pI41cLC_aORXnuzrmE=&emci=c995e9f3-8c61-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=b757e2b3-676a-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13185894) **Derek, let me cut to the chase: Democrats need to stop playing it safe. We need more of a fighting spirit—period.**

We’re up against an administration that thinks the rules don’t apply, that has turned over power to a corrupt billionaire, that has waged attack after attack on hardworking people—from trying to undermine Social Security to ripping away jobs from veterans.

I’m sick and tired of politicians sitting on the sidelines, too afraid to speak up for what’s right. **Now is the time to stand up, speak out, and fight like hell whenever Trump and his allies try to plunder our government, strip away our rights, and sell out our communities.**

That’s why I’m taking action—calling out corruption, pushing back against their attacks, and refusing to back down. _But I can’t do it alone._

Taking on this kind of corruption takes a movement. It takes all of us standing together to send a message loud and clear: Enough. No more tax giveaways to the rich. No more looking the other way on corruption. No more attacks on working people while billionaires get richer. [**I want our party to be fighting like hell for people's economic dignity, for jobs, for housing, for health care, for a lower cost of living. I’ve made that front and center to the work I do every day, and if that’s the kind of work you can get behind, then I need you with me. name: Bryan
subject: Socialists Raise Millions to Take House
body:
2nd Quarter reports just came in and the numbers the radical left is putting up are eyepopping...

| | | | | [|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=2f0f6501c9&e=e907534017)
| | | | |

---
| | | | | _**Radical Left-Wing Candidates Raise Millions as Democrats Look to Take the House**_
---
| [ This week, it was announced that ](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=621361d6a2&e=e907534017)[**radical socialist AOC raised $5.8 million**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=d1789d5d6a&e=e907534017)**** in just four months. She was joined by Bernie Sanders who pulled in [**$4 million**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=49e6a0bc67&e=e907534017).
They are funded by individuals who are looking for the most radical candidates. Candidates who will:
* _Abolish ICE_
* _Implement the disastrous Green New Deal_
* _Set our country down the path to socialism_

They’ve been joined by the extreme NY mayoral candidate Zohran Mandami who declared: _**“This is Socialism we’re fighting for!“**_
Standing with them and cheering them on is a declared Democrat running for this seat, _**Randy Bryce.**_
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=f565e81fdc&e=e907534017)
| Bryce has supported [**abolishing ICE**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=90acc5670f&e=e907534017) and has a criminal record [**including arrests**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5be8cde3bd&e=e907534017)**** for theft and property damage. But while Bryce’s extreme record is out of touch with Wisconsin families, he’ll look to seize on the Socialists’ fundraising machine.
Worse, **left-wing** groups are running ads in our district, trying to take control of the House and stop our work.
---
| [DONATE TO FIGHT BACK](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=6dc4c33fad&e=e907534017)
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=eed8eb761d&e=e907534017)
| We are running for reelection and we will win! Just like last cycle when **The Left** came after us, spent **MILLIONS** on negative ads. But because of your help we were successful.
_But I can’t do it alone._
---
| [**Can I count on you to chip in right now?**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=62943ac28a&e=e907534017)
Our goal is to raise[ **$6,000** ](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=3c3dae53f1&e=e907534017)in the next [**72 hours**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=da98fdece4&e=e907534017) and help build our resources to win this race.
---
| Friends, I am ready to win, but I need your help.
[_**Can I count on your support to stop the socialist takeover of the House by donating $25, $50, or even $75 today?**_](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=054363b9c0&e=e907534017)
---
| [DONATE $25](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=d57e01e12d&e=e907534017)
---
| [DONATE $50](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=cdb94017ca&e=e907534017)
---
| [DONATE $75](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=f4bd5349f7&e=e907534017)
---
| **On Wisconsin,** Bryan Steil

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: BREAKING: “DNC member weighs challenge to Rep. Ilhan Omar.”
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250726-1447-foote&t=1001&akid=1447%2E342411%2ECGgN4u ]Squad Victory Fund

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250726-2-movement.Bugrse&refcode=em20250726-1447&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1447%2E342411%2ECGgN4u ]DNC member weighs challenge to Rep. Ilhan Omar.

Peter — This is
huge news.

Recently we learned that Ilhan Omar’s potential opponent in the race for
reelection is getting closer to stepping into the ring.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250726-2-movement.Bugrse&refcode=em20250726-1447&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1447%2E342411%2ECGgN4u ]If you understand what that means for our progressive movement and our
fight to reelect Ilhan, rush a contribution right now to the Squad Victory
Fund >>

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250726-2-movement.Bugrse&refcode=em20250726-1447&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1447%2E342411%2ECGgN4u ]CHIP IN $3

Peter, Ilhan’s
faced tough primary challenges in every election cycle since 2018.

And in each of those races, Ilhan won because she had the support of a
grassroots team that stood beside her. A grassroots team that knocked
doors, made phone calls, organized their community, and chipped in $5 or
$10 at a time to fund our efforts.

If anyone is thinking about jumping into this race, we can be certain that
their #1 priority will be securing the financial support they’ll need to
build a campaign and run constant attack ads against Ilhan. For all we
know, those donations could come from AIPAC, corporate Super PACs, or
billionaire mega-donors.

Simply put, we can’t be caught off guard while Ilhan’s challenger builds a
humungous war chest to spend against her. That would be a disaster for our
chances.

So, it’s critically important that we respond to this breaking news by
recommitting ourselves to reelecting Ilhan and defending our Squad
members.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250726-2-movement.Bugrse&refcode=em20250726-1447&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=1447%2E342411%2ECGgN4u ]Please, donate to the Squad Victory Fund right now to help our Squad
prepare to take on any and all challengers. Ilhan is a powerful voice on
the issues we care about and a leader in this progressive movement, and
it’s up to us to have her back.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250726-2-movement.Bugrse&refcode=em20250726-1447&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=1447%2E342411%2ECGgN4u ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1447%2E342411%2ECGgN4u

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Jeff Person, Able Dems
subject: The Americans with Disabilities Act turns 35!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | **** ******** **** **** **** **** The Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) celebrates its 35th anniversary on July 26th. This landmark legislation has been a lifeline for countless individuals, myself included. It protects our rights and ensures we have equal access to all areas of life. _Now it faces attacks from Trump and the MAGA movement._ The corrupt Trump administration has rolled back 11 vital ADA guidelines, leaving businesses to self-regulate, and diminishing the government's enforcement role. **I’m Jeff Person, founder of Able Dems and a proud member of the ADA generation. On this special day, I invite you to join our fight against these assaults on essential protections that have transformed lives by ensuring equal access and opportunity.** _As we honor the ADA's 35th anniversary, let’s remember its profound impact on promoting independence, inclusion, and dignity. It’s not just legislation; it’s a promise of a fairer society._ [**Help us amplify the voices of Democrats with disabilities, defend the ADA and build on our progress. clean_body: | | | ** **** The Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) celebrates its 35th anniversary on July 26th. This landmark legislation has been a lifeline for countless individuals, myself included. It protects our rights and ensures we have equal access to all areas of life. Now it faces attacks from Trump and the MAGA movement. The corrupt Trump administration has rolled back 11 vital ADA guidelines, leaving businesses to self-regulate, and diminishing the government's enforcement role. I’m Jeff Person, founder of Able Dems and a proud member of the ADA generation. On this special day, I invite you to join our fight against these assaults on essential protections that have transformed lives by ensuring equal access and opportunity. As we honor the ADA's 35th anniversary, let’s remember its profound impact on promoting independence, inclusion, and dignity. It’s not just legislation; it’s a promise of a fairer society. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** Let's protect the freedoms and opportunities the ADA guarantees. -Jeff Person, Founder, Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. # _Opinion:_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/94218e55-02f3-4a23-a6bd-1da6150a8a5e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

It's something I am somewhat ashamed to admit considering my political beliefs today, but I used to watch both "The Daily Show with Jon Stewart" and "The Colbert Report" when I was in high school.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..dQ2VrWjBmbTq76AgHQtHndOGPoQbfStPScrT5aZHLe0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=169328916)
My family did not have cable growing up, but I was able to catch episodes on the Comedy Central website, which posted them for free the day after they aired, after school. At the time, I found them funny and it blended with my general interest in news. Looking back on it, I realize their liberal-branded humor could have steered me towards their side. While the two of them would poke fun at Democrats occasionally, their most brutal jokes would be reserved for Republicans and Fox News.
I didn't really understand the motivations behind the jokes at the time, but I tended to agree with the idea behind the jokes as I didn't know any better. With Stewert and Colbert often mocking the white Fox News hosts like Sean Hannity and Bill O'Reilly, I truly believed Fox News was all white and racist.
Thankfully, I grew out of the habit and read a book about the history of Glock handguns and their inventor. While the book was not inherently political, it did open my eyes to how Democrats lied about Glocks when they were introduced to the United States, and if they lied about handguns back then, what were they lying about now?
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
_**[Together with Mode Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/b6d4afc6-839c-448f-beaa-b628f37d01c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
# **[America's Building the Data Economy. You Can Own Part of It.](https://substack.com/redirect/b6d4afc6-839c-448f-beaa-b628f37d01c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b6d4afc6-839c-448f-beaa-b628f37d01c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The U.S. is pouring **$500B** into infrastructure, with data centers and power grids to power the AI age.
It's a gold rush for tech giants. But **[Mode Mobile opens the door for you](https://substack.com/redirect/b6d4afc6-839c-448f-beaa-b628f37d01c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[.](https://substack.com/redirect/b6d4afc6-839c-448f-beaa-b628f37d01c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Mode's user-powered data economy is turning the day-to-day activities from over **50M** smartphone users into real income.
The _EarnPhone_ behind their profit-sharing model is now sold in Walmart, Best Buy and Target, and their momentum earned them the **[#1 spot on Deloitte's 2023 list of fastest growing software companies](https://substack.com/redirect/b6d4afc6-839c-448f-beaa-b628f37d01c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
In the AI age, data is the new oil--and its real value is unlocked only when refined. Mode Mobile is transforming raw data into earnings, and the opportunity to **become a shareholder is live.**
**[Invest at 0.30/share and join 50,000+ investors today.](https://substack.com/redirect/b6d4afc6-839c-448f-beaa-b628f37d01c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/b6d4afc6-839c-448f-beaa-b628f37d01c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Piece continues)**
Once I got into the news media business full-time and I was able to watch Fox News for myself, I understood how misled I was by the two comedians.
With news of Stephen Colbert's show being canceled, it reminded me I haven't watched the man perform "comedy" in years.
It has been hilarious to **[watch liberals and the mainstream media cry](https://substack.com/redirect/baad9114-ea57-4477-a2de-e7b314090a47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** over the unfunny comedy show that lost millions of dollars each year, claiming it is a "chilling" sign of the end of democracy under President Donald Trump.
Progressive writer Molly Jong-Fast told MSNBC the Colbert news is "simply not funny, but also really scary."
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..dQ2VrWjBmbTq76AgHQtHndOGPoQbfStPScrT5aZHLe0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=169328916)
Former NPR CEO Vivian Schiller said this proves that "this has not been a great week for free speech and speaking truth to power, without a doubt." After calling the financial reasons given by CBS "circumstantial," Schiller thought it did not make sense because the parent company "has spent money on other things."
CNN's chief media analyst, Brian Stelter, revealed that when talking with people at CBS, they told him "even when speaking frankly on condition of anonymity, that the move was financially driven, not politically motivated."
Stelter went on to say that despite hearing from people who are at CBS, "Many observers have huge doubts about that, given that Colbert has been an outspoken critic of President Trump."
More than that, Colbert's show had an audience problem. When he took over after David Letterman retired, the average age of viewers was 60. Executives hoped a younger host would bring in a younger audience. Instead, in the 10 years since Colbert has been at the helm, the show's average age has increased to 68.
The fact of the matter is, Colbert and most of the late-night comedy shows are not funny. They play for an applause, rather than a laugh. The idea the show can lose up to 40 million dollars a year and people still think it has a "right" to exist is mind blowing. Today's conservative media operates on a much smaller budget, but has a much bigger impact than Colbert.
The tides are shifting for a reason. Whether it's the Democrats' continued historic unpopularity or unfunny hacks finally getting the boot, it appears liberals and progressives are intent on not learning the reason for that shift.

Peter ,
Donald Trump just made it crystal clear: he’s not waiting until 2026 to rig the midterms, he’s already working behind the scenes to keep control of Congress, and he’s not being subtle about it.
In fact, he’s handpicking loyalists, clearing the field in GOP primaries, and pressuring state legislators in red states to draw their congressional maps to rig the election for Republicans.
Trump knows that if Democrats take back Congress, we can stop his disastrous agenda and start holding him accountable. That’s why he’s already campaigning, fundraising, and flooding swing states like Iowa, Michigan, New York, and North Carolina with operatives.
🚨 If we don’t fight back now, Trump’s GOP will cement their grip on power -- again.
GOTV PAC is building a turnout machine focused on the voters Republicans are trying to silence -- young people, working-class voters, and communities of color, but we need your help to ramp up in these battlegrounds before it’s too late. ## `Independent Media Just .26/day With Paid-Subscription Benefits!`
* _**Connect With Us:** Weekly AMA w Cliff & David! Comment on all content and DM us_
* _**Behind The Velvet Rope:** Insider stories, behind the scenes video, including bloopers _
* _**Deserved Recognition:** Shout-outs during our weekly show, "Amped Up w/ Cliff Schecter"_
* _**Save Democracy:** Support our Soundcheck Fund to create an ecosystem of independent media--**free of corporate control** --to [Save our Democracy](https://substack.com/redirect/837648e0-c58a-4f47-a223-28a25234cd25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.ZZNwHVrHlWpvLWNJZ9AQJuFdevlPKRKOXn_54swDvE4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=169334316)

## **Trump Once Again Takes Pyrite and Calls it Gold**
Once again, Donald Trump is bloviating and bellowing - not to illuminate, not to govern, but to declare yet another hollow victory in the name of the great American sucker.
Trump's latest sham? A so-called trade deal with Japan, sold to all the cheering GOP rubes in red hats as "the largest trade deal ever made." The magnitude of Trump's triumph, _according to Trump_ , is a 15% tariff on all goods imported into the U.S. from Japan.
It's less than the 25% Trump had originally threatened, but more than the 2% tariff on Japanese imports before Trump took office in January. By the divine arithmetic of Trumpism, this counts as a win.
Unfortunately, in the reality-based world, tariffs are a tax on consumers. So, in plain English, **Trump has** _**raised taxes**_**-- a 650% increase, from 2% to 15%**--**not on the Japanese,** **but on** **Americans** who import Japanese goods. All goods - electronics, vehicles, and parts.
This is not a blow against foreign treachery; it is a tax on U.S. citizens, enacted in the name of national pride and economic "genius." Americans will pay more and Trump wants credit for it. How perfectly TACO Trump.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/69bef57b-ba4e-485c-8fbc-a05c5c246447?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And what has Trump received in return for this elegant act of economic masochism? A few vague promises of U.S. manufacturing market access in Japan and a phantom investment in the U.S of $550 billion--yes, billion--from Japan.
Like a sideshow barker swearing the bearded lady is a real beauty, Trump assures us this money will create "hundreds of thousands of U.S. jobs." To call this fantasy optimistic is to insult the word. It is more akin to voodoo economics dressed in gold leaf and shoved into a red hat.
University of Michigan economist Justin Wolfers looked at this deal on MSNBC and laughed - not a laugh of joy. But the weary cackle of a man watching a toddler stick a fork in an electric socket.
"This is how you fool a president who doesn't understand economics into thinking he's done something," Wolfers said.
* * *
**WATCH OUR VIDEO ON THIS TRUMP TRAVESTY**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/367691c0-bcf3-457b-83a1-aa5c3babbf6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_**Economist Justin Wolfers explains just how ridiculous Trump 's "deal" truly is**_
* * *
Trump seems to believe that forcing Americans to pay more for Japanese goods is a blow against Tokyo, and that the Japanese will suddenly yearn for American made goods simply because _old man orange_ demands it.
For example, Trump claims this new trade deal will open up Japanese markets to American made automobiles. Trump fantasizes the Japanese are crying out for Ford F-150's the size of small apartments. It is nonsense.
As Wolfers notes, the Japanese drive small cars because their streets are small, their fuel prices high, and their tastes in automobiles are not guided by NASCAR.
This is not a difficult equation. If American automakers want to boost their sales in Japan (there have been no Japanese tariffs on US automobiles for a decade now) -- Detroit will have to build what the Japanese actually want, _not what Trump thinks they should want_.
## `Independent Media Just .26/day With Paid-Subscription Benefits!`
* _**Connect With Us:** Weekly AMA w Cliff & David! Comment on all content and DM us_
* _**Behind The Velvet Rope:** Insider stories, behind the scenes video, including bloopers _
* _**Deserved Recognition:** Shout-outs during our weekly show, "Amped Up w/ Cliff Schecter"_
* _**Save Democracy:** Support our Soundcheck Fund to create an ecosystem of independent media--**free of corporate control** --to [Save our Democracy](https://substack.com/redirect/837648e0-c58a-4f47-a223-28a25234cd25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.ZZNwHVrHlWpvLWNJZ9AQJuFdevlPKRKOXn_54swDvE4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=169334316)

But this is the essential tragedy of Trump: a man so enamored with his own ignorance, truculence and bullsh*t that he confuses self-concocted illusion for actual accomplishment.
**Trump builds nothing, understands less, and yet prances like a rooster atop his own pile of feathers.**
In the meantime, the White House is providing no details or guidance on the alleged Japanese pledge. _Experts note the $550 Billion Japanese investment in the U.S. would be less than Japan 's investment in the U.S. during the Biden years_.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1492b049-e470-41cd-98e4-75990574df16?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
One imagines the Japanese government representatives toasting each other over sake, marveling at the ease with which they snookered a President who negotiates with the fervor of a poker player who thinks a full house means three queens and two McNuggets.
The Japanese know, as many Americans keep discovering, that Trump is--and has never been anything other than--a sleazy pitchman. A seller of snake oil mixed with a witch's brew of fear, nationalism, and industrial strength nonsense.
Trump's base, ever eager for a show, cannot distinguish between investment and hot air, economic growth and economic theater.
So, we are left with a U.S. President proclaiming a trade deal triumph and selling the nation the first actual border wall he's ever actually built--it's made of fun house mirrors and faces inward. This is a stunt, a grift, a public relations con played on the global stage.
To a world full of regular people, political and economic leaders, and even a Pope, all of whom seem dazed each new day that this is our reality. That the United States of America willfully chose to re-elect this cruel joke of a man as our President.
* * *
_David Shuster is an Emmy award winning broadcast journalist who is best known for his work at NBC News and as an anchor MSNBC. He is a contributor to Blue Amp Substack and co-host of our weekly show (Thursdays, 2pm et, on Substack), "Amped Up w/ Cliff Schecter."_

**_Peter — This campaign is built on persistence._**

Whether it's in committee hearings or on the neighborhoods of California’s 19th Congressional District, I stay _focused on the job_ and on _delivering results_ for working families, _protecting_ our public lands, and _pushing back_ against chaos in Washington.

This month, we've seen more dangerous moves from the Administration, including its deportation policies, cuts to healthcare and nutrition programs for working families, and adding trillions to our national debt. Meanwhile, I’m working to pass legislation that protects our communities from wildfire, strengthens Social Security, and expands access to affordable housing..

**But here's the truth:** doing that work takes resources. We’ve set an end-of-month goal of $25,000 to make sure we can keep showing up and fighting back. That money will go toward digital outreach, voter engagement, and preparing for the long road to 2026.

name: EMAIL FROM THE PRESIDENT
subject: I want your opinion — we just hit 6 months
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc

In a moment, I’m going to tell you about my vision for this election — and I would love it if you took the time to read my full message. But if you’re short on time, will you split an $10 contribution to my campaign and Ohio House Dems to help me become the next Democratic U.S. Senator? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112194923/559713535/-701326135?refcode=250726_Stevenson_Mitch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2NjNjEyZi03NzZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BMwXp5uKmBU227AC5fl7__rg5Jb-llXX-7FPSAeM41c=) Friend, I was born and raised right here in Kentucky. I’ve spent my life in service to our communities, state, and country. I served as a JAG attorney in the U.S. Air Force for 27 years with the rank of Colonel. In the Air Force, I successfully negotiated several hostage crises and prosecuted violent criminals and child sex offenders. I'm a nonprofit founder for legal services veterans and seniors in need, ordained minister, and the Floor Leader of the Kentucky House Democrats. I know firsthand the challenges Kentucky and our country are up against. [**So now, after 27 years of serving our state and our country, I am running for Senate, but I can't start this fight alone. That’s why I’m reaching out to you personally: Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and Ohio House Dems TONIGHT to show the world I have what it takes to win this race? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112194924/559713536/-701326135?refcode=250726_Stevenson_Mitch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2NjNjEyZi03NzZhLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BMwXp5uKmBU227AC5fl7__rg5Jb-llXX-7FPSAeM41c=) I am ready to run for Senate to defend our freedoms and build an economy that works for everyone – no matter your background. Every American deserves access to food, clean water, healthcare, education, and shelter. **But Mitch McConnell and the GOP do not see things the same way.** During his 40 years in the Senate, he’s put his personal quest for power and his special-interest allies ahead of our state, nation, and Constitution every time. name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Canceling The Late Show is a political attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39927%2E3422442%2E2j9wiC)
Peter,
Just three days after Stephen Colbert called out his network's parent company for paying Donald Trump a $16 million settlement, CBS canceled _The Late Show_.
A powerful corporation is silencing criticism of the Administration to appease Trump–it’s not just about late night TV. This is about corruption and silencing political speech. We can’t let them get away with it.
**[That’s why our campaign is joining voices across the country to tell CBS: Don’t cancel Colbert! Will you add your name today to help us reach 300,000 signatures?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21522?t=3&akid=39927%2E3422442%2E2j9wiC)**
[Sign the Petition](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21522?t=4&akid=39927%2E3422442%2E2j9wiC)
_The Late Show_ has been a CBS flagship for more than a decade. Colbert has used his platform to speak truth to power, especially when it comes to Trump’s attacks on our democracy and on states like California.
But now his voice is being cut off as part of a larger ploy; Trump and his allies try to silence anyone who speaks out.
We all have a part to play in standing up to authoritarianism. When one voice is targeted, the rest of us have to speak up louder.
**[That’s why we need to put pressure on CBS right now. Can you help us get to 300,000 signatures urging them to keep Colbert on the air?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21522?t=5&akid=39927%2E3422442%2E2j9wiC)**
[Add Your Name](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21522?t=6&akid=39927%2E3422442%2E2j9wiC)
Thank you,
Team KP

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250726-39927&amounts=&t=7&refcode2=39927_3422442_2j9wiC&akid=39927%2E3422442%2E2j9wiC)**

Greg Abbott is hijacking a disaster — and we need your help to stop him.
Before we explain how bad this is, here’s what we need from you:
👉 Chip in now to help stop Abbott’s blatant power grab and defend democracy in Texas >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-abbott?refcode=072125_4]
Texans are grieving. Families are still searching for the missing.
Floodwaters haven’t even receded — and Abbott just called a special session of the legislature.
Not for relief.
Not for recovery.
But to redraw congressional maps mid-cycle and give Trump a partisan edge in 2026.
This isn’t disaster response — it’s a calculated, authoritarian move to rig the next election while the public is focused on survival.
Texas Democrats are already mobilizing, but they can’t do this alone. They need legal firepower, organizing funds, and rapid-response communications to fight this from every angle.

name: Dan Freeman (via Democrats.org)
subject: Join me in fighting against Texas’ gerrymandering
body:
---
Hi Derek, It’s Dan Freeman, the DNC’s Litigation Director. I’m reaching out today to share some appalling news about President Trump’s plan to gerrymander Texas and give Republicans FIVE new seats in Congress. In a minute, I’m going to ask you to **[split a donation between the DNC and the Texas Democratic Party to help Democrats fight back.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-tx-split?amount=10&refcode=em_20250726_4072_fr&refcode2=4072_22930333_uopVvZ&akid=4072%2E22930333%2EuopVvZ)** But first, let me explain: Texas and I have some history. Before I joined the DNC, I was a voting rights lawyer for the Department of Justice, where I helped block Texas’ discriminatory 2011 redistricting and led the fight against its 2021 maps. **Derek, Texas is _already_ home to some of the worst gerrymandering in the country.** And now, President Trump has demanded that they make a bad map much, much worse — all to stack the deck against Democrats taking back Congress in 2026. And do you know what makes this even more shameful? Governor Greg Abbott is trying to do all of this during a special session he supposedly called to deal with flood prevention, relief, and recovery. But his first priority is to ram through a redraw of Texas’ congressional map. **To sum it up, he’s playing politics with a tragedy.** Now it’s up to us to do something about it. If you’re in Texas, it’s time to organize, attend public forums, and speak out at the Legislature. If you’re not in the Lone Star State, then please donate right now to fund the DNC’s organizing efforts in Texas and around the country. [There’s not much time left, so let’s get to work: Split $10 between the DNC and the Texas Democratic Party as they stand up to stop Donald Trump and Texas Republicans from redrawing the map to benefit themselves →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-tx-split?refcode=em_20250726_4072_fr&amount=10&refcode2=4072_22930333_uopVvZ&akid=4072%2E22930333%2EuopVvZ)**

And now, President Trump has demanded that they make a bad map much, much worse — all to stack the deck against Democrats taking back Congress in 2026. And do you know what makes this even more shameful? Governor Greg Abbott is trying to do all of this during a special session he supposedly called to deal with flood prevention, relief, and recovery. But his first priority is to ram through a redraw of Texas’ congressional map. To sum it up, he’s playing politics with a tragedy. Now it’s up to us to do something about it. If you’re in Texas, it’s time to organize, attend public forums, and speak out at the Legislature. If you’re not in the Lone Star State, then please donate right now to fund the DNC’s organizing efforts in Texas and around the country. If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between the Texas Democratic Party and the Democratic National Committee instantly: | | | | | | | | | | ** Thank you, Dan Dan Freeman Litigation Director Democratic National Committee If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

subject: Your Florida Receipt:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.41.25%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Friend, They hand you this receipt every month and expect you to say thank you:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/3648686D5942445135526F47557934312B365A456E4958494A657A484C585678556B454343457A786A6B5A62325831326B66462F414D36524936466E33513939/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-07-26%20at%202.22.58%E2%80%AFPM.png]
I’m Josh Weil, and I say enough. It’s time to refund working families, not billionaires. It’s time to give teachers, veterans, and everyday Floridians a break.
For years, the Republican party has gerrymandered and divided Dems into uncomfortable spots, and the party has slowly ceded Blue territory and surrendered incumbent seats. Our campaign is rebuilding, not just to take this seat, but to reach voters across Florida and rebuild the infrastructure we need to turn this state Blue.
Let’s turn this around, pitch in $10 today and help us continue hosting events, meeting voters, and shattering expectations.. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?refcode=NTLJUL23]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
Together, we’ll print a new receipt. One with livable wages, respect for everyone, and affordability written all over it.
I can’t do it alone, though.
With Hope,
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.05.04%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
Josh Weil for US Senate
5800 Beach Blvd. STE 203-337
Jacksonville, FL 32207
United States
